data.title: Orderly Network and Very Long Swap To Expand Web3 Frontiers in Asian Markets, Introduces First-ever Japanese-built PerpDEX
data.description: Japanese-based builders to deliver omnichain perps trading, powered by Orderly

blocks.body:
Orderly Network, the leading permissionless DeFi liquidity hub and perpDEX infrastructure provider, is expanding its presence in the Asian market through a strategic partnership with Very Long Swap (VLS), a Japanese-based decentralized exchange (DEX) builder. 

Very Long Swap, a prominent DEX built on Astar zkEVM, is inspired by the popular Japanese NFT project, Very Long Animals. With permission to utilize the IP from Very Long Animals, VLS offers a platform for swaps, farming, and staking opportunities, catering to one of Asia's largest and most diverse Web3 communities.

According to a [Skyquest 2024 -2031 forecast analysis](https://www.skyquestt.com/report/web-3-0-blockchain-market#:~:text=Global%20web%203.0%20market%20size,period%20(2024%2D2031).), the Asia-Pacific market is expected to experience the fastest growth in Web3, driven by the financial and banking industry’s growing adoption of blockchain technology and Web3-based digital solutions. This is further exemplified by [ongoing development](https://www.japanopenchain.org/en/docs/about/intro#:~:text=The%20Japan%20Open%20Chain%20is,consortium%20permissioned%20node%20type%20blockchain.) of the Japan Open Chain (JOC), an EVM-compatible chain with numerous major Japanese tech, banking, media giants, and platform partners serving as stablecoin issuers and validators to the network.


This strategic partnership will enable VLS to build the first-ever perpDEX specifically designed for the Japanese market, developed by Japanese-based builders. Future plans include listing a USD/JPY FX perpetual contracts asset pair, as well as integrating with the JOC Chain to deliver innovative DeFi solutions.

**Takahiko Kojima, CEO, Very Long Swap** commenting on the future of perpDEX and its impact on Japan’s DeFi landscape, stated:

>“Having a PERP feature in a Japan-based DeFi project is quite rare, and considering future integration with stablecoins, there's only hope for market expansion. We are honored to partner with Orderly and collaborate with VLS users at a high level! Many users are eagerly anticipating the PERP release, and we can’t wait to see it in action!”

Orderly Network offers a truly omnichain trading solution, aggregating orders from multiple chains into a single unified orderbook. This approach enhances trading efficiency, improves liquidity, and tightens market spreads for any asset across any trading venue. Powered by the Orderly Chain and Layerzero technology, Orderly provides seamless, permissionless liquidity infrastructure for over 20+ DEX platforms and brokers built on the network.

With support for six chains—Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Ethereum mainnet, and Mantle—VLS traders can access a shared orderbook, with all trades settled on the Orderly Chain, unlocking efficient cross-netting capabilities while maintaining the autonomy and transparency of DeFi.

Since launch, Orderly Network has recorded a cumulative trading volume of $80 billion, with cumulative net fees exceeding $10 million and ATH milestone of $1.8 billion  24hr trading volume as of [publishing date], according to data from [Dune Analytics](https://dune.com/orderly_network/orderly-dashboard).

**Ran Yi, Co-founder of Orderly Network**, reiterated the network’s drive to foster innovation in various markets. He stated; 
>“Partnering with Very Long Swap, a popular DEX in Japan and elsewhere in Asia, is a significant step in our mission to bring seamless, omnichain trading to the forefront of global markets. By integrating omnichain trading with groundbreaking financial products, we’re enabling Japanese traders and builders to access unmatched liquidity and efficiency. We are eager to see how this collaboration will drive the next wave of DeFi adoption in one of Asia’s most vibrant digital economies."

Orderly [previously announced](https://www.cryptonews.net/news/blockchain/27954440/) its introduction to the Asian market with renowned fintech powerhouse, Slash Finance. This integration with VLS further compounds Orderly’s footprint in the Asia market, bringing the most Web3-friendly region to the forefront of DeFi’s evolution.

**Trade on VLS perpDEX here: [VLS Perp](https://perp.verylongswap.xyz/perp/PERP_BTC_USDC)**

data.title: We Sponsored Sir Otterly’s Frens at the IOSF 🦦🎗️
data.description: Because Otters Deserve to Thrive—Both in Water and DeFi!

blocks.body:
At Orderly Network, we don’t just move orderbook trading across chains; we’re moving hearts too. You may have seen our beloved mascot, Sir Otterly, popping up in your 𝕏 feed. Well, we're excited to announce that we're taking our love for otters from the blockchain to the real world. 

We've officially partnered with the [International Otter Survival Fund (IOSF)](https://otter.org/) to help protect otters worldwide. 

By sponsoring the IOSF we are:

- Saving the world’s otters
- Stopping the otter trade
- Educating the next generation

Yes, you read that right—Orderly Network is going full otter mode! 🦦

### Why Otters?

Why tf did we choose an otter as our mascot? Let’s break it down:

- **Ferocity Level: Jason Bourne** 🕶️ - Otters are secretly some of the most badass creatures on the planet. If you think sharks are tough, imagine an otter taking down a venomous snake, and then chilling out like nothing happened (did this ever happen? we plead the fifth). True story: one otter even took a chunk out of our intern during a cold dip in Cape Town. 
- **Liquid Legends** 🌊 - Otters are masters of the liquidity game, literally. They can close their nostrils while swimming, just like we keep things(spreads) tight with our liquidity infrastructure. Plus, they’ve evolved to grow a nifty little pocket under their arms to store tools—just like we’re evolving DeFi to smash through market inefficiencies.
- **Resilient and Innovative** 🛠️ - Otters are the "OG DeFi natives", always adapting and evolving to tackle new challenges. Whether it’s smashing crabs or smashing trading inefficiencies, otters (and Orderly) are always ahead of the game.

Now, we’re taking our otter love one step further by supporting the people who help these furry ninjas thrive in the wild.

### Enter the IOSF: The Ultimate Otter Guardians

The International Otter Survival Fund (IOSF) has been working tirelessly since 1993 to make sure otters don’t just survive but thrive. Based out of the Scottish wilderness on the Isle of Skye, they’ve treated over 250 injured otters and cubs, and supported conservation projects in 103 countries across the globe.. 

But their work isn’t just about treating otters like cute, fluffy patients. They’re also deeply involved in education, research, and training. They've organized 9 workshops in Asia, Africa and South America, as well as 2 conferences in the UK on _**Otter Toxicology**_ and the _**European Otter in Europe**_, spreading the otter love far and wide. 🗺️🌍

### Why We're Getting Involved

At Orderly, we like to do cool stuff. So when we heard that the IOSF would let us join them in saving some Sir Otterly frens, we jumped at the chance to sponsor the heroes protecting our Otterly beloved mascot in real life. And just like you can’t get enough of Sir Otterly and his [“raunchy” antics on 𝕏](https://x.com/OtterlyFans/status/1810209088980050010), we couldn’t resist the opportunity to make a splash by helping out with IOSF’s incredible work.

### Otters & Orderly: A Raunchy DeFi Affair

We know, otters and DeFi might seem like an odd couple at first glance. But think about it—both are adaptable, innovative, and not afraid to dive into deep waters to get things done. At Orderly, we believe in a future where financial systems (and ecosystems) are fair, open, and thriving for everyone. That’s why we’re stoked to be supporting the IOSF in their mission to protect otters, the OG liquidity gliders of nature.

Catch up with all Sir Otterly updates here: [https://x.com/OtterlyFans](https://x.com/OtterlyFans)

### What’s Next? More Otter Love!

We’ll be sharing more updates on our partnership with IOSF and how you, our community, can get involved. Stay tuned for some epic otter content (we’re talking photos, stories, and maybe even a few more memes).

Here’s to more DeFi innovation, more otter rescues, and a whole lot more Sir Otterly adventures. 💪🦦

data.title: Kai Exchange Integrates Orderly Network to Power Perps Trading on Base
data.description: Kai Exchanged Launch Onchain Perps Trading - powered by Orderly Network

blocks.body:
Orderly Network is proud to announce its partnership with <u>[Kai Exchange](https://app.kai.exchange/)</u>, a frictionless perps trading platform on Base that focuses on secure and seamless trading experience. This integration aims to reinvigorate onchain trading for Kai Exchange users by delivering an agile and universal perp DEX, leveraging Orderly’s robust omnichain infrastructure. 

With over 400k onchain traders and 70B+ in total trading volumes, Kai Exchange’s successful integration with Orderly Network opens up its user base to one of the best liquidity sources for onchain perps trading in Web3, and delivers an enhanced trading experience – backed by Orderly’s robust trading infrastructure.

Introducing new perps trading paradigms to its users, Kai Exchange’s perp DEX launch is exemplified by:
- **Seamless onboarding:** Traders can create a Kai Account in under 60 seconds using biometric authentication, eliminating complex wallet setups and enabling instant trading access.
- **One-click, gasless trading**: Users can execute trades effortlessly with a single click, free from gas fees and multi-step approvals.
- **Mobile access:** Traders can access their Kai Account on mobile devices anytime, anywhere, combining self-custody with advanced security and passwordless logins.
- **Access to unparalleled liquidity:** Kai Exchange users can now access Orderly's robust omnichain shared liquidity infrastructure providing traders to trade with minimal slippage, low-latency, and tighter spreads across 50+ listed assets.
- **Streamlined CEX-like trading experience:** Traders can now long or short positions via an intuitive orderbook interface with superior execution speeds that mirror CEXs but maintains the sovereignty of DEXs.

Perps positions on Kai Exchange will be settled onchain alongside trades from other Orderly-supported networks, creating a truly omnichain trading with integrated support for cross-chain deposits and withdrawals on any chain, for any asset – without any bridging involved.

>“Our partnership with Orderly enables Kai Exchange to offer a frictionless perpetual trading experience on Base. By leveraging Orderly's infrastructure, we're able to provide our users with deep liquidity, optimal pricing, and high-performance, gasless trading. This collaboration significantly enhances our ability to deliver a seamless and secure trading environment, aligning perfectly with our mission.”  - _**Meliksah, CEO, Kai Exchange**_

While trading becomes more seamless on Kai Exchange, Orderly will also benefit from increased protocol activity as traders swiftly conduct trades, leveraging the newfound advantages of omnichain liquidity, seamless cross-chain deposits and withdrawals, and a familiar orderbook onchain trading experience.

>“One of our primary values is to serve as the foundation for the rapid development of onchain trading protocols,” **said Arjun Arora, COO, Orderly Network**. Kai Exchange’s perp DEX launch reinforces this core value of ours as they effectively tap into one of the largest liquidity sources in Web3. Kai Exchange’s integration propels us forward in our bid to make DeFi simple to use, yet comprehensive enough to meet the onchain needs of traders and builders.”

Enhanced liquidity, competitive fees, and CEX-like performance sets the stage for an unmatched onchain trading experience for Kai Exchange users. As Orderly welcomes Kai Exchange into its robust and ever expanding ecosystem, traders can expect to see more innovative trading tools, powered by the growing synergy between Orderly Network and Kai Exchange.

_**About Kai Exchange**_

_Kai Exchange is a platform offering perpetual trading on Base. Launched with a mission to simplify and enhance the trading experience, Kai provides secure, self-custodial trading. Users can create accounts in seconds using biometric authentication, execute trades with a single click, and access their accounts securely from any device. Kai Exchange prioritizes safety, speed, and user experience. With its focus, Kai aims to make perpetual trading accessible and secure for both new and experienced traders._

_Trade now on Kai Exchange:_  _<u>[kai.exchange](https://kai.exchange/perp/PERP_BTC_USDC)</u>_

_**About Orderly Network**_

_Orderly Network is a permissionless liquidity layer for Web3 trading. Built on omnichain infrastructure, Orderly enables deep liquidity for any asset across multiple blockchains. Focused on a future of DeFi that’s open to all, Orderly empowers developers to fluidly create a comprehensive array of financial products for any level of trader, without the risks of wrapped asset movement through cross-chain bridging._

data.title: Why Everyone Should Be Trading on an Orderly-powered DEX
data.description: Orderly's infrastructure delivers the best top-of-orderbook liquidity for perps

blocks.body:
When trading, one of the biggest things to watch out for is liquidity at the quoted buy and sell prices. Liquidity is all about how smoothly you can get in and out of a position at the price shown without having to dive deeper into the orderbook to find the next best price.

If the volume offered by a market maker or liquidity provider isn't enough, you'll end up with **slippage**—getting a worse price than expected. This means you're paying a wider spread. Hence it is important for the liquidity and volumes at the top of the orderbook to be liquid enough to handle your trade size.

Top-of-orderbook(or simply top-of-book) liquidity provides the highest bid (buy order) and lowest ask (sell order) in an orderbook of a broker. A healthy top of book liquidity enables traders execute trades with minimal slippage and tighter spreads. Oftentimes, traders see their orders filled at a different price from the quoted price which leads to paying a wider spread on such trade.


Most traders might not notice these small differences right away, but slippage can add up over time. This lack of orderbook understanding can really eat into your gains and shake your trust in your broker.

**How slippage can affect your portfolio over time**

Consider a scenario where a trader sees the current price of ETH at $3444.78 and decides to place a market order to buy 10 ETH. The orderbook is as seen below;

Given the illustrated table above, say you want to sell 10 ETH, your order should be executed at the quoted price. Right?

That only happens when the volume is right and liquidity is sufficient, albeit, at the top of the orderbook. On “other DEXs”, your order will be filled at the next best price point – 3,444.5 in this case,(instead of 3,444.3) given the insufficient volume of only 5 ETH at the top of book. On Orderly-powered DEXs, with volumes at 30 ETH, your order is actually executed at 3444.79, and with even more precision – given the extra decimal points. The extra decimal places allows for more precise pricing, offering tighter quotes than other DEXs.

In essence, on other DEXs, only a part of your order (5.5847 ETH) gets filled at the top of the orderbook in this scenario, with the rest (4.4153 ETH) filled at the second layer of the book with the associated spread applied (0.6).


While this may be considered a negligible difference, it can add up over a large number of trades, affecting your overall portfolio return. Think about this slippage creeping into your profits over 100 trades. 

**The Orderly Difference**

Although the price and bid-offer spread will change, and liquidity will differ with each trade, we can observe how these factors evolve from a cost perspective over time by expanding on the parameters in this example.

Consider trades executed at 3,444.5 with a 0.001% spread on Orderly against 3,445.5 with a 0.006% spread.

As seen above, while this graph might be a stretch, the cost effect on your portfolio over a number of trades becomes non-negligible, thus affecting your overall PnL in the long run. Orderly-powered DEXs continually enjoy deep liquidity with tighter spreads and precise execution fostered by our robust infrastructure for perps trading.

In essence, we have not only become one of the biggest sources of liquidity in DeFi but also the best place to trade perps in Web3. 

[Trade on an Orderly-powered DEX today](https://orderly.network/docs/introduction/trade-on-orderly/brokers)

data.title: PR Feature: Orderly Network Launches AI Bounty Program with Google Cloud and Empyreal to Power the Future of Web3 Trading
data.description: Empowering Web3: Orderly, Google Cloud & Empyreal Launch AI Bounty

blocks.body:
**SINGAPORE, 21:30, Tuesday 17 September 2024:**. Web3 liquidity layer Orderly Network has announced a bounty program hosted in conjunction with Google Cloud and Empyreal. The campaign will reward developers building AI agents to trade autonomously on Orderly. 

A step forward in uniting the powers of AI and DeFi, the bounty program will support Orderly’s goal of developing the first onchain derivatives platform capable of supporting AI agents. The creation of these agents by independent developers will enable automated transactions that make use of the latest advancements in AI and web3 technology.

Full details of the bounty program will be released at TOKEN2049 in Singapore on September 18-19. The program will commence immediately afterwards and is expected to run for several weeks. During this time, developers who enroll in the program and successfully create and deploy AI agents on Orderly will be eligible to receive a share of the prize pool. Each agent will be evaluated on participation across two categories - highest profitability and most innovative predictor - and if they meet the requirements, can qualify for prizes in both.

AI agents developed for use on Orderly are expected to be geared towards sophisticated traders initially and for developers seeking to create advanced trading applications. Orderly will subsequently support the development of AI agents that can be used by intermediate traders who will be able to participate in derivatives trading with no coding knowledge required.

Orderly Network uses Google Cloud technology  to underpin its  user-centric developer tools designed to lower the barriers to entry in DeFi space. Orderly Network’s efforts focus on developing off-chain components of DeFi infrastructure, addressing critical challenges related to self-custody and transparency.

The AI bounty program is the next step in this collaboration. Leveraging Google Cloud’s understanding of the web3 sector and advanced AI technologies, the initiative aims to onboard web2 developers to participate in the program, with the transition to web3 development being made easy by campaign partner Empyreal, who is providing their SDK. 

Arjun Arora, Orderly Network COO said: 
>“It’s been a year since Orderly Network and Google Cloud began the collaboration, focused on driving the mainstream adoption of DeFi. Looking ahead, we believe that AI innovation will be pivotal in revolutionizing on-chain trading. Orderly’s bounty program empowers AI developers to create groundbreaking tools that will redefine the on-chain experience. This initiative invites both Web2 and Web3 developers to build autonomous agents utilizing diverse data sources, bridging the gap between today’s potential and the future of DeFi.”

Rishi Ramchandani, Head of Web3 APAC, Google Cloud said:  
>“Our work with Orderly builds on our mission to empower Web3 developers with secure cloud and AI technology to scale their applications. We look forward to welcoming more developers to build AI agents using our technology.” 

Johnny, Founder and Lead Developer, Empyreal said:  
>“We’re excited for our SDK to be featured in this program with Orderly and Google Cloud. This will allow our trading kits to fuel new bots and AI agents, giving devs and traders a simpler process for deploying effective agents. Orderly is the ideal location for our SDK to be used for building the future of AI trading.”

AI agents are gaining traction within the crypto space but the technology is still in its infancy. Such agents specialize in automating tasks and interacting with multiple data sources, allowing traders to make more informed decisions. They have particular potential in the field of perps trading, where multiple data sources must be queried in order to make optimal decisions based on rapidly changing market conditions.

In addition to derivatives markets, AI agents have potential within such crypto sectors as prediction markets, staking, gaming, and DeFi. AI agents can retrieve data from on and offchain sources and use this information to execute transactions for payments, trading, cross-chain transfers, and much more.

The collaborative bounty program will incentivize developers to demonstrate their creativity and will pave the way for further innovations that empower traders to make smarter decisions while reducing information overload. In the process, they will form the backbone of an advanced derivatives trading framework on Orderly’s scalable web3 network and unlock new use cases that leverage the power of AI.

### About Orderly Network

Orderly Network is a cloud liquidity infrastructure designed to revolutionize web3 trading. Built on omnichain architecture, Orderly enables deep liquidity for any asset across multiple blockchains. Focused on a future of DeFi that’s open to all, Orderly empowers traders and developers alike.

Learn more at [orderly.network](https://orderly.network/)	

For PR enquiries related to this release, please contact pr@orderly.network

data.title: Hold Your Breath a Second, BooDEX is on Orderly!

blocks.body:
We are announcing the successful integration of BooDEX, a perpDEX backed by Ghosty Labs and renowned for its low fee and robust trading architecture. BooDEX will now offer onchain perps trading for all its users, powered by Orderly Network.

Furthermore, the team at BooDEX have announced a total giveaway of 500 USD for two winners in the form of 125 USD in native GHSY token and 125 USDT per winner.  To enter this giveaway,  
- Follow [@Ghosty.cash on 𝕏](https://x.com/ghostycash)
- Follow [@OrderlyNetwork on 𝕏](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork) 
- Comment “Go BOO”

### BooDEX: One key unpicking several locks
BooDEX will be the flagship perp DEX of [Ghosty Cash](https://www.ghosty.cash/), a multichain bridge and swap platform that enables seamless transfers across 70+ chains. In other words, BooDEX will readily leverage the multichain capabilities of Ghosty Cash, serving as an integrated hub for both swaps and perps trading.

BooDEX and Ghosty Cash are part of a comprehensive ecosystem being developed by Ghosty Labs, their parent company. The Orderly-BooDEX partnership will unlock new use cases for DeFi users, harnessing Orderly’s omnichain liquidity and Ghosty Cash’s extensive reach.

### Bringing Ghosty Labs to the Fore!
Ghosty Labs is not new in the Web3 and DeFi space. It is actively building an impressive ecosystem currently comprising two key products, with 2 more currently under development.

- Ghosty Cash: A multichain bridge connecting 70+ chains and amassing over $37 million in total spot swaps;
- BooDEX: The multichain perp DEX powered by Orderly’s omnichain infrastructure.

### What Orderly Brings to the Table
Readily, BooDEX is guaranteed deep liquidity by integrating with Orderly Network, the foremost liquidity source in DeFi. It will benefit from a pool that already supports 400k active users and has accumulated $70+ billion in transaction volume. Leveraging Orderly, BooDex unlocks a universe of benefits for its user base, including: 
- Unmatched Top-of-Book Liquidity: BooDex users will gain access to Orderly's shared orderbook with deep liquidity powered by [industry-renowned market makers](https://orderly.network/blog/ecosystem-spotlight-wintermute-liquidity-provider-orderly-network/), enabling trades with minimal slippage, superior execution speeds, tighter spreads and the best top-of-book liquidity across 50+ trading assets.
- Streamlined Trading Experience: Enjoy a familiar and intuitive orderbook interface that combines the efficiency of CEXs with the user-autonomy of a DEX. Users will easily execute long or short positions while deploying their preferred trading strategies.
- Omnichain DeFi trading: Unlock the power of omnichain trading. BooDex users can trade perps with up to 50x leverage across multiple assets on major EVM and non-EVM chains, including Ethereum Mainnet, Arbitrum, Base, Optimism, Polygon, and Mantle.

### Orderly and BooDEX: A Match Made for DeFi
The partnership is significant and strategic in many ways. First, it unlocks liquidity for BooDEX users, enabling them to trade in a single shared orderbook alongside traders from other chains, creating a less fragmented DeFi landscape where perps trading across chains is seamless for all traders.

Furthermore, this partnership brings Bitcoin users into our robust omnichain infrastructure with the ongoing development of the Bitcoin multichain bridge by Ghosty Lab, boosting network activity, user-base and trading volumes on Orderly. With Ghosty Cash already boasting incredibly low fees on swaps, this integration effectively aims to offer competitive trading fees for traders with reduced slippage, and improved trading experience. Perp positions on BooDex will be settled on-chain alongside trades from other DEXs that Orderly supports, fostering an omnichain trading environment for frictionless onchain perps trading.

>’’ It was a No-Brainer for us to integrate Orderly, we’re all about decentralizing control of our financial instruments from traditional CEXs and control platforms, so when we were approached by such a partner that has a track record of greatness, we could not resist, furthermore this only adds another outstanding product for our users, in which it goes hand in hand with complimenting our Cross chain swap application. **Taxman, CSO, BooDEX**.

Quizzing **Arjun Arora, COO, Orderly Network**, on the significance of the partnership, he said:
>“Integrating BooDEX was an easy decision for us having seen what the Ghosty Labs team has been doing with their flagship product. Building a perp DEX further consolidates its already thriving suite of products, known for its broad reach, multichain capabilities, and commitment to enhancing user experience. With plans to expand the TON network through its multichain bridge development, the Ghosty ecosystem is setting up a robust and integrated ecosystem for DeFi. This BooDEX integration is another embodiment of what we do best at Orderly — providing deep liquidity to the finest projects in DeFi”

#### About BooDex
BooDex is a new perp DEX developed by Ghosty Labs. It offers low trading fees across markets, enabling users to trade securely across 70+ chains. By integrating with Orderly, BooDex will offer seamless perps trading, powered by Orderly’s omnichain infrastructure and deep liquidity.

data.title: What does it take to get a market maker behind your Web3 project?
data.description: Exploring DWF Lab's role in Orderly's Stellar liquidity infrastructure

blocks.body:
>**Exploring DWF Lab's role in Orderly's Stellar liquidity infrastructure**

In DeFi, liquidity is king, and Orderly Network has rapidly ascended to become one of the largest liquidity sources in Web3. 

In just two years, we've become one of the largest liquidity sources in DeFi, providing institutional-grade liquidity across multiple chains. Our omnichain liquidity infrastructure ensures seamless, high-speed trading for perpetual assets, bringing DeFi a step closer to achieving a CEX-like trading experience with self-custody at its core.

One of the key partners driving our growth is DWF Labs, a new generation Web3 market maker whose expertise and resources have been instrumental in building our liquidity infrastructure.

Market makers play a crucial role in the Web3 ecosystem by **providing liquidity** to decentralized markets, supporting efficient asset trading, even in volatile conditions. For example, DWF Labs has positioned itself as a next-generation market maker, with deep expertise in Web3, playing a vital part in supporting Orderly Network's liquidity infrastructure. Their involvement helps promote stable trading environments by making it easier for buyers and sellers to complete transactions without large price fluctuations. This activity contributes to the overall health and accessibility of decentralized markets across multiple blockchain networks.

DWF Labs has carved a niche for itself as a premier market maker, supporting 35% of CoinMarketCap’s Top 1000 projects. Their experience in high-frequency trading and liquidity provision makes them the ideal partner for Orderly Network's infrastructure.

Now, we make it easy for anyone to build a perpDEX without worrying about where the liquidity comes from. We call it “permissionless building”  – the freedom to design a DEX to your liking .  

Ask Veeno, an experienced developer who built a DEX on Orderly, just how he wants it. Once launched, he's got access to more than 50+ markets listed on Orderly, powered by a robust network of market makers.

While our use case for market makers extends beyond traditional models—given our mission to facilitate omnichain trading across various venues and assets—projects looking to launch tokens can also benefit significantly from engaging a market maker. A reliable partner like DWF Labs can offer: 

- **Sufficient Liquidity**: Market makers provide liquidity to ensure that your token can be traded smoothly, even during periods of volatility. This reduces the risk of excessive price slippage, allowing users to buy and sell at prices that reflect actual market demand, fostering confidence and stability in your token.
- **Accurate Price Discovery**: By maintaining a consistent presence in the market, market makers help balance supply and demand, which facilitates the establishment of fair, transparent pricing. This reduces the risk of extreme volatility and ensures that your token's value reflects the broader market dynamics, contributing to a sustainable token economy.
- **CEX Listing & TGE Support**: Successfully navigating Centralized Exchange (CEX) listings and Token Generation Events (TGE) is complex but essential for long-term token success. Market makers like DWF Labs can guide you through these processes and provide needed insights and advisory to help ensure that you can focus on growth while navigating these critical milestones with confidence.

_**So what would a high-quality market maker look out for?**_

Several factors can determine whether your project captures a market maker’s interest. These factors may vary depending on individual MMs strategies, business model, or even risk appetite. While some of these variables may be outside your control, here are the non-negotiables that you can directly influence; 

- **Clear Product-Market Fit (PMF)**: Perhaps a no-brainer, but demonstrating that there’s demand for your project’s solution is crucial. A project should demonstrate that its product solves a genuine problem in the market.
- **A Strong, Experienced Team**: Let’s skip MMs for a sec –the entire Web3 industry is big on credibility. Market makers, like any major partner, want to see a team with the expertise and track record necessary to execute the project’s vision. It is absolutely vital that a strong, knowledgeable team is visible to both your community and any potential partners, including MMs. 
- **Well-Defined Roadmap**: Ideas don’t come out fully formed so while no roadmap is flawless, having a clear, transparent, and achievable plan builds confidence in your project’s long-term potential. A market maker needs to know that your project has a sustainable future. 

From experience having multiple high-quality MMs behind Orderly, we’ve seen firsthand how these are non-negotiable aspects for any market maker looking to invest its resources into a project.

As DWF Labs is one of our top liquidity providers, we had the opportunity to ask them a few key questions to gain insight into their decision-making process when working with Web3 projects:

**There are many Web3 projects springing up today. What main factors do you identify before working with a project?**

_At DWF Labs, we look for a combination of several factors before engaging with any Web3 project. Team quality is one of the most critical aspects—having a strong, experienced, and committed team is a key indicator of long-term success. We also examine project fundamentals, such as the technology, tokenomics, and overall market fit. Projects that address real-world problems and show the potential for mass adoption tend to stand out. Additionally, we consider community engagement and how actively the project interacts with and grows its user base. Finally, we assess the liquidity and market infrastructure, ensuring that it aligns with our capacity to provide support effectively._

**How does DWF Labs distinguish itself from other market makers?**

_DWF Labs stands out through its comprehensive approach that goes beyond traditional market-making. We combine market liquidity provision with strategic advisory services, funding support, and global partnerships to help projects grow sustainably. Unlike many market makers, we don’t just focus on liquidity for token trading; we aim to build long-term value by offering holistic ecosystem support._

- _**Personalised and comprehensive support**: we have a dedicated team providing 24/7 support. Leverage an extensive global network of partners, from legal and audit firms to industry experts._
- _**Amplify your reach**: projects can leverage our network of top-tier KOLs and expert PR providers to amplify your brand's visibility and accelerate growth._
- _**Be part of a collaborative growth hub** - we have a Growing ecosystem with over 700+ partners. Be seamlessly connected with needed expertise to accelerate growth._
- _**CEX Listing & TGE Advisory**: Projects can also access comprehensive listing support, introductions to the world's biggest CEXs and strategic advisory on enhancing your project appeal for pre and post TGE._

_We’re not just a market maker but also a collaborator and partner to our projects. We want to make sure that we are fully aligned and committed to the success of our partners._

**The cost of engaging a market maker isn’t cheap. How does DWF help promising projects access high-quality market-making services?**

_We recognize that many promising projects, especially early-stage ones, may face budget constraints when it comes to engaging market makers. We take a tailored approach, often investing directly in projects through token swaps or equity arrangements. This allows us to offer high-quality market-making services without placing excessive financial burden on the projects. By aligning our incentives with the success of the project, we create mutually beneficial partnerships that allow for scalable, long-term growth._

**Do market makers only trade through order books or do they also provide services to AMM projects?**

_Market makers like DWF Labs are not limited to order book trading on centralized exchanges. We also actively engage with Automated Market Makers (AMM) in decentralized finance (DeFi). In AMM systems, liquidity is provided through liquidity pools rather than traditional order books. We provide liquidity to these pools, facilitating efficient trading, reducing slippage, and helping DeFi ecosystems grow. This dual approach allows us to contribute to both centralized and decentralized markets, supporting a broad spectrum of blockchain projects._

**What made you trust Orderly’s security as it is counterparty risk?**

_Orderly Network has implemented robust security protocols and smart contract audits to ensure the safety of funds and transactions within its platform. At DWF Labs, we also conducted our own due diligence by reviewing Orderly’s technical infrastructure, which included verifying the integrity of their decentralized infrastructure and understanding their counterparty risk management processes. Their transparent approach to security and their focus on protecting user assets were key factors that made us confident in their security measures._

**Would you work with a non-doxxed team?**

_We typically prioritize working with teams that are transparent and publicly accountable, as this provides greater confidence in the project’s long-term viability. However, we understand that in the Web3 space, anonymity can sometimes be necessary for privacy reasons, especially when working with decentralized technologies. While we prefer working with doxxed teams, we are open to working with non-doxxed teams if they can provide other assurances, such as strong security audits, community backing, and proven track records in the industry._

**How can a team get in contact with you?**

_Teams interested in collaborating with DWF Labs can reach out to us directly via our website here. We’re also active across various social media platforms like Twitter and Telegram, where we engage with the Web3 community._

Securing a high-quality market maker can be the difference between success and stagnation for a project. DWF Labs brings unmatched value and expertise, guiding token life cycles by fostering strategic partnerships and supporting the broader ecosystem to ensure market readiness and long-term success.

As we continue to expand Orderly Network’s reach, partnering with such key players ensures we stay at the forefront of DeFi trading, unlocking long-term success for all Web3 projects we support.

data.title: Who is this team that just built something without permission on our permissionless liquidity layer?
data.description: VeenoX is live on Orderly Network!

blocks.body:
Who is this team that just built something on our permissionless liquidity layer without asking for permission?

One of the coolest things about blockchain is that anyone can simply show up and start building. Orderly is an L2 blockchain built using the OP stack, and we offer a set of powerful templates to easily design your own perp DEX.

Orderly is set to be one of the first infrastructure providers on an extremely hyped blockchain called Monad. Monad is a Layer 1 blockchain that boasts 10,000 transactions per second, 1-second block times, single-slot finality, and low hardware requirements.

It only makes sense to leverage the excitement around Monad. That’s where Veeno comes into play.

We noticed someone building in public, tweeting each step of their build process.

The thing is, we didn’t know anything about VEENO. So, we sat them down for a virtual coffee. For Veeno: **Who are you, and where are you building from?** I'm Novee from France, the Founder of VeenoX, a DeFi trading platform we’re currently developing. I have just over 4 years of experience in web3 development, and I’ve been trading for about 3 years. **Why did you decide to build in public?** As a dev and a member of the Monad community, I wanted to showcase what building an app looks like behind the scenes. It was my way of adding value to the growing Monad ecosystem. **Why did you choose to double down on Monad?** A few months ago, I was searching for promising projects, and Monad caught my eye because of the game-changing technology they’re bringing to the EVM world—10K TPS and async execution, which results in a much better user experience. After joining their community, I quickly saw how dedicated people were to the project. I wanted to contribute, and that’s how I decided to build something that could integrate Monad. **How many people are on your team?** The team currently consists of three people. I brought on two others I’ve worked with for several years. One leads the backend, and the other handles social and legal aspects for VeenoX. I couldn’t manage everything alone, so bringing in trustworthy, hardworking people was essential. **How long did it take to build your perp DEX?** It’s been a little over a month so far. The first challenge was designing VeenoX to resemble what you find on widely used centralized exchanges. Then, I had to implement all the trading logic using Orderly’s SDK. I was impressed by how easy it was to set up—the product is clearly designed by developers, for developers. **What was the hardest part of the build?**
If you want a trading platform, you need a clean and accurate chart. TradingView is the leader in charting, and it’s what we wanted for VeenoX. But integrating TradingView and customizing it to our needs was challenging, especially saving traders' indicators on refresh and setting up TP/SL or order lines accurately. **Any pro tips for someone looking to build with Orderly?** The first step is to explore the Orderly documentation and get a deep understanding of its modular architecture. Orderly handles the heavy lifting by providing all the infrastructure, so you don’t need to worry about backend servers or databases. Everything is built to be streamlined and developer-friendly. The hooks, in particular, are incredibly well-designed—they integrate seamlessly and work perfectly, allowing you to focus on building features without worrying about the infrastructure. This makes development much more efficient and scalable. **What’s in store for the future of VeenoX?** In addition to our perp DEX, we’re working hard on a major aspect of VeenoX: the Learn Trading & Earn program, which will bring a huge social element to the platform and revolutionize on-chain trading. We’re also developing a DEX & Bridge aggregator and our own highly flexible DEX, allowing us to deploy on Monad from day 1 and on any newly released EVM blockchain. Additionally, we’re exploring how to integrate a lending/borrowing protocol native to Monad.

data.title: Trade Without Limits: Orderly Unity by Orderly Network Unleashes First-Ever Omnichain  Orderbook on Solana
data.description: Orderly Network is live on Solana! Testnet now, Mainnet soon come!

blocks.title: Arjun Arora, COO, Orderly Network
blocks.body: ....we are bringing a seamless perps trading experience to Solana's vibrant ecosystem of traders, builders, and dApps.

**_Orderly Network expands to the Solana network following the successful deployment of its omnichain vault on the Solana Blockchain, allowing both EVM and non-EVM users trade perps from a shared orderbook_**

Orderly Network is proud to announce the successful deployment of its omnichain vault on the Solana Blockchain, building on its continued success in rapidly becoming one of the largest liquidity sources for Web3 trading.

Recently achieving a milestone of [$83 billion in total trading volume](https://dune.com/orderly_network/orderly-dashboard), Orderly Network offers omnichain trading infrastructure with ready-to-use liquidity for builders. Deployed across major chains, including Arbitrum, Base, Mantle, Ethereum Mainnet, OP, and Polygon, Orderly provides traders and DEXs with access to over 50 markets, ensuring robust liquidity on all major chains through a unified trading infrastructure.

With this successful deployment of its omnichain vault, Solana becomes the latest blockchain in Orderly’s pursuit for a truly omnichain DeFi trading experience, dubbed Orderly Unity. This means Solana-based traders can now deposit their assets on Orderly and trade against counterparts on all other Orderly-supported chains from the same orderbook, without their funds ever needing to leave their parent network.

Orderly thus effectively becomes the first trading venue in DeFi to unite onchain perps trading for both EVM and non-EVM users in the same shared orderbook. This is in-line with the protocol’s Orderly Unity charge, its perpetual mission to unify liquidity across all chains.

Speaking on the choice of Solana as the next destination for Orderly’s omnichain expansion, Arjun Arora, COO, Orderly Network, echoed;

>"Solana is renowned for its high throughput, low latency, and cost-effective transactions, making it an ideal network for the next phase of Orderly’s omnichain expansion. By deploying our omnichain vault on Solana, we are bringing a seamless perps trading experience to Solana's vibrant ecosystem of traders, builders, and dApps. This expansion marks the first in the space to offer perpetuals to both EVM and non-EVM users within one unified orderbook, supporting our Orderly Unity mission of a truly omnichain DeFi ecosystem.”

Orderly Network’s omnichain architecture leverages 3 primary layers in attaining its superior liquidity and agility DEX-building capabilities. 
- The **Asset layer** – responsible for handling all asset vaults deployed across multiple chains
- The **Engine layer** – houses a robust matching engine that powers Orderly’s unified orderbook 
- The **Settlement layer** – an L2 rollup where all trades converge and are settled, serving as a single source of truth for all trades on Orderly Network.

In essence, any time a trader executes a trade on any Orderly-powered protocol, the engine layer routes the trade via the orderbook where it is matched, and then relayed to the settlement layer to ensure transparency – all while users keep custody of their funds.

Ran Yi, Co-Founder, Orderly Network, speaking on the successful deployment, said


>"Our Orderly Unity mission to consolidate DeFi liquidity across multiple networks continues to gain momentum, and integrating with Solana is a significant milestone in this journey. By deploying our omnichain vault on Solana, we are enhancing the trading experience for users with Solana's high-performance capabilities and we are excited to be expanding our onchain perps liquidity infrastructure to the Solana blockchain."

Orderly envisions a DeFi ecosystem where anyone can trade any asset seamlessly on any venue and aims to usher in the future of omnichain perps trading — a perpetual mission dubbed the Orderly Unity. By deploying asset vaults on multiple chains where all trades are executed and settled on the [Orderly Chain](https://explorer.orderly.network/), Orderly creates a DeFi ecosystem with cross-netting capabilities and better capital efficiency — positioning itself as the DeFi equivalent of the Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME).

**About Orderly Network**

Orderly Network is transforming DeFi with its cutting-edge cloud liquidity infrastructure by unifying cross-chain trading through its  Orderly Chain and a single shared orderbook, while enhancing trading efficiency, delivering deeper liquidity, and ensuring tighter spreads. The platform provides seamless access to over 50 markets, empowering developers, traders, and exchanges to engage in limitless trading through a streamlined, cohesive trading ecosystem.

Learn more at [orderly.network](https://orderly.network/)

For PR enquiries related to this release, please contact [pr@orderly.network](mailto:pr@orderly.network)

data.title: Owning Your DEX isn’t Crazy Afterall!
data.description: Should you build your own DEX?

blocks.body:
In a market driven by speed and community influence, there is no better time to consider launching your own DEX than now. This is especially true if you are a top trader offering tailored strategies and crypto alphas to your loyal online community on the streets of crypto twitter.

While trading revenues offers an immediate incentive to launch your DEX, building your own DEX helps you unlock the true value of Web3 –community, decentralization, and autonomy. With DEXs capturing [a growing share of crypto trading volume](https://www.theblock.co/data/decentralized-finance/dex-non-custodial/dex-to-cex-spot-trade-volume), building your permissionless DEX is more than just following a growing trend; it is the future.

Enter Orderly Network, where permissionless building is not a luxury but a standard. You get access to cloud liquidity and an omnichain infrastructure designed for next-gen dApps, giving you the toolkit to build your own DEX without the traditional headaches.

Want proof? Check out how [Veeno leveraged Orderly’s infrastructure](https://orderly.network/blog/orderly-network-veenox-perps-trading/) to bring perps trading to life.

### Why Consider Building a DEX?

For starters, Orderly offers substantial revenue potential: builders have earned over $11 million in trading fees across 62+ markets listed on the platform. This speaks volumes about the income-generating power a DEX can bring, especially if you’re a seasoned trader with influence among fellow traders. Owning a DEX might be the next logical step—and it’s more accessible than you might think, characterized by;

**Simple, Fast Integration Process**

Orderly provides one of the fastest, most cost-efficient paths to building a DEX, allowing you to get up and running in just days. Following a clear integration checklist, you can start by selecting compatible tools from Orderly’s tech stack—options include APIs, Python connectors, TypeScript SDK, React Hooks, and pre-built UI components. Each tool comes with thorough documentation, code examples, and proof-of-concept (PoC) resources, making it easy to begin building without a steep learning curve.

**Cost-Effective Customization**

As someone who understands your community’s trading preferences better than anyone, Orderly lets you craft a user experience that resonates with your audience. Our SDK allows you to integrate tools like TP/SL, real-time data feeds, and volume-based fee settings, providing advanced features without extensive technical demands, giving you complete control over how your DEX looks and operates. 

Upon launch, you instantly gain access to over 62+ listed markets backed by industry renowned market makers powering liquidity on Orderly.

Additionally, the DeFi market eclipsed $100 billion in locked value in Q2 2024 and currently maintains a sideways trend in the face of uncertainty surrounding the upcoming US general elections. However, [historical data](https://www.theblock.co/post/313188/bitcoin-price-trend-elections) suggests the crypto market tends to boom post-elections. Hence, building a DEX positions you right at the forefront of the next wave of DeFi users, alongside; 
- **Control Over Trading Dynamics**: A custom DEX lets you shape trading tools, fees, and liquidity rules to fit your strategies and community needs.
- **Revenue Potential**: Each transaction on your DEX translates into real earnings, particularly as you hold influence over a large community that trusts your judgment.
- **Strategic Flexibility**: You can readily offer unique assets, align with DeFi trends, or integrate new features, particularly without waiting for centralized approval.

### Pros and Cons of Launching Your DEX
Having given a hint into why building your own DEX isn’t such a crazy idea, here are some pros and cons of building your DEX.

**Pros:**
- **Community Loyalty & Growth**: Having a large online community that believes in your alphas could readily translate into huge trading volume on your DEX, helping you overcome one of the foremost challenges faced by new DEXs - user acquisition. All that's left is to build a solution that enhances the user experience, effectively converting followers into power users.
- **Custom Trading Ecosystem**: Use your DEX to showcase strategies and demonstrate mastery. You can include exclusive tokens, integrate AI agents, and offer custom strategies, showcasing how much you understand traders' pain points.
- **Scalable Revenue**: The more your community trades, the more revenue flows directly to your DEX. 

**Cons:**
- **Capital Requirements**: Running a DEX takes serious capital for liquidity, security, and tech. If not managed well, these costs can eat into profits, especially during low market activity.
- **User experience**: DEXs aren’t quite as sleek as CEXs yet. Sure, orderbook DEXs can come close, but getting that buttery-smooth trading experience takes work. A less-than-seamless UX could leave traders longing for the CEX feel they’re used to.
- **Liquidity Challenges**: Low liquidity is a classic DEX struggle. Keeping those orderbooks full and spreads tight isn’t easy. Without deep liquidity, order books thin out, and spreads widen, making trades less efficient.

Fortunately, that’s where we come in. We do the heavy lifting, you build.

### How Orderly Powers Permissionless Building
Orderly makes the complex simple. By providing cloud liquidity, any builder on Orderly gains access to a shared omnichain liquidity —a game-changer in permissionless building. Orderly offers robust infrastructure serving as the building block for next-gen dApps, and offering tools that allow anyone to build and deploy seamlessly.

Our infrastructure caters to native DeFi builders and traders looking to launch complex and modular products on an omnichain infrastructure that offers hyper-liquidity and CEX-like agility. This is made possible through our SDK solution and plug-and-play interface which simplifies integration and reduces building time. 

What's left? Build your DEX in no time and lead your community to partake in the next phase of DeFi evolution. Just look at how [Veenox](https://orderly.network/blog/orderly-network-veenox-perps-trading/) leveraged Orderly’s permissionless infrastructure, delivering perps trading with a team of three. The era of permissionless innovation is here, and Orderly is leading the charge.

Building a DEX doesn’t have to be a moonshot—Orderly Network makes it achievable, scalable, and, most importantly, **permissionless**. Why wait for someone else to define your trading landscape when you could define it yourself?

The future is permissionless, [build with Orderly today](https://orderly.network/docs/introduction/getting-started/what-is-orderly-network)!

data.title: Orderly Network Expands to Avalanche: Enhancing Cross-Chain Liquidity for Traders and Builders
data.description: Orderly Network Live on AVAX!

blocks.body:
Orderly Network has a clear vision: "Trade Anything, Anywhere.”

With each new chain we integrate, this vision becomes more than a tagline—it's a commitment to transforming the trading experience for DeFi traders and builders. Today, that journey takes another leap forward with Orderly Network’s launch on Avalanche. This marks the latest in Orderly’s omnichain expansion, bringing the speed and efficiency of Avalanche into Orderly’s growing cloud liquidity ecosystem.

Orderly Network’s arrival on Avalanche empowers traders with streamlined access to Orderly’s cloud liquidity. From Ethereum to Solana, Polygon to Mantle, and now Avalanche, Orderly Network continues to break down the barriers of DeFi, creating a seamless experience for both EVM and non-EVM traders.

### Why Avalanche?

Avalanche has earned its reputation as one of the fastest and most scalable blockchain platforms, achieving transaction finality in under two seconds and handling over 4,500 transactions per second. Its unique consensus mechanism offers security and energy efficiency, making it a perfect fit for high-frequency trading and DeFi solutions.
 
Avalanche’s architecture aligns perfectly with Orderly’s goals of facilitating omnichain DeFi trading on any venue with unbridled access to deep liquidity.

### A Unified Liquidity Experience
At the core of Orderly Network’s cloud liquidity infrastructure is a unique, shared orderbook that unites liquidity across multiple blockchains. For Avalanche users, this means access to deeper liquidity, tighter spreads, and a shared trading experience across major EVM and non-EVM chains.

Orderly’s infrastructure pulls orders from all supported chains into a single, unified orderbook. This creates a highly liquid environment where orders are matched across networks, enabling traders to execute positions at the most competitive prices available. This unified approach benefits traders by increasing the efficiency of trades while reducing the risk and complexity of moving assets across chains.

### For Traders: Gasless, CEX-like, and Liquid
Avalanche traders can now experience the benefits of Orderly’s shared orderbook and robust liquidity. With the ability to trade across major chains like Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, and Ethereum, Avalanche traders can now enjoy a CEX-like trading experience but with the autonomy of DEXs . For traders, this means fewer instances of slippage, faster trade execution, and a smoother trading experience. 

The Orderly Chain, built on the OP Stack and leveraging Celestia’s data availability, serves as a secure settlement layer across all Orderly-supported networks. This setup is particularly advantageous for traders who prioritize low-latency, high-performance trading—a standard that’s core to Avalanche’s architecture.

### For Builders: The Infrastructure to Innovate
Orderly’s expansion isn’t just for traders; it’s fast morphing into a hub for DeFi innovation, too. Orderly Network's infrastructure is designed with builders in mind, providing the tools needed to develop powerful and modular DEXs with ease. Builders can leverage Orderly’s modular and composable infra to build sophisticated perpDEXs, all while bypassing the complexities of handling cross-chain assets and liquidity hurdles.

Orderly Network eliminates the need for traditional cross-chain bridging, mitigating the risks associated with wrapped assets. Builders can create DEXs that plug directly into Orderly's liquidity and perps infrastructure, enabling faster and more fluid user experiences. The result is a smoother, and permissionless building process for builders on Avalanche.

Orderly Network is bringing its vision of Trade Anything, Anywhere to life by expanding DeFi trading across chains. With liquidity flowing freely, we are creating a dynamic, interoperable network that unlocks new opportunities in DeFi.

Say GM to Orderly Network on Avalanche!

data.title: Orderly Network Adopts Chainlink Price Feeds to Leverage High-Quality Market Data
data.description: We wanted the very best to back ORDER, and Chainlink was the clear choice!

blocks.body:
We’re excited to announce that Orderly Network—a leading perpetual DEX infrastructure with ~$86B of cumulative trading volume—has adopted [Chainlink Price Feeds](https://docs.chain.link/data-feeds/price-feeds) on Arbitrum mainnet for our ORDER token. By adopting the industry-leading decentralized computing platform, Orderly Network now has seamless access to market data needed to support secure markets around our newly launched ORDER token in which Beefy Finance, Jones DAO, and Silo Finance have been the first to integrate. 


>“We’re excited to see Orderly Network adopt Chainlink Price Feeds and look forward to seeing how they leverage it to support an increasingly secure and reliable DeFi ecosystem.”—**Michael Mendes, Strategic Data Lead at Chainlink Labs**

We chose Chainlink as our preferred oracle solution because its infrastructure is seamless to integrate and time-tested in production. As the industry’s most proven and decentralized data solution, Chainlink already helps secure leading [DeFi](https://chain.link/education/defi) protocols responsible for tens of billions of dollars in smart contract value, has a a proven history of reliably delivering data of all types to blockchains, and is widely adopted by applications that require offchain data and computation services.  

Orderly Network combines an orderbook-based trading infrastructure with a robust liquidity layer, enabling perpetual futures trading without a traditional front end. By offering a white-label DEX solution, Orderly saves developers time and resources while providing immediate access to a deep liquidity pool. This unified trading infrastructure allows for seamless trading applications, connecting users across both EVM and non-EVM chains in a single orderbook environment. Designed for various use cases, Orderly empowers brokers, spot and perpetual aggregators, wallets, trading desks, and developers to leverage high-performance trading features and comprehensive liquidity.

In order to expand the utility of the ORDER token, we needed seamless access to offchain data feeds that are supplied directly onchain in a highly reliable manner. Because blockchains are natively incapable of accessing offchain data, we needed a flexible [oracle network](https://chain.link/education/blockchain-oracles) that could reliably and flexibly deliver high-quality data onchain to be consumed by the broader DeFi ecosystem on Arbitrum. 


After reviewing various oracle solutions, we integrated Chainlink Price Feeds because they provide a multitude of critical features such as:
- **High-Quality Data**—Chainlink oracles can manage API keys and account logins, allowing them to aggregate and deliver premium data from a wide range of highly available and financially incentivized APIs to dApps.
- **Reliable Nodes**—Chainlink Price Feeds are secured by a large collection of independent, security-reviewed, and Sybil-resistant oracle nodes run by leading enterprises, data providers, and DevOps teams who have a strong onchain history of performance even during extreme network congestion. 
- **Decentralized Infrastructure**—Chainlink Price Feeds are decentralized at multiple levels, eliminating any central point of failure in the delivery of external data.
- **Transparent Performance**—Chainlink Price Feeds can be monitored by anyone in real-time using existing data analytic tools such as market.link, enabling users to verify the data triggering their contract.


>“Adopting Chainlink Price Feeds was essential for us, as it provides us with the high-quality market data essential for the adoption of the Order token throughout the Arbitrum DeFi landscape. We look forward to continuing to work with Chainlink to further our collaboration across a multitude of verticals..”—**Ran Yi , Co-Founder at Orderly Network**

### About Chainlink
Chainlink is the industry-standard decentralized computing platform powering the verifiable web. Chainlink has enabled over $16 trillion in transaction value by providing financial institutions, startups, and developers worldwide with access to real-world data, offchain computation, and secure cross-chain interoperability across any blockchain. Chainlink powers verifiable applications and high-integrity markets for banking, DeFi, global trade, gaming, and other major sectors. 

Learn more about Chainlink by visiting [chain.link](https://chain.link/?utm_medium=referral&utm_source=press-release) or reading the developer documentation at [docs.chain.link](https://docs.chain.link/?utm_medium=referral&utm_source=press-release).

### About Orderly Network

Orderly Network is a cloud liquidity infrastructure revolutionizing DeFi by consolidating trading across chains through a single shared orderbook, powered by the innovative Orderly Chain. Empowering limitless trading, Orderly creates a cohesive liquidity landscape that improves efficiency, delivers deeper liquidity with tighter spreads, and grants developers, traders, and exchanges access to over 60 markets through a unified trading infrastructure.

data.title: $ORDER, esORDER & VALOR: Stack, Stake, and Burn!"
data.description: esORDER is Live!

blocks.body:
ICYMI, we just [announced a crucial update](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork/status/1855913401429696638) on issuing trading rewards, transitioning from issuing liquid $ORDER tokens to esORDER. This update is a response to community feedback and a strategic way to create a smaller supply and burn mechanism for $ORDER holders, further enhancing ecosystem stability.

To understand what’s happening, let’s break down how $ORDER, esORDER, and VALOR work together to support staking, earning, and Orderly’s broader deflationary economy.

### $ORDER: The Core Ecosystem Token
$ORDER is the primary token of the Orderly ecosystem. You can stake it directly to earn rewards, specifically by accruing VALOR, a rewards metric (not a token) that can be converted to USDC based on protocol treasury reserves.

Btw, 60% of Orderly’s net revenues are deposited into the treasury pool, reserved for VALOR holders.

**How it works**
![Untitled-2024-08-12-1131.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/Untitled_2024_08_12_1131_8c4dc8ba69.png)

When you stake $ORDER, you start earning VALOR, the metric that measures your stake's value over time. The amount of VALOR you accrue is directly proportional to the $ORDER you stake, representing your share of the overall treasury pool at that point in time.

### esORDER: The Reward Token
Think of esORDER as a temporary version of Orderly's main token, $ORDER. It's like getting a voucher that can later be turned into the real thing. esORDER is earned as rewards for trading or being a market maker on Orderly, but it’s not immediately the same as $ORDER.

Initially slated to take effect during epoch 10 of $ORDER staking, esORDER has now been rolled out as trading and MM rewards from epoch 7. The esORDER (escrowed ORDER token) replaces liquid $ORDER as rewards to traders and market makers (liquidity providers). This is to ensure price stability by limiting the emission of inflated $ORDER tokens.

**How it works**
![2 flow.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/2_flow_8b503dc417.png)

When you get esORDER, you have a choice: **either hold onto it until it unlocks** (called Vesting) and becomes $ORDER, or stake it to get all the same benefits as staking $ORDER.
Staking esORDER gets you VALOR (plugging you directly to the treasury pool and further increasing their rewards), just like staking $ORDER. 

Alternatively, you could also vest it over time to eventually redeem into $ORDER.

If you are eager to redeem esORDER for liquid $ORDER ahead of the full vesting period, you can do so after 15 days. However, only 50% of the reward will be redeemed, with the other 50% permanently burned. This burn reduces the total $ORDER supply, benefitting long-term holders.

### VALOR: The Value Metric of Orderly’s Treasury

![valor calc.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/valor_calc_83f7dd9646.png)

VALOR is not a tradable token. It is a value metric that accumulates as you stake $ORDER or esORDER, reflecting your contribution to the staking pool over time. As the protocol grows, so does the USDC treasury that backs VALOR, making it redeemable for USDC at the prevailing treasury valuation.

Whenever you redeem VALOR, the amount of VALOR tokens you redeem is burned, ensuring a deflationary circulating supply, making the remaining VALOR holdings more valuable. VALOR redemption requests are settled in USDC every 14 days. Regardless of when you submit a request, you receive USDC based on the final VALOR price for that period.

When you choose to delay your redemption, you continue to accrue VALOR, increasing your rewards potential and your weighted share of the treasury (depending on the overall stakes in the next reward epoch). See our simplified explanation about the benefit of delayed VALOR redemption at this link.

### esORDER and How It Helps the Ecosystem
The move to esORDER aims to reduce supply by limiting the immediate availability of reward tokens. By allowing rewards to be vested over time, esORDER reduces the risk of large sell-offs, giving long-term stakers greater value and creating a healthy, deflationary effect with burned tokens.

Here is a quick example:

Let’s say Sharon, an Orderly Network trader, has earned 200 esORDER. She has two options:
- **Stake esORDER and earn VALOR** (owning a share of the protocol treasury reward).
- **Vest esORDER** for a minimum of 15 days. After this period, she can claim half as $ORDER, while the other half will be permanently burned. If she vests for the full 90 days, she gets all 200 $ORDER without any burn.
- **By staking her esORDER trading rewards**, Sharon’s accrued VALOR can be redeemed for USDC based on her share of the treasury pool. Better still, she could delay her redemption, accruing more VALOR, and increasing her rewards over time. 
- **Increased VALOR accumulation** enables her to partake in protocol governance, and voting on future network developments.

### How These Tokens Work Together
![full flow.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/full_flow_5d341a8cae.png)

The $ORDER, esORDER, and VALOR trio form a mutually beneficial system:
- $ORDER: Stake it for the long-term, accrue VALOR, and enjoy USDC rewards and governance benefits.
- esORDER: Earn it as trading and MM rewards, stake to maximize benefits, or vest to convert into $ORDER.
- VALOR: Accrue over time, redeem for USDC based on protocol treasury reserves.

Epoch 7 is on! Earn your share of the 1.2m $ORDER reward pool, begin your staking journey here: [https://app.orderly.network/staking](https://app.orderly.network/staking)

Learn more [about esORDER here](https://orderly.network/docs/introduction/tokenomics/esorder)

data.title: Orderly Network & KODA: Unlocking the Future of DeFi in Korea
data.description: Orderly Network & KODA Partner to Boost Web3 Adoption in Korea

blocks.body:
Orderly Network has entered a strategic partnership with KODA, South Korea's leading cryptocurrency custodian. This alliance merges KODA’s stronghold in traditional finance with Orderly Network’s advanced omnichain cloud liquidity infrastructure, setting the stage for improved Web3 adoption in the Korean market.

### Bridging CeFi and DeFi for Korean Investors
Our partnership with KODA is a pivotal step toward making DeFi accessible and familiar to Korean investors. By combining Orderly’s cloud liquidity infrastructure with KODA’s established custody services, we are offering a gateway to DeFi with the trusted security and compliance standards investors rely on.

Orderly’s plug-and-play infrastructure combined with KODA’s secure custody means Korean investors can confidently explore DeFi, backed by a partner that navigates local regulations while upholding the highest asset protection standards.

With KODA’s reputation and Orderly’s infrastructure, we are lowering the entry barriers for Korean investors to experience the world of DeFi, characterized by:
- **Seamless Access to DeFi:** Korean investors gain simplified access to the growing benefits of DeFi within an interface similar to CEXes without compromising on security.
- **Compliance and Transparency:** Aligned with Korea’s regulatory landscape, this partnership provides a safe bridge between TradFi and the innovative world of DeFi.
- **Unified Liquidity and Tighter Spreads:** By consolidating liquidity across multiple chains, Orderly Network ensures a smooth trading experience with enhanced market depth.

Orderly Network’s infrastructure is built for the future of trading. As a cloud liquidity powerhouse, we aggregate orders across chains into a shared orderbook, converging liquidity while tightening spreads. The Orderly Chain, built on the OP Stack, facilitates perps trading on leading EVM and non-EVM chains including the Ethereum Mainnet, Polygon, Optimism, Base, Mantle, Arbitrum, Solana, and more.

KODA, founded by KB Kookmin Bank and Hashed, holds an impressive 80% market share in Korea’s crypto custody space. Led by CEO Jin-Seok Cho, KODA is committed to security, compliance, and a transparent custody model, aligning perfectly with our shared goal of advancing DeFi.

Ran Yi, CEO of Orderly Network, speaking on the strategic importance of this partnership said;,
> “We want to make it easier than ever for investors of all levels and backgrounds to reap the benefits of DeFi. We are excited to join forces with KODA to make this possible in Korea.”

Jin-Seok Cho, CEO of KODA, shared his enthusiasm by echoing Ran’s sentiment; he stated, 
>"Through our collaboration with the global leading firm, Orderly Network, we aim to play a leading role in ensuring that the domestic digital asset management market develops in a safe and transparent manner”

This partnership is just the beginning. With the fusion of our omnichain charge and KODA’s market expertise, we are setting the stage for widespread DeFi adoption in Korea. Together, we are creating a more accessible, secure, and compliant future for DeFi.

data.title: PR Feature: Orderly Network Facilitates Solana Users to Trade Without Limits in Combined EVM Super-Ecosystem
data.description: Live on Mainnet!

blocks.body: _**NEW YORK, Monday 2 December 2024, 13:00 UTC:**_ Orderly Network has launched its perps omnichain orderbook on Solana mainnet. The deployment enables Solana users to experience omnichain DeFi trading for the 1st time, with over 30 DEXs and 73 trading perps.

Orderly’s mainnet Solana launch marks the first time EVM and non-EVM orders have been combined into a single perps orderbook. Positioned in DeFi, Orderly is officially the first to integrate this two-chain super-ecosystem that totals over half a trillion dollars in market capitalization. Each respective chain’s token assets can now be leveraged directly for trading, without requiring bridging, wrapping, or side steps.

Despite robust spot trading volumes on Solana, the perps trading landscape must be served. Perps volume lags proportionally to that recorded on the leading EVM networks, with poor liquidity having been a significant impediment to broader adoption. 

Orderly is a fully chain-agnostic solution that allows users to trade liquid perpetual swap markets in real time. Any time a trade is executed on Solana, Orderly’s engine layer routes the trade via the orderbook, where it is matched and then relayed to the settlement layer. 


>For the first time, via Orderly, Solana users can connect seamlessly to trade memecoin perpetuals directly with EVM-focused participants across more than 30 integrated DEXes. All without the need for unnecessary complications like bridging or wrapping. This is how we unlock deep liquidity across all chains while increasing the bar for user experience and trading efficiency at speed. This is what we mean when we say we want anyone to be able to trade anything, anywhere, **says Ran Yi, Co-Founder of Orderly Network**.

>The mainnet launch of Orderly on Solana is a milestone in delivering a true omnichain experience for perps traders and adds a missing piece of the puzzle in connecting Solana’s onchain landscape with EVM networks via a single unified orderbook. With Orderly now live on Solana, projects, developers, and traders can tap into a DeFi primitive that will power a broad range of dApps fueled by deep liquidity.

Deployed across major EVM chains, including Arbitrum, Base, Mantle, Ethereum Mainnet, Optimism, Polygon, and Solana, Orderly provides traders and DEXs with access to over 70 markets. Its deployment on the Solana mainnet will enable Solana traders to deposit assets and trade against counterparts on all Orderly-supported chains for the first time.

### About Orderly Network

Orderly Network is a permissionless liquidity layer for Web3 trading. Built on omnichain infrastructure, Orderly enables deep liquidity for any asset across multiple blockchains. Focused on a future of DeFi that’s open to all, Orderly empowers developers to fluidly create a comprehensive array of financial products for any level of trader, without the risks of wrapped asset movement through cross-chain bridging.
