data.title: Understanding Crypto Matching Engine: What is it and How does it work?
data.description: Everything you need to know about matching engine in a crypto exchange.

blocks.body:
The role of matching engines in crypto trading is immense, but its significance is not always clear to every trader. A matching engine plays a crucial role in facilitating the seamless execution of buy and sell orders on various trading platforms. This intricate piece of technology serves as the backbone of crypto exchanges, ensuring that transactions occur efficiently and accurately.

In this article series, we explain what crypto matching engines are and unravel the mechanics behind their operation.

## **What is a Matching Engine in Crypto Trading?**
A crypto matching engine is a crucial component of a cryptocurrency exchange platform. Its primary function is to facilitate the matching of buy and sell orders submitted by users on the exchange. When a user places a buy order, indicating the desired price and quantity of a particular cryptocurrency, and another user simultaneously places a sell order at the same or a compatible price, the matching engine brings these orders together, allowing the trade to occur.

The matching engine ensures that trades are executed efficiently and fairly, following the principles of price-time priority. Price-time priority means that orders at the same price level are matched based on the time they were placed, with the oldest orders taking precedence.

The efficiency of a crypto matching engine is crucial for providing a smooth and reliable trading experience on a cryptocurrency exchange. It must be capable of handling a high volume of orders, providing low-latency order matching, and maintaining the integrity of the order book. The order book in itself is a real-time record of all buy and sell orders for a particular crypto asset pairing. It is usually organized by price and time.

## **How Does a Matching Engine Work?**
The inner workings of a crypto matching engine are certainly complex but can be understood by spotlighting all of its major components and functionalities. The core functionalities include Order book management, Matching criteria, Price-time priority, Immediate or Cancel (IOC) and Fill or Kill Orders (FOK), scaling for higher frequency, and risk management. An explanation of each component is presented in the table below;

At Orderly, our infrastructure delivers CEX-like experiences in DeFi for traders and builders — all thanks to our agile matching engine that guarantees low latency for high-frequency trading strategies with all trades submitted on-chain to ensure transparency, while users keep custody of their funds.

## **Why Matching Engines are Important in Crypto Trading**
A matching engine plays a pivotal role in crypto trading by ensuring the efficient and accurate execution of buy and sell orders on an exchange. Its importance lies in its ability to facilitate the matching of these orders in real-time and determine the fair market price at which transactions occur. The matching engine achieves this by managing the order book and employing the principle of price-time priority to swiftly identify suitable matches, fostering a transparent and equitable trading environment.

Furthermore, the matching engine is indispensable for maintaining market liquidity and price stability. As a high-performance component, it can handle a significant volume of trades per second, which is crucial for accommodating the demands of active cryptocurrency markets. The engine’s efficiency in trade execution, coupled with its ability to adapt to changing market conditions, ensures that traders can swiftly enter or exit positions.

In this way, the matching engine not only streamlines the trading process but also contributes to the overall integrity and functionality of cryptocurrency exchanges, fostering a vibrant and responsive marketplace for digital assets.

## **Conclusion**
The functioning of a matching engine is a critical component that underpins the efficiency and reliability of crypto exchanges. Understanding how these engines operate provides traders with insights into the mechanics of order execution, helping them navigate the complexities of the crypto market. As the crypto landscape continues to evolve, the role of matching engines will remain pivotal in ensuring the seamless execution of trades and maintaining the integrity of the trading ecosystem.

In follow-up articles, we will have further deep dives into matching engines, placing a spotlight on Orderly’s matching engine and its pivotal role in our innovative decentralized orderbook infrastructure.

data.title: Hold Your Breath a Second, BooDEX is on Orderly!
data.description: Gm gm, BooDEX is live!

blocks.body:
We are announcing the successful integration of BooDEX, a perpDEX backed by Ghosty Labs and renowned for its low fee and robust trading architecture. BooDEX will now offer onchain perps trading for all its users, powered by Orderly Network.

Furthermore, the team at BooDEX have announced a total giveaway of 500 USD for two winners in the form of 125 USD in native GHSY token and 125 USDT per winner.  To enter this giveaway,  
- Follow [@Ghosty.cash on 𝕏](https://x.com/ghostycash)
- Follow [@OrderlyNetwork on 𝕏](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork) 
- Comment “Go BOO”

### BooDEX: One key unpicking several locks
BooDEX will be the flagship perp DEX of [Ghosty Cash](https://www.ghosty.cash/), a multichain bridge and swap platform that enables seamless transfers across 70+ chains. In other words, BooDEX will readily leverage the multichain capabilities of Ghosty Cash, serving as an integrated hub for both swaps and perps trading.

BooDEX and Ghosty Cash are part of a comprehensive ecosystem being developed by Ghosty Labs, their parent company. The Orderly-BooDEX partnership will unlock new use cases for DeFi users, harnessing Orderly’s omnichain liquidity and Ghosty Cash’s extensive reach.

### Bringing Ghosty Labs to the Fore!
Ghosty Labs is not new in the Web3 and DeFi space. It is actively building an impressive ecosystem currently comprising two key products, with 2 more currently under development.

- Ghosty Cash: A multichain bridge connecting 70+ chains and amassing over $37 million in total spot swaps;
- BooDEX: The multichain perp DEX powered by Orderly’s omnichain infrastructure.

### What Orderly Brings to the Table
Readily, BooDEX is guaranteed deep liquidity by integrating with Orderly Network, the foremost liquidity source in DeFi. It will benefit from a pool that already supports 400k active users and has accumulated $70+ billion in transaction volume. Leveraging Orderly, BooDex unlocks a universe of benefits for its user base, including: 
- Unmatched Top-of-Book Liquidity: BooDex users will gain access to Orderly's shared orderbook with deep liquidity powered by [industry-renowned market makers](https://orderly.network/blog/ecosystem-spotlight-wintermute-liquidity-provider-orderly-network/), enabling trades with minimal slippage, superior execution speeds, tighter spreads and the best top-of-book liquidity across 50+ trading assets.
- Streamlined Trading Experience: Enjoy a familiar and intuitive orderbook interface that combines the efficiency of CEXs with the user-autonomy of a DEX. Users will easily execute long or short positions while deploying their preferred trading strategies.
- Omnichain DeFi trading: Unlock the power of omnichain trading. BooDex users can trade perps with up to 50x leverage across multiple assets on major EVM and non-EVM chains, including Ethereum Mainnet, Arbitrum, Base, Optimism, Polygon, and Mantle.

### Orderly and BooDEX: A Match Made for DeFi
The partnership is significant and strategic in many ways. First, it unlocks liquidity for BooDEX users, enabling them to trade in a single shared orderbook alongside traders from other chains, creating a less fragmented DeFi landscape where perps trading across chains is seamless for all traders.

Furthermore, this partnership brings Bitcoin users into our robust omnichain infrastructure with the ongoing development of the Bitcoin multichain bridge by Ghosty Lab, boosting network activity, user-base and trading volumes on Orderly. With Ghosty Cash already boasting incredibly low fees on swaps, this integration effectively aims to offer competitive trading fees for traders with reduced slippage, and improved trading experience. Perp positions on BooDex will be settled on-chain alongside trades from other DEXs that Orderly supports, fostering an omnichain trading environment for frictionless onchain perps trading.

>’’ It was a No-Brainer for us to integrate Orderly, we’re all about decentralizing control of our financial instruments from traditional CEXs and control platforms, so when we were approached by such a partner that has a track record of greatness, we could not resist, furthermore this only adds another outstanding product for our users, in which it goes hand in hand with complimenting our Cross chain swap application. **Taxman, CSO, BooDEX**.

Quizzing **Arjun Arora, COO, Orderly Network**, on the significance of the partnership, he said:
>“Integrating BooDEX was an easy decision for us having seen what the Ghosty Labs team has been doing with their flagship product. Building a perp DEX further consolidates its already thriving suite of products, known for its broad reach, multichain capabilities, and commitment to enhancing user experience. With plans to expand the TON network through its multichain bridge development, the Ghosty ecosystem is setting up a robust and integrated ecosystem for DeFi. This BooDEX integration is another embodiment of what we do best at Orderly — providing deep liquidity to the finest projects in DeFi”

#### About BooDex
BooDex is a new perp DEX developed by Ghosty Labs. It offers low trading fees across markets, enabling users to trade securely across 70+ chains. By integrating with Orderly, BooDex will offer seamless perps trading, powered by Orderly’s omnichain infrastructure and deep liquidity.
Learn more BooDEX: <[https://app.boodex.com/](https://app.boodex.com/)>

#### About Orderly Network
Orderly Network is a permissionless liquidity layer for Web3 trading. Built on omnichain infrastructure, Orderly enables deep liquidity for any asset across multiple blockchains. Focused on a future of DeFi that’s open to all, Orderly empowers developers to fluidly create a comprehensive array of financial products for any level of trader, without the risks of wrapped asset movement through cross-chain bridging.

Learn more at [orderly.network](orderly.network)

For PR enquiries related to this release, please contact pr@orderly.network

data.title: A New Dawn In The Orderly Community
data.description: Want to earn 10,000 ORDER every quarter?

blocks.body:
_**Want to earn 10,000 ORDER every quarter?**_

The Orderly Community is taking a new shape, and we are thrilled to tell you all about it.

Leading up to TGE, the Orderly Community has been the driving force behind our stellar growth, shilling Orderly to the ends of the web in every region possible. We can be nothing but grateful for the immense support which remains strong to this very day. 

As the community continues to expand post-TGE, we believe now that there is a need to rejig the structure of our community –  a more structured approach to better acknowledge and aptly reward those who are truly dedicated to the Orderly vision. To this end, <u>we are introducing a new structure in Discord which will feature two primary programs</u>. 

Say hello to the **Role-based Recognition program**, and **the Knights of the Order**.

**First, What’s New on Discord?**

Starting 24th September, here are a few things you will begin to see. We are introducing the following on Discord:
- A dedicated **“Hall of Fame”** channel
- Multiple **“Role-specific”** channels
- Bi-weekly **“Spotlight posts”** highlighting a few members and their contributions
- **Spotlight Badges and Icons** reserved for top performing members
- **The Orderly Quest, powered by the Engage Bot** _(more details later in the blog)_

Now, let’s break down everything new and cool in the community program

# Role-based Recognition Program: Contribute more, Earn more
At present, our community currently features a handful of instrumental members  – the Core Contributors' role (super active community members who we had previously identified and elevated to steer the Orderly community on discord). We now want to replace and expand on the vital core-contributors’ role,  opening it up to more active members with 3 primary roles; **Orderly Crafter**, **Orderly Mentor**, and the **Dev-Maxi**.  

Wondering how to **earn these roles**? Fulfill these basic entry requirements;

**Orderly Crafter:** Create high-quality contents such as threads, videos, tutorials, or infographics related to the project. 
- _**Requirement:** At least 3 pieces of original content shared that significantly engages the community._

<u>**Important⚠️:** All content must be forwarded to the **#creatorshub** channel on discord to be considered for evaluation. You will be bestowed the role once your contents have been confirmed.</u>

**Orderly Mentor:**  Offer a helping hand. Consistently help others with questions, guide new members, or help promote our campaigns.
- _**Requirement:** Regularly answering questions, welcoming and onboarding new members, or help promote our campaigns_

**Dev-Maxi:** Answer relevant dev-related questions, contribute to the project’s github, develop tools, scripts or create integrations that enhance our ecosystem

- _**Requirements(any of these)**_: 
    - _Answer API/SDK related questions_
    - _Develop a tool, script, or integration that is adopted by the community or officially supported_
    - _Github Open Source Contribution_
 
 <u>**Important - For Devs Only⚠️:**</u> See the following developer docs for all the fine-details of this role: [Google docs link](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1-DaOemcm1bns5l6HK4-sJRDPlbX0pCGa1LMgsEKe39Y/edit?usp=sharing) || [Github](https://github.com/orgs/OrderlyNetwork/projects/1/views/1).

Upon fulfilling any of these role entry requirements, you will be adorned with the appropriate role in discord.

### Role-based Recognition Rewards
All three roles (Orderly Crafter, Orderly Mentor, and Dev-Maxi) have an allocated reward pool each. <u>Both Orderly Mentor and Dev-maxi roles have a reward pool of 3,500 ORDER tokens respectively</u>. As we anticipate more participation in <u>the Orderly Crafter role, the reward pool is set at 15,000 ORDER tokens</u>.

Members who have earned any of these roles **AND**  then get spotlighted will be entitled to get a share of the reward pools, based on their earned roles. The reward breakdown is as follows;
- **Bi-weekly Spotlight Post:** Get featured in the Community Spotlight post in a dedicated “Hall of Fame” channel alongside your contributions. 
- **Exclusive Access to Role-based Channels:** Get invited to exclusive, role-based channels for deeper collaboration with other role holders and the team.
- **Pinned Recognition:** A pinned message in the General channel with the current spotlight member(s) and their contributions
- **Spotlight Badge:**  A special badge or icon that members can display next to their username while holding a spotlight position.
- **Special Privileges:** Temporary special privileges in the community like hosting community events or participating in private calls with the team.
- **Physical Rewards:** We will occasionally send out physical rewards (i.e. Orderly merch) to spotlight members in the exclusive role-based channels. Orderly reserves the sole prerogative on the timing, schedule, and spotlight window in which any and all physical rewards may be sent out.
- **15,000 $ORDER Reward pool distributed amongst all spotlighted members with the Orderly Crafter role**
- **3,500 $ORDER Reward pool distributed amongst all spotlighted members with the other two roles (Orderly Mentor and Dev-Maxi)**

<u>For clarity, it is important to reiterate that only members who earn the roles **AND** are spotlighted will get a share of the reward pool.</u>

Your share of the reward pool is calculated based on the formula;
- _(Total size of reward pool) * (Your points/ Total points of spotlighted members)_

**So what earns you a place in the spotlight?**
- **Orderly Crafter**: Consistently more contents to climb the **Orderly Crafter Leaderboard**. The leaderboard will be ranked according to accrued points from likes, views, engagements and no. of posts across all contents (threads/gifs/memes/etc.) submitted during each bi-weekly spotlight window. 

- Your submissions are graded as follows;
    - For every **<u>5 likes</u>**, you earn **<u>1 point</u>** (i.e. 50 likes = 10pts on the leaderboard)
    - For <u>every **RT**</u>, you earn **<u>1 point</u>** (i.e. 50 RTs = 50pts on the leaderboard)
    - For every **<u>50 views</u>**, you earn **<u>1 point</u>** (i.e. 500 views = 10pts on the leaderboard) 
    - For **<u>every post/contents shared</u>**, you earn **<u>5 points</u>** (i.e. 50 contents shared = 250pts on the leaderboard)

The more submissions you make, the more points you get, the higher you rank on the leaderboard, and the higher your chances of being spotlighted.

<u>**Note:** Orderly Crafter submissions do not roll over into the next spotlight window</u>

- **Orderly Mentor:** Discord Chat-level will be evaluated for actively answering questions, helping to promote our campaigns and onboarding new members during the spotlight window.  
- **Dev-Maxi:** You will be working closely with our developer-relations team. Refer to the developer docs on how to get spotlighted:  [Google docs link](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1-DaOemcm1bns5l6HK4-sJRDPlbX0pCGa1LMgsEKe39Y/edit?usp=sharing) || [Github](https://github.com/orgs/OrderlyNetwork/projects/1/views/1).

**<u>Important Reminder🔔:</u>**
- <u>You must have first earned any of the roles to be considered for a spotlight</u>. 
- <u>Orderly Crafter submissions do not roll over into the next spotlight window</u>. 
- <u>A spotlight window comes around every two weeks for every role, **except the Dev-maxi**</u>. 
- <u>The **Dev-maxi** role has a spotlight window of one month</u>.

### Existing Core-contributors and Ambassadors: Thank You!
It is important to note that we are not invalidating any of the past contributions of existing Core-contributors and Ambassadors with the creation of these roles. Their efforts leading up to this moment has certainly not gone unnoticed, and we have shown a measure of our appreciation with $ORDER token rewards distributed post-TGE.

<u>While these roles will cease to exist going forward</u>, many existing Core-contributors and Ambassadors already possess traits of these new roles. Infact, their dedication, steadfastness and zeal are somewhat the inspiration behind the formation of the new roles, setting the standards for what is attainable when we explore the community's deep expertise and passion for DeFi. 

Our heartfelt gratitude to all Core-contributors and Ambassadors who played a super vital role in our efforts leading up to TGE.

# The New Apex Role: Knights of the Order

Until now, Orderly Ambassadors stood as the ultimate role a  member of the Orderly community could hold.  Our Ambassadors echoed our voices beyond on **𝕏**,  promoting Orderly and expanding our reach. Achieving great results while it lasted, it is now time to evolve to an even more exclusive role and attain knighthood status with Sir Otterly.

**So who is a Knight of the Order?**

A Knight of the Order is someone who’s been there, done that, and got the (virtual) chainmail to prove it. It’s a recognition for those who consistently go above and beyond in the Role-based Recognition program, honing a leadership aura within the Orderly community.

**Who Can Become a Knight?**

To be considered is to have god-tier street cred within the Orderly community, based on your role-based recognition and spotlight contributions. In essence, the following conditions must be met;

<u>1. Members must **hold specific recognition roles** that demonstrate their contributions in various areas of the community. These roles include:</u>

**Orderly Crafter:** Create high-quality content such as threads, videos, tutorials, or infographics related to the project.
- Requirement: At least 3 pieces of original content shared that significantly engages the community

**Orderly Mentor:**  Offer a helping hand. Consistently help others with questions, guide new members, or help promote our campaigns.

Offer a helping hand. Consistently help others with questions, guide new members, or help promote our campaigns.
- _Requirements: Regularly answering questions, welcoming and onboarding new members, or help promote our campaigns_
    - _Hold the **Orderly Mentor** role._
    - _Actively assist and support other members by answering questions, welcoming and guiding new members, and/or help promote our campaigns._
    - _Demonstrate consistent help over the past three months._

**Dev Maxi (Optional but beneficial):** Contribute to the project’s github, develop tools, or create integrations that enhance the ecosystem
- Requirements: 
    - _Hold the **Dev-Maxi** role_.
    - _Have made meaningful contributions to the project’s github, or created tools/scripts/dashboards or integrations_.

<u>2. Members must demonstrate significant involvement in spotlight activities. This is attainable in two ways;</u>

**Made 3 Spotlights within 3 Months:**
- Have been featured as a spotlight member at least three(3) times within the last three (3)  months. 

OR

- Have actively contributed to creating or managing <u>three (3) spotlight features within three (3) months</u> (e.g., writing spotlight threads, organizing spotlight events, or promoting spotlight members).

<u>3. Additional Criteria</u>
- Consistency and Longevity:
 - Be an active member of the community for at least three (3) months.
 - Maintain all required recognition roles consistently for the last three months.
- Leadership and Initiative:
 - Demonstrate leadership qualities by mentoring new members, leading projects, or initiating new community initiatives.

**Note⚠️:** The Knight of the Order is a super-exclusive role. We will regular purge and promote members in and out of the role based on the above criteria

### Knight of the Order Rewards
- <u>**10,000 $ORDER** tokens distributed every quarter to each Knight.</u>
- <u>Participation/Invitation to significant Orderly events.</u>
- <u>Long-term supporters will receive frequent recognition from the project team.</u>
- <u>Internal and External Job referrals.</u>

### Celebrating and Rewarding Dedication
The Knight of the Order role is an opportunity to honor our most dedicated members, bringing together the best of our community under a unified title. We look forward to seeing who will rise to the occasion and become our first Knights of the Order.

The new structure of the Orderly Community is designed to foster deeper engagement and reward those who truly drive our vision forward. Whether you're creating content, offering support, or leading innovation, there’s a place for everyone to shine. And for those who go above and beyond, knighthood awaits. 

# Introducing the Orderly Quest

From October 1st, we will be integrating the Engage Bot into discord, earmarking the beginning of a general community engagement program dubbed **“The Orderly Quest”**.  

The Orderly Quest is an ever-green engagement challenge where members can earn weekly and monthly rewards by simply engaging with specific post on **𝕏**. All engagement activities are tracked by the Engage Bot and displayed on a leaderboard, with points awarded to users who fulfill the specified criteria.

**Who Can Join the Orderly Quest?**

The Orderly Quest is open to all verified members on our discord channel. We will frequently post specific posts from the Orderly **𝕏** account asking members to like, retweet or comment – each carrying an accompanied points attached.

**Note⚠️:** You must connect your **𝕏** account to the Engage Bot to participate. A guide to help you connect your **𝕏** account will be shared in the [#UpdateChannel](https://discord.com/channels/954041617600348220/1278789408388026481) on discord.

**Engage Bot Points** _(Subject to change)_
- **Likes**: 2 points.
- **Retweets**: 3 points.
- **Comments**: 5 points.
- **Bonus Points**: On occasion, bonus points can be awarded for engaging with specific campaigns or important announcements.

**Pro Tip✨:** You can bet your points to play blackjack in our Discord. Win, and you'll stack more points and climb the leaderboard. But watch out — your points could get rekt!

**Engage Points Leaderboard & Rewards**

Rewards will be issued based on snapshots taken <u>every 10 days at 1PM UTC</u>.

**Snapshot Schedule:**
- **Top 10 snapshot**: We’ll take a snapshot of the top 10 on the 10th and 20th of every month (1 PM UTC).
- **Top 50 snapshot:** <u>Taken on the last day of every month (1PM UTC)</u>, the top 50 will be posted regularly to keep the grind alive and recognize the real MVPs. This will be shared both in Discord and on **𝕏**.

**Rewards**
- **Top 10 Reward pool**: <u>500 $ORDER to be distributed evenly amongst the top 10</u>
- **Top 50 Reward pool**: <u>3000 $ORDER to be distributed amongst the top 50</u>
- **Milestone Rewards**: Additional rewards for reaching specific engagement milestones.

_<u>**Important🚨:** A 500 $ORDER and 3000 $ORDER reward pool is allocated for both Top10 and Top 50 snapshots respectively. However, your share of the pool is determined by the formulas;</u>_

- <u>**Weekly;** (Top 10 reward pool) * (Your points/ Total points of the top 10)</u>
- <u>**Monthly;** (Top 50 reward pool) * (Your points / Total points of the top 50)</u>

### Additional Special Challenges
- **Surprise Boost Days:** Outta nowhere, we'll drop days where engagement (likes, RTs, comments) is worth double or triple points. Stay sharp — you snooze, you lose.
- **Referral Bonuses:** Bring in new members or boost engagement through referrals, and you’ll score bonus points. Easy gains.
- **Content Creation Challenges:** Drop your own content (tweets, vids, etc.) promoting Orderly. If it pops off, you’ll snag extra points or maybe even some special recognition

Welcome to the best community program in Web3!

<u>T&C</u>

_*Orderly Network reserves the right to make changes to any and all rules therein based on performance and relevant feedback._

data.title: Announcing the “Brokers’ Perp Mainnet Warm Up” Campaign
data.description: Announcing the broker perps mainnet warm-up campaign.

blocks.body:
At Orderly, our commitment to revolutionizing the DeFi landscape is unwavering. Non-stop innovation, combined with intentional collaboration and partnerships, sits at the core of our charge toward bridging the gap between DeFi and CeFi.

Anchored in this ambition, we’re excited to introduce the “Brokers’ Perp Mainnet Warm-Up” campaign — a testament to our relentless drive to offer unparalleled trading experiences in DeFi. This month-long extravaganza, scheduled from 11th Sept to 9th Oct 2023, is set to be a superstorm of collaboration, innovation, and reward. Teaming up with titans of both the DeFi and CeFi world — Ref Finance and BTSE — we aim to foster an electrifying buzz that reverberates through the digital asset space.

## **Core Campaign Highlights**
This campaign — a collaborative brainchild of Ref Finance & BTSE (with support from Orderly) — is designed to showcase the uniqueness and strengths our front-end partners bring to our network and vice versa. With a total prize pool worth $5,000, alongside numerous other rewards, this campaign feeds into our drive to foster deeper synergies with top-tier projects within the DeFi sector.

ReF Finance will kick off the show in the first two weeks before being joined by BTSE towards the latter two weeks of the event

## **What do you need to know?**

Network: NEAR

Duration: 11th Sept. — 9th Oct. 2023 (4-weeks)

**Our Stellar Partners:**

**Ref Finance** — Dive into the magic with Ref Finance in the initial two weeks (11th Sept. — 25th Sept.)
**BTSE **— Experience the prowess of BTSE as the event strides into the concluding fortnight (25th Sept. — 9th Oct.)

**Ref Finance** is the first AMM and DEX built on top of the cutting-edge protocol NEAR, which provides liquidity and swapping features. In mid-August, Ref Finance announced its latest Perp feature integration with Orderly Network).

BTSE is a leading digital asset exchange that offers a simple and secure way to trade cryptocurrencies. As the go-to exchange for all things crypto, BTSE is one of the top trusted crypto platforms for institutions, retail users, and first-time traders. BTSE is on the verge of unveiling its expansion into the DeFi ecosystem with the launch of its decentralized trading platform, BTSE DEX, powered by Orderly.

Ref Finance and BTSE are calling on all traders, communities, & retails to join this campaign that has been meticulously crafted with you all in mind. Our partners invite you to experience Orderly Perps via the Ref Finance and BTSE mainnets and provide any relevant feedback.

Additionally, our hallmark event for the year — the upcoming Orderly Trading Carnival which is laced with numerous rewards — follows a similar template to this campaign. Hence, traders, communities, and retails who join this campaign will already stand at a knowledge-based advantage when we launch the Orderly Trading Carnival.

## **Rewards That Sparkle**
- A grand prize pool of $5,000; $1,000 from Ref Finance and BTSE each, and $3,000 from Orderly Network
- Unique NFTs to embellish your digital treasure trove

## **Marching to Participation**
The campaign requirements are as follows:

1. Begin your journey in the Orderly Galxe space and QuestN community. Complete the pre-defined quests to claim your NFTs and other astounding rewards.

2. Next, stay connected:

- Follow all participating event partners on X — ReF Finance || BTSE || Orderly Network

- Join all participating event partners’ Discord Channels: ReF Finance || BTSE || Orderly Network Discord.

3. Now delve into the campaign, trade via either of the platforms and provide your feedback via their respective feedback links.
Click here for feedback link: Ref Finance || BTSE

**Feedback Links: Ref Finance || BTSE**

**Selecting Star Winners**
Winners of this campaign will be selected by the joint teams of Ref Finance and BTSE. Stay glued to all their social channels and look out for upcoming winners announcements.

## **Trading with Orderly Perps**
Orderly Network provides USDC-based Perpetual Futures contracts, quoted and settled in USDC. We currently support a cross-margin mode, meaning the USDC collateral you deposit is used across all open positions to calculate the margin ratio.

For a start, we have rolled out leverages of 1x, 2x, 3x, 4x, 5x, and 10x. At present, we offer a streamlined approach by allowing one-sided positions. This means you can either hold a long or short position for each perpetual futures contract. Future updates will see more trading positions made available.

Orderly Network’s Perpetual Contracts elevates perp trading by blending high-frequency, accurate pricing from off-chain oracles with complete on-chain transparency. The uniqueness of Orderly’s Perps is evident in features like decentralized liquidations and enhanced scalability, thus empowering platforms with high-demand, leverage-based trading tools, catering to the dynamic nature of crypto traders.

## **An “extra- Orderly” Trading Experience**
Orderly continues its ascension in the DeFi space, amalgamating decentralized order books, swaps, and perpetual futures trading under one ecosystem. With our roots in NEAR Blockchain and eyes set on omnichain expansion, we invite you to be part of this exhilarating journey.

This campaign marks a first step towards our goal to introduce traders, retails, and communities to the “extra-Orderly” trading experience with the upcoming Orderly Trading Carnival laced with numerous exciting rewards.

Stay tuned and come experience the next Frontier of DeFi…

data.title: Announcing the Orderly Network Token: $ORDER
data.description: Orderly Network is preparing for TGE. You should too!

blocks.body:
Orderly Network is thrilled to share more details of our upcoming airdrop, <u>[which as previously announced](https://orderly.network/blog/orderly-network-increases-airdrop-allocation/)</u>, will occur in August. More details on our token  – including the exact launch date, emissions, process for claiming and more – will be shared soon.

### Token Distribution
One billion $ORDER will be created at genesis. Fifty five percent will be reserved for ecosystem development (including the airdrop), 20% for the Orderly team & advisors, 15% to strategic investors, and 10% retained in the Orderly Foundation treasury to foster exchange liquidity and related endeavors. Out of total supply, 13.3 percent is allocated for the airdrop.

![tk.jpg](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/tk_41cd59eed7.jpg)

Not only are we committed to growing the network for the long haul, truth be told – (alpha alert!) trading perpetuals is only the first step in a far larger plan for what Orderly can do. 
 

>_Note: The entirety of the airdrop will be unlocked immediately at TGE._

Any unclaimed token allocation after 60 days will be returned to the Orderly treasury.

### Staking
Once the Orderly Network token is launched, tokenholders will be able to stake the Orderly token, and in return, will cumulatively receive <u>60% of our net trading fees in return</u>. To date, Orderly has generated more than <u>[$8 million in net fees](https://dune.com/orderly_network/orderly-dashboard)</u> (even after accounting for our frontend builders’ share) – after TGE, 60 percent of those new net fees will continually accrue to Orderly stakers. Staking rewards will be paid out in USDC when redeemed.


>_Note: Orderly team and investor tokens do not earn staking rewards during vesting._

Staking the Orderly token will also provide extra rewards for any traders utilizing an Orderly Network-integrated DEX, as well as being a key factor in the calculation of both trading and market making rewards moving forward. There is also the possibility to increase the percentage of net trading fees cumulatively accrued to stakers in the future. Additional information on new trading & market-making rewards will be published soon after the token launch.

Staking will go live soon after TGE; more details on the exact date and time will be shared in the near future.

### Governance
Similar to many other decentralized projects, Orderly Network plans to split into a developer entity, and a foundation overseeing the protocol. We’re committed to fostering the Orderly ecosystem in an impartial manner that grows the pie for all. 

$ORDER will play a key role in these plans, the details of which we will outline in the near future, but in general, $ORDER’s utility will be deeply integrated into the platform to create a flywheel effect, driving platform adoption and aligning the interests of stakeholders through:
- **Governance Rights**: $ORDER staking will empower token holders to partake in decentralized governance regarding key aspects of Orderly Network as the governance process is formalized. 
- **Earning Valor**: Valor is our method of determining each individual user's taking position in terms of amount and duration, entitling users to a corresponding share of the protocol treasury. More details on Valor will be forthcoming.
- **Boosting Trading & Market-Making Rewards**: As mentioned above, by staking $ORDER, traders receive a higher share of the trading rewards; staking $ORDER also enables market makers to receive a higher share of the market making rewards.
- **Other Utilities**: Additional $ORDER token utilities will be introduced in Orderly Network's upcoming products, as well as integrated third-party DeFi protocols.

### Our heartfelt thanks
We want to again thank our community for embracing this project – from our earliest traders, to newer joiners who have made the Road to The Order campaign such a success, as well as our ever-expanding list of builders, market makers and more. Only two short years since its launch, Orderly Network  is now one of the largest crypto-asset perpetual futures trading networks in the world, and there is so much more to come.

Reminder: There is still time to increase your portion of the upcoming Orderly airdrop! Our EVM-based “Road to The Order'' campaign is still continuing in the runup to the token launch, and by trading on any Orderly-integrated broker, your upcoming token allocation will increase. Please <u>[see here](https://app.orderly.network/)</u> for more details.

Join the discussion on our social channels to stay up-to-date with all things Orderly!

data.title: Liquidation Engine for Derivatives Trading: A Guide for Beginners
data.description: Everything you should know about liquidation engine for derivatives trading.

blocks.body:
Cryptocurrency derivatives trading has gained immense popularity in recent years, offering traders the opportunity to profit from the price movements of digital assets without owning them. However, the volatile nature of the crypto market poses risks, and understanding the concept of a liquidation engine is crucial for managing these risks effectively. This guide aims to provide beginners with insights into the liquidation engine in crypto derivatives trading, stating how it works and its core functions.

## **Understanding Crypto Derivatives**
Crypto derivatives refer to financial contracts whose value is derived from an underlying cryptocurrency asset or a group of assets. These contracts enable investors to speculate on the price movements of cryptocurrencies without actually owning the underlying assets. Derivatives are popular in traditional financial markets, and the concept has been extended to the cryptocurrency space.

Traders can engage in several types of crypto derivatives, with the most common ones being futures contracts, options contracts, swaps, and perpetual contracts. See breakdown below;

**Futures**: Traders enter into agreements to buy or sell a specified amount of a crypto asset at a predetermined price in the future.

**Options**: The holder has the right to buy an asset at a set price within a determined timeframe. There is no obligation to buy.

**Swaps**: It involves the exchange of cash flow between two parties.

**Perpetuals**: These contracts are similar to futures contracts but have no timeframe on buy and sell.

Overall, crypto derivatives can be used for hedging, speculation, and portfolio management. However, they also come with risks, as they involve leverage. Leverage can often amplify gains and losses. Due to the relatively young and volatile nature of the cryptocurrency market, trading crypto derivatives requires a good understanding of market dynamics and risk management strategies.

## **What is a Liquidation Engine?**
A liquidation engine is a risk management mechanism that cryptocurrency exchanges employ to prevent significant losses due to highly leveraged positions. In derivatives trading, users can amplify their exposure through leverage, but this also increases the risk of liquidation.

Hence, liquidation occurs when a trader’s margin balance falls below a certain threshold, thus triggering the automatic closure of their position by the exchange. The liquidation engine aims to protect both the trader and the exchange from potential losses caused by market fluctuations.

##**Key Components of a Liquidation Engine**
All crypto trading liquidation engines are comprised of four key components. They are; margin level, margin call, automatic liquidation, and bankruptcy price. See the meaning of each component in the table below;

## **Importance of Liquidation Engine in Crypto Trading**
A liquidation engine plays a crucial role in crypto derivatives trading by helping to manage and mitigate the risks associated with highly leveraged positions. As often common in crypto derivatives trading, users trade with leverage, which means they can control larger positions with a smaller amount of capital. While this can amplify potential profits, it also increases the risk of significant losses. The liquidation engine therefore prevents users from losing more money than they have in their trading accounts.

Additionally, the liquidation engine is crucial for maintaining the overall stability and integrity of the crypto derivatives market. Without effective risk management mechanisms, the market could experience cascading liquidations, leading to increased volatility and potentially triggering a chain reaction of further liquidations. Hence, the liquidation engine acts as a stabilizing force, preventing a domino effect of liquidations that could negatively impact both individual traders and the broader market. Overall, the presence of a reliable liquidation engine is essential for promoting responsible and sustainable trading practices in the crypto derivatives space.

### **Conclusion**
Crypto derivatives trading is inherently risky for beginners. A liquidation engine therefore acts as a safety net, protecting traders from excessive losses and maintaining the stability of the trading platform. For beginners, understanding how this risk management tool operates is essential for developing a sound trading strategy and minimizing potential financial risks associated with derivatives trading. Always remember that while derivatives offer profit opportunities, they also require a disciplined and informed approach to risk management.

In follow-up articles, we will have further deep dives into liquidation engine, placing a spotlight on Orderly’s decentralized liquidations model and how it benefits traders and users.

data.title: Announcing the Orderly Discord Gaming Contest

blocks.body:
At Orderly, we understand the unique power of our community and its indispensable role in our journey toward revolutionizing the DeFi landscape. Hence, we continually seek to engage our community in exciting and rewarding ways.

In this light, we’re excited to announce the Orderly Discord Gaming Contest — a monthly gaming event carefully curated to engage and reward our ever-growing and dynamic community. With a total of 100 USDT up for grabs, this competition promises to be thrilling and worthwhile.

## **Key Details & How to Participate**
The Orderly Discord Gaming content is a community-centric event designed for weekly engagement within the Discord channel. The event features a number of exciting games certain to galvanize and reward members of the Orderly community.

**Duration**:
Every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday at 1 PM (UTC) throughout the month.

Event kick-off: Today — Friday, 4th Aug. 2023

**Games**:
Gartic, Royal Rumble, and Quiz (each game description will be posted within the community at the start of each game session)

## How to Participate & Entry-level Tasks
Aspiring participants must complete the entry-level task enumerated below to be eligible to receive rewards. Once the 3-step task is completed, move along to join the contest on the Orderly Network’s official Discord gameroom channel.

**Entry-level task:**

- Follow Orderly Network on Twitter
- Follow Medium page
- Send a screenshot to the #feedback channel on Discord

## **Winner Selection & Rewards**
Points will be allocated for every game played on each day. At the end of the month, the top 5 participants with the highest points will be rewarded as follows:

**Top 5 Players:**

Winner: 30** USDT**
1st runner-up: 25 **USDT**
2nd runner-up: 20 **USDT**
3rd runner-up: 15 **USDT**
4th runner-up: 10 **USDT**

**Note**: The Orderly Network team will evaluate all entries and announce the winners after the contest.

** About Orderly Network**
Orderly is an all-encompassing DeFi ecosystem, serving a variety of DEXes, a CEX, and custodians (like Fireblocks) with decentralized order books, swaps, and perpetual futures trading. Our integration with major wallets ensures seamless and accessible trading experiences across the digital asset space.

Our first home was NEAR Blockchain, a platform that shares our mission of mass onboarding for both end-users and developers, offering impressive speed and scalability. However, the horizons of our omni-chain expansion are already in sight, marking the commencement of an exciting journey. You might wonder, where is this expansion taking place? The answer awaits, and we encourage you to become an active member of the Orderly community as we embark on this remarkable trajectory.

blocks.body:

## **Rewards:**
10 x winners will each receive USD 50 in REF

## **Terms and Conditions:**

- The campaign starts on 30 March 2023, 13:00 UTC. The campaign ends on 7 April 2023, 00:00 UTC.

- Winners will be announced on Orderly Network’s official Twitter account 7 days after the campaign.

- To be qualified for the reward, winners must complete the tasks listed.

data.title: What Can I Expect When Using a Market Maker for My DApp
data.description: What to expect when using an AMM for your dapp. Read now!

blocks.body:
Decentralized Applications (DApps) have revolutionized various industries by providing decentralized solutions to traditional problems. However, when it comes to decentralized finance (DeFi) and trading within DApps, liquidity is crucial for their success. Market makers play a significant role in providing liquidity to DApps, enabling smooth and efficient trading. In this article, we will explore what a market maker is, its role in the DApp ecosystem, and what users can expect when utilizing their services.

## **Understanding Market Makers**
A market maker is an entity, individual, or algorithm that continuously provides buy and sell orders for an asset in a financial market. The primary objective of market makers is to ensure there is sufficient liquidity in the market by always being ready to buy or sell an asset at a publicly quoted price. They profit from the difference between the buying and selling prices, known as the “spread.”

## **Market Makers in the DApp Ecosystem**
In decentralized applications, market makers serve a critical function by providing liquidity to various decentralized exchanges and platforms. DApps often rely on decentralized exchanges (DEXs), where trades are executed directly between users’ wallets, without the need for an intermediary.

However, DEXs can suffer from liquidity issues, leading to high slippage and suboptimal trading experiences. Utilizing market makers like the one offered by Orderly Network helps to address these concerns by ensuring a consistent supply of assets at competitive prices, improving the overall trading experience within the DApp ecosystem.

Furthermore, Orderly network ensures that decentralized exchanges and other DeFi products that are launched on its infrastructure do not have liquidity issues. Orderly Network is built on the successes of Woo Network, leveraging its technical expertise to offer deep liquidity to projects. Hence, we are actively progressing towards becoming an omnichain infrastructure and liquidity layer for DeFi, with the vision of unifying liquidity across all blockchains in a single orderbook; thus eliminating wide spreads and enhancing favorable trading experiences.

## **What to Expect When Using a Market Maker for Your DApp**
### **Improved Liquidity**
One of the primary advantages of integrating a market maker into your DApp is improved liquidity. Market makers actively provide buy and sell orders, reducing the risk of large price swings and enabling users to execute trades more efficiently. With improved liquidity, users can trade larger volumes without significantly impacting the asset’s price.

### **Competitive Spreads**
Market makers profit from the difference between the bid and ask prices, known as the spread. Users can expect competitive spreads when using a market maker in your DApp, as market makers aim to keep them narrow to attract traders. Narrow spreads mean lower transaction costs, enhancing the overall trading experience for users.

### **Order Book Depth**
A well-established market maker typically maintains a deep order book with a significant number of buy and sell orders. This ensures that there are ample trading opportunities, allowing users to execute trades quickly and at their desired price levels.

### **Price Stability**
Market makers play a crucial role in maintaining price stability within a DApp. By providing consistent liquidity, they help prevent sharp price fluctuations and reduce market volatility. This stability is particularly important in DeFi, where smart contracts and lending platforms rely on stable asset prices for accurate calculations.

### **Trading Strategies and Algorithms**
Sophisticated market makers often employ advanced trading strategies and algorithms to optimize their performance and maintain liquidity. Some market makers utilize machine learning and AI algorithms to adapt to changing market conditions, ensuring that they can provide competitive prices and liquidity across various market scenarios.

### **Continuous Support**
Market makers are present 24/7, ensuring continuous support for users trading within your DApp. This non-stop operation is vital in the global cryptocurrency market, where trading occurs across different time zones.

## **The Orderly Network Advantage for DeFi Builders**
Orderly Network provides all of the features listed above to DeFi projects. It offers deep liquidity that eliminates wide spreads through its various features (such as liquidity pools and community pools). All of these guarantee relatively stable pricing for traders and other DeFi users. Orderly Network also relies on sophisticated algorithms to adjust liquidity based on market realities while offering constant support for traders and DeFi project developers.

### **Conclusion**
Integrating a market maker into your DApp can significantly enhance the overall trading experience for users. By providing liquidity, narrow spreads, and price stability, market makers play a pivotal role in the success of decentralized exchanges and platforms. Users can expect improved liquidity, competitive spreads, and access to robust order books, making trading within the DApp ecosystem more efficient and user-friendly. As the DeFi space continues to evolve, market makers will remain crucial in ensuring the smooth functioning of decentralized markets.
