data.title: Orderly Network Welcomes Zotto, AI-Powered Automated Trading Platform For Onchain Perpetual Trading
data.description: Perps Trading Simplified with Smart AI Agents on Zotto, powered by Orderly

blocks.body: Orderly Network is thrilled to announce its partnership with [Zotto](https://zotto.ai/), an AI-powered smart agent hub for enhanced and smarter DeFi trading. This integration aims to redefine DeFi trading using AI-driven smart agents for automated on-chain strategies.

Zotto will run autonomous smart agents on Orderly, gaining access to Orderly’s liquidity infrastructure to offer a seamless perps trading experience. This integration aims to simplify perps trading with automated trading strategies, allowing traders to deploy bots for efficient trading through prompt-based key charting indicators. Trades on Zotto will be settled alongside trades from other Orderly-supported protocols, providing a truly omnichain experience for cross-chain deposits, withdrawals, token sniping, and advanced trading.
![zotto1.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/zotto1_a8b1bf7dd8.png)
Zotto users will be tapping into a vast omnichain liquidity ecosystem supporting over 20 DeFi protocols, 400k active traders, and a combined transaction volume exceeding $70 billion—all underpinned by the Orderly Chain. >“We’re thrilled to integrate Zotto’s Automated Perp Trading strategies with Orderly’s robust liquidity infrastructure,” said **@mempools, Co-Founder of Zotto**. “This partnership not only enhances our trading capabilities but also reinforces our commitment to delivering a seamless, omnichain experience. By leveraging Orderly’s extensive DeFi ecosystem, we’re enabling our users to set their trading strategies and let our intent-based bots handle the rest. ” The partnership also benefits Orderly in several ways. Orderly’s stance as the go-to solution for omnichain DeFi trading and liquidity bootstrapping is further consolidated with the deployment of Zotto’s smart agent on the Orderly omnichain orderbook infrastructure. Additionally, Orderly will benefit from ecosystem growth, expanding the number of builders on the network, leading to higher trading volume and increased user activity. Essentially, the Zotto and Orderly Network is integration is characterized by; - **Automated Trading with CEX-level Execution Speeds** – Automate your perpDEX trading with predefined conditions and AI agents, powered by Zotto. Combine that with a powerful matching engine built for low-latency, high-frequency trading powered by Orderly Network. - **AI-powered Omnichain Trading Experience** - Take positions across major EVM chains, including Ethereum Mainnet, Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, and Mantle, with cross-chain deposit and withdrawals capabilities. - **Superior Liquidity for Perps Trading** – with up to 50x leverage across 50+ markets. >“Integrating Zotto is a reflection of our vision for DeFi trading which is to offer a robust infrastructure, adaptable to emerging technological trends. AI-enabled DEXs are fast on the rise and Zotto is positioned to do exploits, equipped with beginner-friendly tools and suitable for pro-traders," **said Arjun Arora, COO of Orderly Network**. We are proud to have completed this integration, fully embracing AI trading technology and hopefully laying the groundwork for an agile and smarter DeFi landscape." The integration of Zotto AI into Orderly Network consolidates Orderly’s position as the leading trading infrastructure in DeFi, contributing to our immense ecosystem growth. This partnership increases the active protocols powered by Orderly, boosts trading volumes, and drives higher user engagement. AI is the new primitive in DeFi with the potential to reimagine and reinvent trading. With Zotto in our ecosystem, Orderly will continue to lead the charge in revolutionizing DeFi trading **About Zotto** _Zotto is an advanced AI-powered trading platform that automates on-chain trading strategies for memecoin, perpDex and DeFi markets. The platform offers prompt-based charting indicators for precise trading. Zotto enables traders to effortlessly execute pro-level trades with beginner-friendly tools for maximum gains._ _Learn more about Zotto AI: [Zotto](https://app.zotto.ai/)_ **About Orderly Network** _Orderly Network is a permissionless liquidity layer for Web3 trading. Built on omnichain infrastructure, Orderly enables deep liquidity for any asset across multiple blockchains. Focused on a future of DeFi that’s open to all, Orderly empowers developers to fluidly create a comprehensive array of financial products for any level of trader, without the risks of wrapped asset movement through cross-chain bridging._ _Learn more at [orderly.network](https://orderly.network/)_ _For PR enquiries related to this release, please contact [pr@orderly.network](mailto:pr@orderly.network)_

data.title: Unibot X Launches Perpetual Contracts Powered by Orderly Network
data.description: Unibot X Launches Perpetual Contracts Powered by Orderly Network

blocks.body:
Unibot, the renowned Telegram bot and trading terminal, is proud to announce the launch of perpetual contracts (perps) powered by Orderly Network, directly from their Unibot X trading terminal.

Unibot has always been dedicated to making trading more accessible and straightforward for users. With a significant milestone of over $1 billion in trading volume and a daily active trader base of 10,000, Unibot continues to enhance its platform to meet the needs of its growing community.

Unibot X users can now enjoy;
- **Omnichain Perp Trading Experience**: Users can now easily trade perps across multiple chains with up to 50x leverage, no bridges or wrapped assets. This means users can now buy, sell, swap, and snip assets across multiple chains from within Telegram.
- **CEX-level Execution Speed**: Orderly’s omnichain infrastructure is built for low-latency, high-frequency trading (HFT), suitable for advanced strategies, matching the execution speed of centralized exchanges.
- **Enhanced User Experience**: Unibot X will now offer an enhanced user experience, powered by Orderly’s orderbook suitable for retail and pro traders.
- **Unparalleled Liquidity**: Orderly Network’s shared liquidity model will offer deeper liquidity to traders, delivering necessary depth for high-volume cross-chain perps trading powered by Orderly Network.

>We are excited to announce our partnership with Orderly, which enables us to offer highly responsive, instantaneous futures trading with CEX-level performance. Users can open, adjust, or close positions instantly, making smart, timely trading decisions in any situation." - **Gru, CTO, Unibot X**

The introduction of Orderly-powered perps marks a significant advancement for Unibot X. This powerful trading terminal now allows users to view charts and trade with leverage instantly, providing a seamless and efficient trading experience.

>This partnership is significant and strategic as it aims to create a seamless experience and lead a new wave of web3 adoption among native and non-native web3 users, **said Arjun Arora, COO of Orderly Network**. By bringing omnichain perp trading and deeper liquidity to Telegram trading through Unibot, crypto trading becomes easy, simplified, and attractive to all traders.

Orderly Network is thrilled to bring our perp offering to Unibot’s loyal community. This integration is expected to drive even more trading volume to the Orderly Chain and attract an additional 10,000 daily active users, further solidifying our position in the market.

Trade now: <u>[https://perps.unibot.app](https://perps.unibot.app)</u>

_For more information, please contact:_

_<u>pr@orderly.network</u>_

**About Unibot**

Unibot is a leading Telegram bot and trading terminal designed to simplify and enhance the trading experience. With a focus on accessibility and ease of use, Unibot has achieved significant milestones and continues to innovate in the trading space.

**About Orderly Network**

Orderly Network is a cutting-edge trading platform offering a range of financial instruments, including perpetual contracts. Our mission is to provide a robust and seamless trading experience for our users, leveraging advanced technology and strategic partnerships.

data.title: Orderly Network Announces Monad Integration, Creating Superscalable EVM-compatible Infrastructure For Omnichain Perpetual Contracts
data.description: Orderly Network Brings Omnichain Perps Trading to Monad Chain

blocks.body:
#### _Monad is gearing up for its mainnet launch following successful multi-million dollar funding round. Orderly Network to include Monad in its omnichain expansion plans._
Orderly Network is pleased to announce a new integration with [Monad](https://www.monad.xyz/), the super-performant Ethereum-compatible L1 blockchain leveraging superscalar pipelining technique to revolutionize blockchain interoperability and network performance. This integration aims to supercharge onchain perps trading infrastructure for builders and users on the Monad blockchain. Monad offers full EVM and RPC compatibility, enabling seamless porting of Ethereum applications and infrastructure use, capable of 10,000 transactions per second, 1 billion transactions per day, with 1-second block times and finality, resulting in cheaper transaction costs and enhanced user interaction. Monad aims to redefine the Ethereum ecosystem by building a new kind of EVM. Leveraging a parallelization implementation in its architecture, it aims to superscale the EVM to deliver more efficient processing and instant block finality. By implementing optimistic parallel execution for efficiency, and developing the MonadDB state database for fast data access, the Monad blockchain is gearing up to be one of the fastest L1 in DeFi come its mainnet launch. Monad’s announced the completion of its latest [funding round led by Paradigm](https://www.theblock.co/post/287257/monad-labs-raises-225-million-in-funding-round-led-by-paradigm) raising $225 million alongside other notable VCs including Coinbase Ventures, Electric Capital, GSR Ventures and more. Aimed at boosting resources and scaling its team to further the next development phase of the Monad blockchain, this integration with Orderly Network sets up Monad to effectively welcome Orderly’s omnichain expansion in the very near future. >“I'm excited that Orderly Network will be coming to Monad at launch," **said Keone Hon, Cofounder/CEO of Monad Labs**. "Perpetuals comprise the majority of volumes on centralized crypto exchanges, and Orderly is an important part of the push to move that volume to DEXes. Exciting times ahead!.” Orderly Network tackles DeFi's significant liquidity issues by merging orders into a single orderbook spanning multiple chains. Acting as a permission liquidity layer for Web3 trading, it utilizes Orderly Chain to deliver deep liquidity for multiple assets across various chains, thus powering the rise of omnichain orderbook-based DEXs. Presently, Orderly Network supports six chains: Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Ethereum mainnet, and Mantle. Hence, this collaboration will see Orderly Network expand its liquidity layer to the Monad blockchain. Effectively, the Monad x Orderly integration is expected to deliver; - Super-fast Perps Trading Infrastructure for Low-latency, High-Frequency Trading. - Efficient Onchain Settlement Capabilities - Developer Support for Easy Integration - Deep liquidity for multiple assets across major EVM chains with cross-chain deposit/withdrawal capabilities Orderly will be one of the first infrastructures to integrate with Monad. This integration opens Orderly’s shared orderbook to the entire Monad ecosystem across all major EVM chains, enhancing liquidity for perpetual DEXs and providing tighter spreads and minimal slippage for traders. >“With shared expertise in building low-latency, high-frequency trading systems across both teams, this synergy between Monad and Orderly births one of the most formidable infrastructural collaborations in DeFi.” **said Arjun Arora, COO, Orderly Network**. ”A fusion of Monad’s innovative approach to scaling the EVM and Orderly’s position as a leading source of liquidity in DeFi will deliver a more cost-efficient, scalable, and liquid trading infrastructure suited to the next wave of DEXs to be launched on Monad". Orderly Network is set to begin its token launch event in the coming weeks with its TGE campaign rapidly reaching its end. _**About Monad**_ _Monad is a high-performance Ethereum-compatible L1 that ushers in a new paradigm of possibility through pipelined execution of Ethereum transactions. Monad's improvements address existing bottlenecks while preserving seamless compatibility for application developers (full EVM bytecode compatibility) and users (Ethereum RPC API compatibility). As a result, the rich landscape of Ethereum tooling and applied cryptography research can plug seamlessly into Monad while benefiting from improved throughput and scale._ _Learn more at [monad.xyz](https://www.monad.xyz/)_ _**About Orderly Network**_ _Orderly Network is a permissionless liquidity layer for Web3 trading. Built on omnichain infrastructure, Orderly enables deep liquidity for any asset across multiple blockchains. Focused on a future of DeFi that’s open to all, Orderly empowers developers to fluidly create a comprehensive array of financial products for any level of trader, without the risks of wrapped asset movement through cross-chain bridging._ _Learn more at [orderly.network](https://orderly.network/)_ _For PR enquiries related to this release, please contact [pr@orderly.network](mailto:pr@orderly.network)._

data.title: WSOT Spotlight: Navigating The Markets Through Sherpa’s Eyes
data.description: We sat with AltcoinSherpa - talked crypto markets, WSOT, and more!

blocks.body:
If you have been following <u>[WSOT’s commentary on 𝕏](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork/status/1815991263453168119)</u>, you’d see his name plastered all over – **“@AltcoinSherpa”.** So who is this Orderly fren bringing you all the updates on WSOT?

AltcoinSherpa has been deep in the crypto game since 2016 and going full degen since 2018. Coming from the gaming scene, Bitcoin first caught his eye as the ultimate way to send money across the globe—cheaper, faster, safer. Bought his first Bitcoin in early 2016, rode the 2017 hype train, then got rekt in 2018. That loss was the wake-up call—time to git gud at trading. After grinding Twitter, Google, books, and vids, he leveled up in 2019. Now, he's an active retail trader, dabbling in ventures, testing every app out there, and living in the altcoin trenches. Obsessed with the crypto world, AltcoinSherpa plans to ride this wave forever. 

He was also super influential in putting together the ongoing WSOT, leveraging his network of KOLs frens he’s built over the years. 

His social  channels ([𝕏,](https://twitter.com/AltcoinSherpa) [telegram](https://t.co/2tk69SLmJY) & [youtube](https://t.co/2tk69SLmJY)) already give insightful market tea, but we sat with him to see the crypto market through his eyes – degen style.

**-What did you do before you became "AltcoinSherpa"?**

_I worked in the gaming industry, specifically online poker. After playing for a while, I decided to work in the industry from the business side. Poker and crypto have a lot of similarities; namely the variance, imperfect information, and psychological hardships._

**-Given how active you are, how much time do you spend on CT daily on average?**

_It varies. I used to spend all day on CT but it’s a bit hard to get work done. If you’re learning, I think you can probably still spend a lot of time on there and still get some alpha. It’s just a bit harder than it used to be. I think that I spend an average of 2+ hours on CT each day._

**If you wanted to make it as a crypto influencer, what advice would you give to people?**

_I wouldn’t recommend going about it purely as an influencer. Generally speaking, most everyone just posts on there to have fun and learn…and if you happen to get followers, that’s just a bonus. I’ve seen two paths to becoming an influencer:_

 _- 1) You are just learning and start from the ground up. You share trade ideas or alpha on all of the stuff you have learned/understand and you are giving free education. You aren’t necessarily smart and you’re kind of ‘learning on the job’. This is the path for most every influencer I’ve talked with._

_- 2) You already are an advanced trader/analyst/shitcoiner and you already cut your teeth in the industry. Your main contribution to Twitter is shitposting, where you actually need to be pretty competent in order to do it well. Most of the big shitposters are actually very smart, successful guys who sometimes offer alpha but most often do not._

_In summary, I would never recommend you post on twitter JUST to become a crypto influencer. Go on there to make friends, find a community, and talk to some different people to learn. The crypto community is both very big and very small at the same time._

**-Does your family even understand what you do on X all day?**

_Not really_

**-What was your best trade ever?**

_I had some great trades in 2021; riding SOL from 20-200 and AVAX from 10-100. My best trade I’ve had though was probably PEPE from 5m- the top in 2023. Contextually speaking, it was absolutely wild to see PEPE do what it did during that period of the market + the overall environment. I also sold near the top too._

**-If you have $10K capital, how would you try to make it this cycle?**

_It depends on your level of activity. If you’re super active, there are a lot of ways to make it with 10k. Finding your edge is a whole big post/journey in itself but there are many more options in crypto today than there was 5  years ago. I’d probably try to learn the meme sector very well and study the fundamentals (yes, there are some) and try to invest in some of the midcaps._

_If you’re talking about ‘making it’ ie. taking 10k into 7 figures +, you have to amp up the risk though, which is inadvisable for most people. I think going the mid cap memes is probably the safer route while still giving good upside._

**-Memecoins are super popular right now. What are your thoughts on them? Any good learnings from $NPC?**

_I’m still a big fan of memes and still believe they are the primary coins to look for if you are looking to make it huge in crypto. I wrote some thoughts in this twitter thread: <u>[https://twitter.com/AltcoinSherpa/status/1803418432924234220](https://twitter.com/AltcoinSherpa/status/1803418432924234220)</u>_

_The tl;dr of it is: I think that memes will continue to be the best way to make $ for crypto participants because crypto, as it currently stands, is still the best casino on earth. Most retail traders are here for the money and memes are the easiest, cleanest, most fair (usually) way to participate._

**-When did you first hear of Orderly? What's your reading on the ongoing WSOT?**

_I heard about Orderly through Audrey, a former Orderly team member. I participated in the WOO private round and have been in contact with the team for years. I also became good friends with Arjun at Orderly and we chatted often._

_The current <u>[WSOT](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork/status/1812834776572698731)</u> is fantastic. I think that this competition has been a rousing success thus far; mostly in part because we have so many great traders in it. I think it also really highlights the great benefits of Orderly overall and how versatile it is. Traders are trading on many different dexes and they’re all powered by Orderly. Pretty cool stuff._

**-Putting you in the hotseat now(lol)! Who are you rooting for to win? We know you've got some friends in WSOT.**
![Untitled picture.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/Untitled_picture_dcca678b85.png)

_My three best friends in the competition are [Theo](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork/status/1811758673183805578), [Timeless](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork/status/1811781325092999260), and [Byz](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork/status/1811785103217164338). I’ve been talking to those guys for many years and have met Byz in real life twice as well. So any of those three would be amazing. I understand they’re also going against some heavyweights though and it’s going to be very hard to beat [Su](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork/status/1812027942601376189) and [Defisquared](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork/status/1811754898410864965)_

**-What's your least favorite thing about the space right now? If there's something you could change, what would that be?**

_I honestly am not sure I know the least favorite thing off the top of my head. Maybe just all of the hacks/scams associated with crypto. It’s horrible and I’ve lost loads of money due to scams in the past and I feel bad for all of the newcomers who deal with it. I almost want to say it’s a rite of passage but maybe that’s too harsh._

**-In your experience, what would be the most important trait one must have to be successful in the market?**

_Strong opinions, loosely held. Have an idea but you must be open to the idea of being wrong and changing your outlook based on the information that you are given. Crypto is so volatile and fluid that you have to be able to make hard decisions on the fly._

**-Finally, if everything went to zero tomorrow, sorta like a crypto-armageddon,  what would you do?**

_I honestly don’t know; I’ve gone all in in this industry and love it so much. I would be extremely lost without it. With that said, I’ve never had a real job and I don’t plan on ever getting one, so I would probably try something in real estate or something much more boring than crypto._

data.title: Introducing the Orderly Demo Challenge!
data.description: Showcase your favorite DEX, powered by Orderly Network

blocks.body:
Orderly Network is back with a new and exciting contest, bigger and better than ever! Get ready to join the **Orderly Demo Challenge**—your chance to share your expertise, and help others master the 18 innovative brokers built on Orderly Network. Participate, empower our community, and win fantastic rewards all month long.


### What’s the Challenge?
We invite you to create detailed video tutorials for the 18 brokers currently built on Orderly. The contest is divided into weekly activities, designed along unique themes to highlight each broker's unique features and functionalities.

### Weekly Themes
Each week introduces a new theme and a fresh set of brokers to explore:
- Week 1: Genesis Week
- Week 2: Innovation Week
- Week 3: Mastery Week
- Week 4: Pinnacle Week

### Rewards
- A **total prize pool of $1800** will be shared throughout the campaign. 
- The **top 3 creators' video guides** will be selected for each builder and share a **$100 prize pool weekly**.

### How to Participate
5 builders will be featured each week, except the final week which will feature the remaining 3 builders (18 in total). To join the challenge;
- Select a builder from the featured list for the week
- Create a video tutorial/demo on how to use your chosen project.
- Post the video/link on your **X account** (formerly Twitter) with the hashtag <u>**#sooneveryonewillbeonOrderly</u>**.
- Submit your **X** link to our dedicated Discord channel within the specified week:  <u>[Orderly Creators Hub channel](https://discord.com/channels/954041617600348220/1159175634925387857)
</u>

### Weekly Rollout Schedule
The weekly contest runs from **Thursday 1 PM UTC to Wednesday 1 PM UTC the following week**.
- **Genesis Week (Week 1)**: WOOFi Pro, LogX Pro, EMDX, BITORO, IBX
- **Innovation Week (Week 2)**: AscendEX, VOOI, Sharpe AI, CoolWallet DEX, Quickperps Falkor
- **Mastery Week (Week 3)**: FusionX, Xade, Prime Perps, DFYN, Unibot 
- **Pinnacle Week (Week 4)**: Sable Finance, 0xMarket, Elixir

### Selection Criteria
Our judges will evaluate submissions based on:
- **Clarity**: Is the tutorial straightforward and understandable for both beginners and advanced traders? Ask yourself  “_Is the tutorial straightforward and understandable?_”
- **Engagement**: Showcase your ability to simplify complex terms and maintain engagement. Ask yourself  “_Does it captivate and maintain interest?_”
- **Content Quality**: Make your content as detailed as possible. Ask yourself  “_Is it accurate and thorough?_”
- **Creativity**: Find creative ways to make your presentation exciting. Ask yourself, _“Is the presentation original and innovative?_”

Rev up your creativity and be a winner!

Don’t miss out on this opportunity to share your expertise, engage with our community, and win fantastic rewards. We can’t wait to see what you come up with. 

All hands on deck, let’s make learning on Orderly fun and rewarding!

data.title: Ecosystem Spotlight: Wintermute, Powering Orderly Network's Stellar Liquidity
data.description: Spotlighting global liquidity providers powering Orderly Network's liquidity

blocks.body:
As one of the largest perps liquidity sources in DeFi, boasting the best top of orderbook liquidity, it's only right that we turn the spotlight to the pillars behind this feat—our liquidity providers. 

One such pillar is the industry-leading global liquidity provider – Wintermute, and we are certainly excited to work with them.

<u>[Wintermute](https://wintermute.com/)</u> is a leading global algorithmic trading firm in digital assets that provides the most competitive liquidity in the crypto market across all major trading venues and OTC distribution channels. 

In simpler terms, this means anywhere crypto trading occurs, across CeFi or DeFi, they are consistently providing the necessary liquidity - much like Orderly, but on a far larger scale, powered by the most advanced algorithmic trading systems.

Boasting over $4.8 trillion in cumulative trading volume, Wintermute powers liquidity to over 60 exchanges and trading platforms creating liquid and efficient markets for over 320+ assets across both CeFi and DeFi including Binance, Bybit, Coinbase, Uniswap, Orderly Network, etc.

![wintermute1.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/wintermute1_b579560556.png)

Orderly has the best top of orderbook liquidity for perps in DeFi compared to other DEXs – a feat Wintermute plays a vital role in helping us achieve. What does this mean?

Slippage is one aspect traders often overlook in favor of focusing on trading fees. Caused by insufficient volume and liquidity for an asset, slippage occurs when traders are forced to execute their orders at the next available price, often leaving them to deal with wider spreads on larger transactions.

By providing robust liquidity to Orderly’s infrastructure as pro liquidity providers, traders on Orderly execute trades with minimal slippage and tighter spreads. 
Don’t simply take our word for it. See for yourself;

Let’s look at the orderbooks from Orderly Network and other leading DEXs:

![liq-1.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/liq_1_a189d82255.png)

- Orderly Network: At the price level of 61,500 and above, there is over 1.584 BTC available. This high liquidity means trades can be executed with minimal slippage.
- Other leading DEX: At the same price level, only 0.49 BTC is available. Lower liquidity increases the likelihood of slippage, resulting in a worse execution price.

That’s precisely what Wintermute provides – an efficient and liquid market for the 50+ assets listed on your favorite brokers powered by Orderly. This attracts more traders, boosting total trading volumes on Orderly to over $60 billion. 

Besides having the best top of orderbook liquidity, Orderly also offers superior precision in price points, characterized by the extra decimal places when compared to other DEXs. The extra decimal point means we have tighter quotes compared to the other DEX, providing higher precision. Traders crossing the mid pay only 0.1 on BTC versus 1 on the other leading DEX.
![IMG_9739.JPG](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/IMG_9739_10a3afecc3.JPG)

Speaking to Wintermute, we asked for some insights; _What’s the importance of top of orderbook liquidity and why is it often overlooked by traders?_

>“Top of orderbook liquidity is crucial in any market because it directly impacts the ability to execute trades efficiently without significant price slippage. Having deep liquidity at the top of the orderbook ensures that large orders can be matched quickly and at stable prices. This is essential for maintaining tight spreads and providing a reliable trading experience.

>However, many traders tend to overlook this aspect because they focus more on overall trading volume or the last traded price. They might not realize that insufficient top orderbook liquidity can lead to higher execution costs. When traders place large orders in a shallow order book, they can experience significant price slippage, which negatively impacts their trading outcomes. This is particularly problematic in perpetual markets where leverage can amplify the effects of slippage.”

Wintermute lives and breathes DeFi, notably emphasized by its investment in over 100+ projects, demonstrating a commitment to driving growth, innovation, and transparency in the crypto market. 

Still speaking to Wintermute we asked _“What’s the primary role of LPs in bootstrapping liquidity for new projects and how does Wintermute stand out ?”_


>“The primary role of liquidity providers is to supply the initial liquidity needed to enable trading and market activity from the outset. This liquidity is crucial for attracting traders and investors by ensuring there is enough volume for assets to be traded smoothly, allowing them to execute trades of the desired size at the best possible price. Contrary to popular belief, liquidity providers facilitate price discovery rather than moving the price. By providing liquidity, they help new projects establish a market presence and gain the trust of the trading community, which in turn drives more organic liquidity.


>Wintermute is long-term-oriented and, beyond trading tokens, we offer comprehensive guidance on all aspects of liquidity, as well as other key areas like networking through our events and introductions to venture investments. Our strong in-house DeFi team collaborates closely with projects, providing support on every level, including exchange listings and protocol design. We have a broad reach in liquidity venues. This is evidenced by our operations across 60+ platforms in both CeFi and DeFi, our integration with top aggregators and institutional brokers, and our status as one of the largest on-chain trading firms. By working with Wintermute, you also gain access to our OTC desk, providing exposure to a broader institutional investor base, and increasing token visibility and market penetration.”

We further asked Wintermute;  _What does it take for a crypto project to get the backing of a reputable LP like yours? What criteria does Wintermute look for in a project?_

>“To get the backing of a liquidity provider like Wintermute, a project must demonstrate strong fundamentals, including a solid team with a clear vision and proven track record. We look for projects with innovative technology, a viable use case, and significant market potential. Transparency is key; we value open communication and alignment of interests for long-term collaboration.” 

By being the backbone of our liquidity infrastructure, Wintermute helps bring our omnichain shared liquidity model to life, allowing us the flexibility to flex our muscles and continue leading as one of the largest liquidity sources in DeFi.

On every chain we go, for any asset, Wintermute’s dedication to continuous innovation delivers market-leading liquidity powered by advanced algorithms. This partnership enables Orderly to maintain its edge in the competitive world of crypto trading, ensuring our traders always have the best possible trading experience.

Trade on an Orderly-powered DEX today: <u>[Trade on Orderly](https://orderly.network/docs/introduction/trade-on-orderly/brokers)</u>

data.title: Redefining DeFi with the Orderly Chain — A Closer Look at the Orderly Settlement Layer
data.description: A closer look at the Orderly Chain - Orderly Settlement Layer

blocks.body: Orderly Network thrives as the go-to infrastructure for DeFi builders. This assertion is further consolidated with the recent launch of the Orderly vault on Optimism — a feat pertinent to our ongoing omnichain expansion which began on the Arbitrum chain. Now, dApps and traders on OP Mainnet can tap into our shared liquidity and trade across multiple blockchains.

At the heart of this intricate ecosystem is our pride — the Orderly Settlement Layer, a native chain powered by OP Stack meticulously engineered to settle all trades on Orderly with precision. In our [previous exploration](https://medium.com/@orderlynetwork/introducing-orderly-app-chain-powering-orderly-omnichain-settlement-layer-170d6c890029), we scratched the surface of the Orderly Chain. Today, we delve deeper, revealing how it isn’t just a component in our omnichain infrastructure — it’s a catalyst for reshaping DeFi. ### Revisiting the Core: The Orderly Chain Think of the Orderly Chain as the central nervous system of our omnichain infrastructure. Nestled between the Asset and Engine Layers, it’s not just another layer; it’s a crucial element ensuring accurate operation of ledger balances, user data, and all relevant trade details. Missed our introductory insights? We invite you to revisit our earlier post to get the juice on the Orderly Chain’s foundational features and capabilities. ### Why the Orderly Chain? The essence of the Orderly Chain lies in its role as the definitive settlement layer for all transactions within the Orderly Network. Orderly’s settlement layer serves as a ledger for all transaction data, user data balances, and trading data retrieved from the engine layer. ![orderly-evm-flow](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/0_c_S6_Ofye9tcx_SU_B2_d1f01079e7.webp) Its independence is its power, maintaining seamless operations even in the unlikely event of a downtime to the matching engine. This resilience means that brokers on Orderly Network can confidently manage trading positions and user balances, ensuring uninterrupted service.
In essence, all brokers built on Orderly Network will always be able to keep track of all trading positions and user balances without any worries.
Trading on an orderbook interface across multiple chains might make you easily forget you are trading on a DEX. That’s fine; it’s what we aim to achieve as well — [abstracting away all complexities related to DeFi trading](https://medium.com/@orderlynetwork/at-orderly-we-believe-in-chain-abstraction-962d17e1d1de).
But that does not mean we compromise on transparency. With all trades settled on-chain, powered by the orderly settlement layer, all transactions can be assessed via [the Orderly Explorer](https://explorer.orderly.network/).

Since we launched the explorer in Dec. 2023, we have recorded over 4.7 million blocks, 5 million + transactions across 64k+ wallet addresses; mirroring our continued and impressive surge in trading volume as confirmed on [Defillama](https://defillama.com/derivatives/orderly-network). ### A Decentralized Game-Changer in DeFi In TradFi, clearing houses have long been the bastions of security and trust, offering critical risk management and global cross-netting capabilities. The key here is “global-cross netting” function.
The global financial system is a vast network of banks, investment firms, and other financial entities, all engaging in a multitude of transactions every day. These transactions can range from buying and selling stocks, to more complex derivative contracts.
In a simple transaction, if Bank A owes Bank B $100, and Bank B owes Bank A $50, without cross-netting, these two payments would occur separately. This is not only inefficient but also increases the risk and the amount of capital that each party needs to hold to ensure they can make their payments.
Enter cross-netting: Instead of treating each transaction separately, the clearing house calculates the net obligations. In the example above, instead of two transactions, Bank A simply pays $50 to Bank B. This is more efficient and reduces the amount of money that needs to change hands.
[CME Clearing](https://www.investopedia.com/terms/c/cme.asp#:~:text=How%20Active%20Is,approximately%20%241%20quadrillion.) plays this role in TradFi, sitting as the world’s leading and most diverse derivatives marketplace by daily volume, handling 3 billion contracts annually on average, worth approximately $1 quadrillion.
The Orderly Settlement Layer aims to embody this ethos in DeFi, acting as the decentralized clearing house for DeFi. With all Orderly vaults deployed across chains facilitating cross-chain trading, the Orderly settlement layer can serve as a highly efficient, global-scale infrastructure ensuring transactions are settled efficiently and securely.
Essentially, it will form an immutable, decentralized global netting system for trades, margin, and balance info, serving every user across all brokers on Orderly.
Also, given our permissionless nature, Orderly’s infrastructure democratizes market-making, spurring competition for the best liquidity and ensuring tighter spreads. This is not just about maintaining market efficiency; it’s about fostering a vibrant, liquid market ecosystem.
The Orderly Chain is redefining DeFi as a decentralized clearing house, settling trades on-chain with efficiency. Our omnichain infrastructure enhances DeFi builders’ and traders’ experience by enabling cross-functional trading and modular product launches, and central to this is the ***Orderly Settlement Layer*** — ensuring uninterrupted trade settlement, even if other systems go offline.
With more Orderly vault deployments in the works, we are certainly edging closer to a more efficient DeFi trading landscape– facilitating a permissionless liquidity layer for Web3.

data.title: Orderly Network and Very Long Swap To Expand Web3 Frontiers in Asian Markets, Introduces First-ever Japanese-built PerpDEX
data.description: Japanese-based builders to deliver omnichain perps trading, powered by Orderly

blocks.body:
Orderly Network, the leading permissionless DeFi liquidity hub and perpDEX infrastructure provider, is expanding its presence in the Asian market through a strategic partnership with Very Long Swap (VLS), a Japanese-based decentralized exchange (DEX) builder. 

Very Long Swap, a prominent DEX built on Astar zkEVM, is inspired by the popular Japanese NFT project, Very Long Animals. With permission to utilize the IP from Very Long Animals, VLS offers a platform for swaps, farming, and staking opportunities, catering to one of Asia's largest and most diverse Web3 communities.

According to a [Skyquest 2024 -2031 forecast analysis](https://www.skyquestt.com/report/web-3-0-blockchain-market#:~:text=Global%20web%203.0%20market%20size,period%20(2024%2D2031).), the Asia-Pacific market is expected to experience the fastest growth in Web3, driven by the financial and banking industry’s growing adoption of blockchain technology and Web3-based digital solutions. This is further exemplified by [ongoing development](https://www.japanopenchain.org/en/docs/about/intro#:~:text=The%20Japan%20Open%20Chain%20is,consortium%20permissioned%20node%20type%20blockchain.) of the Japan Open Chain (JOC), an EVM-compatible chain with numerous major Japanese tech, banking, media giants, and platform partners serving as stablecoin issuers and validators to the network.


This strategic partnership will enable VLS to build the first-ever perpDEX specifically designed for the Japanese market, developed by Japanese-based builders. Future plans include listing a USD/JPY FX perpetual contracts asset pair, as well as integrating with the JOC Chain to deliver innovative DeFi solutions.

**Takahiko Kojima, CEO, Very Long Swap** commenting on the future of perpDEX and its impact on Japan’s DeFi landscape, stated:

>“Having a PERP feature in a Japan-based DeFi project is quite rare, and considering future integration with stablecoins, there's only hope for market expansion. We are honored to partner with Orderly and collaborate with VLS users at a high level! Many users are eagerly anticipating the PERP release, and we can’t wait to see it in action!”

Orderly Network offers a truly omnichain trading solution, aggregating orders from multiple chains into a single unified orderbook. This approach enhances trading efficiency, improves liquidity, and tightens market spreads for any asset across any trading venue. Powered by the Orderly Chain and Layerzero technology, Orderly provides seamless, permissionless liquidity infrastructure for over 20+ DEX platforms and brokers built on the network.

With support for six chains—Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, Base, Ethereum mainnet, and Mantle—VLS traders can access a shared orderbook, with all trades settled on the Orderly Chain, unlocking efficient cross-netting capabilities while maintaining the autonomy and transparency of DeFi.

Since launch, Orderly Network has recorded a cumulative trading volume of $80 billion, with cumulative net fees exceeding $10 million and ATH milestone of $1.8 billion  24hr trading volume as of [publishing date], according to data from [Dune Analytics](https://dune.com/orderly_network/orderly-dashboard).

**Ran Yi, Co-founder of Orderly Network**, reiterated the network’s drive to foster innovation in various markets. He stated; 
>“Partnering with Very Long Swap, a popular DEX in Japan and elsewhere in Asia, is a significant step in our mission to bring seamless, omnichain trading to the forefront of global markets. By integrating omnichain trading with groundbreaking financial products, we’re enabling Japanese traders and builders to access unmatched liquidity and efficiency. We are eager to see how this collaboration will drive the next wave of DeFi adoption in one of Asia’s most vibrant digital economies."

Orderly [previously announced](https://www.cryptonews.net/news/blockchain/27954440/) its introduction to the Asian market with renowned fintech powerhouse, Slash Finance. This integration with VLS further compounds Orderly’s footprint in the Asia market, bringing the most Web3-friendly region to the forefront of DeFi’s evolution.

**Trade on VLS perpDEX here: [VLS Perp](https://perp.verylongswap.xyz/perp/PERP_BTC_USDC)**

data.title: PR Feature: Orderly Network collaborates with Google Cloud to drive safer and faster DeFi adoption
data.description: Orderly Network partners Google Cloud for safer DeFi adoption.

blocks.body:
The agreement prioritizes developing secure and user-centric developer tools amid self-custody and transparency concerns for DeFi adoption._

## **Details of the Partnership**
Orderly Network announced today that it is working with Google Cloud to enable DeFi ecosystem projects to be built faster, more securely, and with a lower entry barrier.

The agreement centers on developing user-centric and secure systems that address challenges around self-custody and transparency in DeFi. This is happening within the context of the financial services industry increasingly adopting blockchain and decentralized technologies to develop new revenue streams.

“Our goals are twofold: to unite partners for growth and bridge the gap between DeFi and CeFi, while also supporting Traditional Finance’s adoption of DeFi with timely assistance. The Orderly-Google Cloud collaboration equips developers with user-centric enterprise tools like customizable widgets and ready-made solutions. Additionally, the provided unparalleled liquidity access synergistically streamlines the creation of diverse financial products across various blockchains,” **explained Ran Yi, Founder and CEO of Orderly Network**.

As part of the agreement, Orderly Network will exclusively develop off-chain components of DeFi infrastructure on Google Cloud. Furthermore, Orderly will be a DeFi infrastructure provider, available on Google Cloud Marketplace. Orderly and Google Cloud will continue working together in this ever evolving space to drive DeFi infrastructure innovation forward.

“We are eager to advance our ongoing collaboration with Google Cloud to accelerate the adoption of our protocol across a multitude of layer 1 & 2 ecosystems. This will infuse the crucial elements of infrastructure, performance, and liquidity into the largest blockchain sector. By integrating Orderly’s easy-to-use DeFi SDK with Google Cloud’s high-throughput technology stack, we are positioned to champion our mission more effectively, paving the way for innovative financial products tailored for both new and traditional financial markets,” **said Arjun Arora, COO of Orderly Network.**

“We’re seeing an increasing interest from clients exploring blockchain workloads on Google Cloud. This surge in demand highlights the necessity for a tailored Web3 product suite from Orderly with benefits from Google Cloud that can better serve their needs.

Working with Orderly Network to build robust infrastructure will help address the gaps in DeFi adoption and growth, and ensure scalability in the continuously evolving space through the development of secure and user-centric enterprise developer tools.” **Rishi Ramchandani, Head of APAC Web3 GTM, Google Cloud Asia Pacific.**

Orderly has the support of notable backers like Nomura’s Laser Digital, Pantera Capital, Dragonfly Capital, and Sequoia China. Orderly is taking its next significant stride by expanding its robust infrastructure to the EVM ecosystem in tandem with its vision to deliver an omnichain CLOB infrastructure that unifies liquidity across blockchains.

**Whether you’re a builder, storyteller, trader, or memelord—your work matters. Now it pays.**

Apply Now: [Form](https://forms.gle/PUKs6rqttaL84xDB9)

## 🌟 What is the Orderly Crafters Program?

A contributor program designed to reward community members based on:
- The **quality** of their contributions

- **DevCrafters** = Builders & Educators
- **Mentors** = Community Heartbeat

---

## 🎯 XP System Overview (2025+)

Contributions are scored based on 4 core criteria (max 40 points):

- **Effort** (1–10): Time, originality, depth  
- **Relevance** (1–10): Alignment with Orderly’s mission/tech  
- **Impact / Reach** (1–10): Value to the ecosystem  
- **Creativity / Style** (1–10): Storytelling, visuals, memeability  

👉 **Base XP max = 40**

### ⚡ Engagement Bonus

| Criteria                          | Bonus Multiplier |
|----------------------------------|------------------|
| >500 likes & >10 comments        | +0.50            |
| >300 likes & >5 comments         | +0.35            |

### 🔧 Role-Based Multipliers (Updated)

| Role             | XP Multiplier |
|------------------|---------------|

| Trader             | 1.2x         |
| Builder (Dev)      | 1.2x         |
| Mentor             | 1.0x         |
| Memer/Speculator   | 0.9x         |

---

## 🧮 Final XP Formula

**Final XP = Base XP × (1 + Engagement Bonus) × Role Multiplier**

---

### 🏅 Reward Tiers (Updated)

| Final XP | Tier     | Reward Description                                              |
|----------|----------|------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 75+ XP   | S-Tier   | Max payout, custom badge, Discord shoutout, leaderboard boost    |

## 🧪 A-Tier XP Example

**Name**: Lina  
**Role**: Narrative Threader

Final XP = 37 × 1.35 × 1.5 = **74.92 XP**

data.title: Orderly Omnichain Testnet Launch: Powering the Next Generation of dApps Through Our Omnichain Infrastructure
data.description: Orderly Network introduces Orderly Omnichain Testnet for defi builders

blocks.body:
In the ever-evolving landscape of decentralized applications (dApps), adaptability and scalability are the keys to survival. As a pioneering force in the blockchain space, Orderly Network understands the need for continuous innovation to meet the demands of the burgeoning DeFi ecosystem.

With Orderly already making its mark on the NEAR blockchain, powering decentralized order books and perps trading on top dApps (such as WOOFi, and ReF Finance), we are set and excited to embark on a groundbreaking journey towards an omnichain future with the introduction of the Orderly Omnichain Testnet.

The Orderly Omnichain Testnet is set to launch on 13th Sept. 2023, extending our innovative product suite to the birthplace of DeFi — the EVM ecosystem.

The Need for Omnichain Solutions
The limitations of single-chain solutions have become evident as the DeFi space matures. It’s clear that it won’t be one blockchain to rule them all as an explosion in L2s and alternative L1s are extremely popular. At Orderly, we aim to cater to all dApps and to achieve this, we must advance omnichain.

Enter omnichain solutions: Omnichain systems allow dApps to operate seamlessly across multiple blockchains, tapping into their unique strengths while bypassing their weaknesses. By expanding beyond NEAR to leading networks like Arbitrum, Optimism, Linea, Polygon, Scroll, and Avalanche, Orderly Network is positioning itself at the forefront of this transformative shift.

Orderly Omnichain Testnet: Exploring New Horizons
The Orderly Omnichain Testnet is more than just an upgrade; it’s a channel to the future of DeFi. This testnet introduces a range of features and enhancements compared to its predecessor on NEAR — Orderly v1. It serves as a sandbox for developers, allowing them to explore the possibilities of omnichain integration in a risk-free environment.

One of the most exciting aspects of Orderly Omnichain is its compatibility with the Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) ecosystem. This means that developers of new and existing dApps can easily leverage Orderly’s capabilities to create modular dApps tailored to their users’ needs.

Builders can create their own Perps DEX on top of a low latency and shared liquidity CLOB trading infrastructure, accessible from all the main EVM chains. In essence, a Polygon trader can engage in transactions with counterparts on different chains such as Arbitrum or AVAX, all without departing from the Polygon network. No bridging of funds is necessary, eliminating additional intricacies. Simply visit your preferred dApp(front-end broker), connect your wallet, and initiate trading.

**## Orderly Omnichain High-Level Architecture**

Orderly Omnichain architecture has three main layers at its core:

**Asset Layer** -This layer resides on each chain Orderly Network supports in the EVM ecosystem.

- Users interact with this layer when registering their accounts, depositing, or withdrawing funds from their wallets.

**Settlement Layer** — This layer resides on a single chain and powers all cross-chain messaging operations

- Users do not interact with this directly and only used as a transaction ledger

**Engine Layer** — This layer powers the Orderbook and order-related services on Orderly Network

- Users interact with this when managing orders, trades, and transactions

This innovative design of the Orderly Omnichain takes our solution to the next level, enabling out-of-the-box (OOB) development of chain-agnostic DEXs and dApps best suited to serve both individual and institutional traders.

Want to build on Orderly? Explore our comprehensive documentation here

## **Why should you build on Orderly Omnichain?**
**### Accelerated DEX development**

Develop a Central Limit Order Book (CLOB) DEX 10 times faster than traditional methods. Launching an omnichain perpetual trading DEX has never been easier.

### **Time-Saving Integration**

Orderly Network’s solution saves development teams over 200 hours on each integration, allowing you to focus on what truly matters: building user-centric interfaces.

### **Streamlined DeFi Innovation**

Unlock the full potential of your DeFi application, solving bigger problems, and reducing operational costs.

### **Seamless Integration Across Multiple Use-Cases**

Orderly’s tech stack caters not only to DEX development but also supports seamless CLOB perp trading integration for brokers, aggregators, wallets & custodians, HFT, trading bots, games/dApps, and more

### **Reimagined Multichain Trading**

Powered by LayerZero’s advanced multichain interoperability, developers can create chain-agnostic dApps, eliminating the need for traditional bridges in multichain applications. This benefits both builders and end-users, offering unified liquidity across blockchains powered by Orderly’s omnichain settlement layer and institutional-grade orderbook infrastructure.

### **CEX-like performance with Robust Liquidity**

Experience CEX-like performance while maintaining the transparency, self-custody, and on-chain trading execution of DEXs. With an average latency less than 200ms, builders can offer perp trading for even high-frequency trade execution.

Additionally, Orderly ensures deep liquidity through top-tier market makers, guaranteeing tight spreads, depth, and 100% uptime for users.

## **Modular dApp Development with Orderly**
At the heart of Orderly’s value proposition is the concept of modular dApp development. We understand that one size does not fit all in the world of DeFi. Developers should have the flexibility to integrate our CLOB order books and perp trading features into new or existing dApps as they see fit.

With Orderly, it’s not just about adding functionality; it’s about enhancing the user experience. By simplifying complex infrastructure requirements, we empower developers to create dApps that are more accessible and user-friendly.

## **The Future of DeFi with Orderly**
As the DeFi landscape continues to evolve, Orderly Network is committed to staying at the forefront of innovation. Our omnichain approach promises to bring a new level of composability and scalability to the DeFi space. By combining the strengths of multiple blockchains, we aim to create a future where decentralized finance is not only efficient but also accessible to all.

## **About Orderly Network**
Orderly Network is not just another blockchain project; it’s a vision of creating a seamless trading infrastructure that transcends the boundaries of individual blockchains. Our mission is to provide developers with the tools and features they need to build dApps that are as flexible as they are powerful. We believe in combining the transparency and composability of decentralized exchanges (DEXs) with the speed and performance of centralized exchanges (CEXs) to redefine DeFi.

The Orderly Omnichain Testnet launch marks a significant milestone in our journey towards an omnichain future. We invite developers, enthusiasts, and the entire crypto community to explore the opportunities presented by Orderly’s expansion. Together, we can power the next generation of dApps and redefine the world of DeFi.

Join us on this exciting journey, and let’s shape the future of DeFi together.

Stay up-to-date with all things Orderly:

[Twitter](link) | [Discord](link) | [LinkedIn](link)

data.title: Leveraged Trading On Orderly Network
data.description: An overview of leveraged trading on Orderly Network

blocks.body:
Leveraged trading is a strategy in which traders enhance their positions to increase potential gains beyond what would be possible with the trader's own capital alone. When market conditions align with your trades, they can significantly enhance investment returns. However, adverse market movements can also exacerbate potential losses. The double-edged sword that leverage presents means that traders must be conversant with the nub of advanced trading to be profitable. Orderly offers traders the tools and interface to seamlessly trade perp futures up to 20x leverage. Let’s take a look at everything you need to know when leverage trading on Orderly; Some key concepts to understanding leveraged trading include; - **Leverage**: When trading, traders use leverage (1x, 2x, 10x, etc.) to enhance their positions. For instance, with a 10x leverage provided by your broker, every dollar you invest grants you the purchasing capacity of $10, $1000 on a 20x leverage means you have $20,000 to trade and so on. - **Spot trading (On the spot)**: Spot trading involves the actual buying or selling of the underlying crypto asset. Hence, if you hold an asset in the spot market, you can benefit only from its potential price appreciation. - **Contract for Difference**: Perp futures is a “contract for difference” where traders enter contracts based on the estimated future price of the underlying asset, with the spot price as the reference point. See full glossary on perps trading [here](https://orderly.network/docs/introduction/trade-on-orderly/trading-basics/perpetual-futures) …
… or you can simply ask our in-built AI for all things Orderly!

On Orderly, you can either trade spot or perps, however, leveraged trading is only available for the latter. All spot markets on Orderly are traded against USDC without any leverage, meaning every trade requires the exchange of USDC. In essence, spot trading on Orderly involves;

- **Actual asset transfer**: The buyer and the seller trade real assets based on the prevailing market price.
- **Zero leverage**: Traders use their wallet assets to execute a trade and cannot borrow additional funds through leverage.
- **Only available on NEAR**

In traditional spot trading, traders can use leverage to increase their positions – a trading strategy known as spot margin trading. While both spot margin trading and perps futures trading are forms of leveraged trading, but they differ in several key aspects:

- **Underlying Asset**: Spot margin trading involves direct buying or selling of assets like Bitcoin or Ethereum. Perpetual futures trading trades derivative contracts without owning the underlying asset.
- **Delivery Date**: Spot margin trades settle immediately, while perpetual futures contracts have no expiry date and track spot market prices through funding mechanisms.
- **Leverage Mechanism**: In spot margin trading, traders borrow funds for leverage, choosing their leverage level. In perpetual futures trading, leverage is inherent to the contract itself, adjusted by position size relative to margin balance.
- **Funding Rates**: Perpetual futures contracts have funding rates, ensuring contract price alignment with the asset's price, unlike spot margin trading, which doesn't involve funding rates.
- **Risk Profile**: Spot margin trading exposes traders to underlying asset price movements, while perpetual futures trading involves additional risks like funding rate fluctuations and liquidation risks.

Perpetual futures, however, represent a trading method that doesn't necessitate ownership of the underlying asset. Traders essentially engage in a contract to buy or sell an asset at a predetermined price. Unlike traditional futures, there's no fixed expiration date for these contracts. Similar to margin trading, perpetual futures traders need collateral deposits to leverage their positions. Profits or losses in this contract type are contingent on the trader's accuracy in predicting future prices, enabling profitability regardless of a bullish or bearish forecast. The key tenets of a perpetual futures contract include:

- **Leverage**: Traders can magnify their position through leverage. For example, a perp trader with a $1000 account balance could use 10x leverage to take on a position of $10,000, increasing the likelihood of profit or loss by the same margin.
- **Contracts**: Perp futures do not involve the actual trading of an underlying asset. Profit or loss is based on the prediction accuracy of a trader.
- **Liquidity**: The perp futures market is usually more liquid than the spot market as trading is based on contracts rather than actual asset exchange.
- **Expiration**: Perp futures do not have expiration dates.
### Trading Perps on Orderly
Traders can enjoy seamless omnichain trading experiences on Orderly either <u>[through our API](https://orderly.network/blog/orderly-network--trading-api-a-guide-to-powerful-automated-market-access/)</u> or one of the numerous <u>[front-end platforms](https://orderly.network/docs/introduction/trade-on-orderly/brokers)</u>, speculating derivatives financial contracts without expiry dates. You can increase your position size with up to 50x leverage across a wide range of assets, enjoying deeper liquidity on Orderly’s orderbook with minimal price impact. While it is mandatory to meet the account maintenance and liquidation requirements, traders must deposit collateral in USDC as all perp contracts are quoted and settled in USDC.

- **Cross-margin collateral**: At present, Orderly only supports cross-margin collateral. This means all traders must deposit USDC collateral, which is then shared across all open positions to calculate their account margin ratio. 

- **Leverage positions**: Orderly allows traders to freely use the following leverages - 1x, 2x, 3x, 4x, 5x, 10x, 20x  and up to 50x.

- **Position mode**: At present, traders on Orderly can use one-sided positions. They cannot hold long and short positions on a single perp futures contract.

Orderly’s infrastructure creates an institutional grade, CEX-like perps trading experience enabling you to trade onchain seamlessly across major networks without any bridging risks involved. 

Trade on Orderly today and enjoy seamless permissionless perps trading experience on Orderly!

data.title: Orderly Network Adopts Chainlink Price Feeds to Leverage High-Quality Market Data
data.description: We wanted the very best to back ORDER, and Chainlink was the clear choice!

blocks.body:
We’re excited to announce that Orderly Network—a leading perpetual DEX infrastructure with ~$86B of cumulative trading volume—has adopted [Chainlink Price Feeds](https://docs.chain.link/data-feeds/price-feeds) on Arbitrum mainnet for our ORDER token. By adopting the industry-leading decentralized computing platform, Orderly Network now has seamless access to market data needed to support secure markets around our newly launched ORDER token in which Beefy Finance, Jones DAO, and Silo Finance have been the first to integrate. 


>“We’re excited to see Orderly Network adopt Chainlink Price Feeds and look forward to seeing how they leverage it to support an increasingly secure and reliable DeFi ecosystem.”—**Michael Mendes, Strategic Data Lead at Chainlink Labs**

We chose Chainlink as our preferred oracle solution because its infrastructure is seamless to integrate and time-tested in production. As the industry’s most proven and decentralized data solution, Chainlink already helps secure leading [DeFi](https://chain.link/education/defi) protocols responsible for tens of billions of dollars in smart contract value, has a a proven history of reliably delivering data of all types to blockchains, and is widely adopted by applications that require offchain data and computation services.  

Orderly Network combines an orderbook-based trading infrastructure with a robust liquidity layer, enabling perpetual futures trading without a traditional front end. By offering a white-label DEX solution, Orderly saves developers time and resources while providing immediate access to a deep liquidity pool. This unified trading infrastructure allows for seamless trading applications, connecting users across both EVM and non-EVM chains in a single orderbook environment. Designed for various use cases, Orderly empowers brokers, spot and perpetual aggregators, wallets, trading desks, and developers to leverage high-performance trading features and comprehensive liquidity.

In order to expand the utility of the ORDER token, we needed seamless access to offchain data feeds that are supplied directly onchain in a highly reliable manner. Because blockchains are natively incapable of accessing offchain data, we needed a flexible [oracle network](https://chain.link/education/blockchain-oracles) that could reliably and flexibly deliver high-quality data onchain to be consumed by the broader DeFi ecosystem on Arbitrum. 


After reviewing various oracle solutions, we integrated Chainlink Price Feeds because they provide a multitude of critical features such as:
- **High-Quality Data**—Chainlink oracles can manage API keys and account logins, allowing them to aggregate and deliver premium data from a wide range of highly available and financially incentivized APIs to dApps.
- **Reliable Nodes**—Chainlink Price Feeds are secured by a large collection of independent, security-reviewed, and Sybil-resistant oracle nodes run by leading enterprises, data providers, and DevOps teams who have a strong onchain history of performance even during extreme network congestion. 
- **Decentralized Infrastructure**—Chainlink Price Feeds are decentralized at multiple levels, eliminating any central point of failure in the delivery of external data.
- **Transparent Performance**—Chainlink Price Feeds can be monitored by anyone in real-time using existing data analytic tools such as market.link, enabling users to verify the data triggering their contract.


>“Adopting Chainlink Price Feeds was essential for us, as it provides us with the high-quality market data essential for the adoption of the Order token throughout the Arbitrum DeFi landscape. We look forward to continuing to work with Chainlink to further our collaboration across a multitude of verticals..”—**Ran Yi , Co-Founder at Orderly Network**

### About Chainlink
Chainlink is the industry-standard decentralized computing platform powering the verifiable web. Chainlink has enabled over $16 trillion in transaction value by providing financial institutions, startups, and developers worldwide with access to real-world data, offchain computation, and secure cross-chain interoperability across any blockchain. Chainlink powers verifiable applications and high-integrity markets for banking, DeFi, global trade, gaming, and other major sectors. 

Learn more about Chainlink by visiting [chain.link](https://chain.link/?utm_medium=referral&utm_source=press-release) or reading the developer documentation at [docs.chain.link](https://docs.chain.link/?utm_medium=referral&utm_source=press-release).

### About Orderly Network

Orderly Network is a cloud liquidity infrastructure revolutionizing DeFi by consolidating trading across chains through a single shared orderbook, powered by the innovative Orderly Chain. Empowering limitless trading, Orderly creates a cohesive liquidity landscape that improves efficiency, delivers deeper liquidity with tighter spreads, and grants developers, traders, and exchanges access to over 60 markets through a unified trading infrastructure.

data.title: What does it take to get a market maker behind your Web3 project?
data.description: Exploring DWF Lab's role in Orderly's Stellar liquidity infrastructure

blocks.body:
>**Exploring DWF Lab's role in Orderly's Stellar liquidity infrastructure**

In DeFi, liquidity is king, and Orderly Network has rapidly ascended to become one of the largest liquidity sources in Web3. 

In just two years, we've become one of the largest liquidity sources in DeFi, providing institutional-grade liquidity across multiple chains. Our omnichain liquidity infrastructure ensures seamless, high-speed trading for perpetual assets, bringing DeFi a step closer to achieving a CEX-like trading experience with self-custody at its core.

One of the key partners driving our growth is DWF Labs, a new generation Web3 market maker whose expertise and resources have been instrumental in building our liquidity infrastructure.

Market makers play a crucial role in the Web3 ecosystem by **providing liquidity** to decentralized markets, supporting efficient asset trading, even in volatile conditions. For example, DWF Labs has positioned itself as a next-generation market maker, with deep expertise in Web3, playing a vital part in supporting Orderly Network's liquidity infrastructure. Their involvement helps promote stable trading environments by making it easier for buyers and sellers to complete transactions without large price fluctuations. This activity contributes to the overall health and accessibility of decentralized markets across multiple blockchain networks.

DWF Labs has carved a niche for itself as a premier market maker, supporting 35% of CoinMarketCap’s Top 1000 projects. Their experience in high-frequency trading and liquidity provision makes them the ideal partner for Orderly Network's infrastructure.

Now, we make it easy for anyone to build a perpDEX without worrying about where the liquidity comes from. We call it “permissionless building”  – the freedom to design a DEX to your liking .  

Ask Veeno, an experienced developer who built a DEX on Orderly, just how he wants it. Once launched, he's got access to more than 50+ markets listed on Orderly, powered by a robust network of market makers.

While our use case for market makers extends beyond traditional models—given our mission to facilitate omnichain trading across various venues and assets—projects looking to launch tokens can also benefit significantly from engaging a market maker. A reliable partner like DWF Labs can offer: 

- **Sufficient Liquidity**: Market makers provide liquidity to ensure that your token can be traded smoothly, even during periods of volatility. This reduces the risk of excessive price slippage, allowing users to buy and sell at prices that reflect actual market demand, fostering confidence and stability in your token.
- **Accurate Price Discovery**: By maintaining a consistent presence in the market, market makers help balance supply and demand, which facilitates the establishment of fair, transparent pricing. This reduces the risk of extreme volatility and ensures that your token's value reflects the broader market dynamics, contributing to a sustainable token economy.
- **CEX Listing & TGE Support**: Successfully navigating Centralized Exchange (CEX) listings and Token Generation Events (TGE) is complex but essential for long-term token success. Market makers like DWF Labs can guide you through these processes and provide needed insights and advisory to help ensure that you can focus on growth while navigating these critical milestones with confidence.

_**So what would a high-quality market maker look out for?**_

Several factors can determine whether your project captures a market maker’s interest. These factors may vary depending on individual MMs strategies, business model, or even risk appetite. While some of these variables may be outside your control, here are the non-negotiables that you can directly influence; 

- **Clear Product-Market Fit (PMF)**: Perhaps a no-brainer, but demonstrating that there’s demand for your project’s solution is crucial. A project should demonstrate that its product solves a genuine problem in the market.
- **A Strong, Experienced Team**: Let’s skip MMs for a sec –the entire Web3 industry is big on credibility. Market makers, like any major partner, want to see a team with the expertise and track record necessary to execute the project’s vision. It is absolutely vital that a strong, knowledgeable team is visible to both your community and any potential partners, including MMs. 
- **Well-Defined Roadmap**: Ideas don’t come out fully formed so while no roadmap is flawless, having a clear, transparent, and achievable plan builds confidence in your project’s long-term potential. A market maker needs to know that your project has a sustainable future. 

From experience having multiple high-quality MMs behind Orderly, we’ve seen firsthand how these are non-negotiable aspects for any market maker looking to invest its resources into a project.

As DWF Labs is one of our top liquidity providers, we had the opportunity to ask them a few key questions to gain insight into their decision-making process when working with Web3 projects:

**There are many Web3 projects springing up today. What main factors do you identify before working with a project?**

_At DWF Labs, we look for a combination of several factors before engaging with any Web3 project. Team quality is one of the most critical aspects—having a strong, experienced, and committed team is a key indicator of long-term success. We also examine project fundamentals, such as the technology, tokenomics, and overall market fit. Projects that address real-world problems and show the potential for mass adoption tend to stand out. Additionally, we consider community engagement and how actively the project interacts with and grows its user base. Finally, we assess the liquidity and market infrastructure, ensuring that it aligns with our capacity to provide support effectively._

**How does DWF Labs distinguish itself from other market makers?**

_DWF Labs stands out through its comprehensive approach that goes beyond traditional market-making. We combine market liquidity provision with strategic advisory services, funding support, and global partnerships to help projects grow sustainably. Unlike many market makers, we don’t just focus on liquidity for token trading; we aim to build long-term value by offering holistic ecosystem support._

- _**Personalised and comprehensive support**: we have a dedicated team providing 24/7 support. Leverage an extensive global network of partners, from legal and audit firms to industry experts._
- _**Amplify your reach**: projects can leverage our network of top-tier KOLs and expert PR providers to amplify your brand's visibility and accelerate growth._
- _**Be part of a collaborative growth hub** - we have a Growing ecosystem with over 700+ partners. Be seamlessly connected with needed expertise to accelerate growth._
- _**CEX Listing & TGE Advisory**: Projects can also access comprehensive listing support, introductions to the world's biggest CEXs and strategic advisory on enhancing your project appeal for pre and post TGE._

_We’re not just a market maker but also a collaborator and partner to our projects. We want to make sure that we are fully aligned and committed to the success of our partners._

**The cost of engaging a market maker isn’t cheap. How does DWF help promising projects access high-quality market-making services?**

_We recognize that many promising projects, especially early-stage ones, may face budget constraints when it comes to engaging market makers. We take a tailored approach, often investing directly in projects through token swaps or equity arrangements. This allows us to offer high-quality market-making services without placing excessive financial burden on the projects. By aligning our incentives with the success of the project, we create mutually beneficial partnerships that allow for scalable, long-term growth._

**Do market makers only trade through order books or do they also provide services to AMM projects?**

_Market makers like DWF Labs are not limited to order book trading on centralized exchanges. We also actively engage with Automated Market Makers (AMM) in decentralized finance (DeFi). In AMM systems, liquidity is provided through liquidity pools rather than traditional order books. We provide liquidity to these pools, facilitating efficient trading, reducing slippage, and helping DeFi ecosystems grow. This dual approach allows us to contribute to both centralized and decentralized markets, supporting a broad spectrum of blockchain projects._

**What made you trust Orderly’s security as it is counterparty risk?**

_Orderly Network has implemented robust security protocols and smart contract audits to ensure the safety of funds and transactions within its platform. At DWF Labs, we also conducted our own due diligence by reviewing Orderly’s technical infrastructure, which included verifying the integrity of their decentralized infrastructure and understanding their counterparty risk management processes. Their transparent approach to security and their focus on protecting user assets were key factors that made us confident in their security measures._

**Would you work with a non-doxxed team?**

_We typically prioritize working with teams that are transparent and publicly accountable, as this provides greater confidence in the project’s long-term viability. However, we understand that in the Web3 space, anonymity can sometimes be necessary for privacy reasons, especially when working with decentralized technologies. While we prefer working with doxxed teams, we are open to working with non-doxxed teams if they can provide other assurances, such as strong security audits, community backing, and proven track records in the industry._

**How can a team get in contact with you?**

_Teams interested in collaborating with DWF Labs can reach out to us directly via our website here. We’re also active across various social media platforms like Twitter and Telegram, where we engage with the Web3 community._

Securing a high-quality market maker can be the difference between success and stagnation for a project. DWF Labs brings unmatched value and expertise, guiding token life cycles by fostering strategic partnerships and supporting the broader ecosystem to ensure market readiness and long-term success.

As we continue to expand Orderly Network’s reach, partnering with such key players ensures we stay at the forefront of DeFi trading, unlocking long-term success for all Web3 projects we support.

data.title: Owning Your DEX isn’t Crazy Afterall!
data.description: Should you build your own DEX?

blocks.body:
In a market driven by speed and community influence, there is no better time to consider launching your own DEX than now. This is especially true if you are a top trader offering tailored strategies and crypto alphas to your loyal online community on the streets of crypto twitter.

While trading revenues offers an immediate incentive to launch your DEX, building your own DEX helps you unlock the true value of Web3 –community, decentralization, and autonomy. With DEXs capturing [a growing share of crypto trading volume](https://www.theblock.co/data/decentralized-finance/dex-non-custodial/dex-to-cex-spot-trade-volume), building your permissionless DEX is more than just following a growing trend; it is the future.

Enter Orderly Network, where permissionless building is not a luxury but a standard. You get access to cloud liquidity and an omnichain infrastructure designed for next-gen dApps, giving you the toolkit to build your own DEX without the traditional headaches.

Want proof? Check out how [Veeno leveraged Orderly’s infrastructure](https://orderly.network/blog/orderly-network-veenox-perps-trading/) to bring perps trading to life.

### Why Consider Building a DEX?

For starters, Orderly offers substantial revenue potential: builders have earned over $11 million in trading fees across 62+ markets listed on the platform. This speaks volumes about the income-generating power a DEX can bring, especially if you’re a seasoned trader with influence among fellow traders. Owning a DEX might be the next logical step—and it’s more accessible than you might think, characterized by;

**Simple, Fast Integration Process**

Orderly provides one of the fastest, most cost-efficient paths to building a DEX, allowing you to get up and running in just days. Following a clear integration checklist, you can start by selecting compatible tools from Orderly’s tech stack—options include APIs, Python connectors, TypeScript SDK, React Hooks, and pre-built UI components. Each tool comes with thorough documentation, code examples, and proof-of-concept (PoC) resources, making it easy to begin building without a steep learning curve.
