**Cost-Effective Customization**

As someone who understands your community’s trading preferences better than anyone, Orderly lets you craft a user experience that resonates with your audience. Our SDK allows you to integrate tools like TP/SL, real-time data feeds, and volume-based fee settings, providing advanced features without extensive technical demands, giving you complete control over how your DEX looks and operates. 

Upon launch, you instantly gain access to over 62+ listed markets backed by industry renowned market makers powering liquidity on Orderly.

Additionally, the DeFi market eclipsed $100 billion in locked value in Q2 2024 and currently maintains a sideways trend in the face of uncertainty surrounding the upcoming US general elections. However, [historical data](https://www.theblock.co/post/313188/bitcoin-price-trend-elections) suggests the crypto market tends to boom post-elections. Hence, building a DEX positions you right at the forefront of the next wave of DeFi users, alongside; 
- **Control Over Trading Dynamics**: A custom DEX lets you shape trading tools, fees, and liquidity rules to fit your strategies and community needs.
- **Revenue Potential**: Each transaction on your DEX translates into real earnings, particularly as you hold influence over a large community that trusts your judgment.
- **Strategic Flexibility**: You can readily offer unique assets, align with DeFi trends, or integrate new features, particularly without waiting for centralized approval.

### Pros and Cons of Launching Your DEX
Having given a hint into why building your own DEX isn’t such a crazy idea, here are some pros and cons of building your DEX.

**Pros:**
- **Community Loyalty & Growth**: Having a large online community that believes in your alphas could readily translate into huge trading volume on your DEX, helping you overcome one of the foremost challenges faced by new DEXs - user acquisition. All that's left is to build a solution that enhances the user experience, effectively converting followers into power users.
- **Custom Trading Ecosystem**: Use your DEX to showcase strategies and demonstrate mastery. You can include exclusive tokens, integrate AI agents, and offer custom strategies, showcasing how much you understand traders' pain points.
- **Scalable Revenue**: The more your community trades, the more revenue flows directly to your DEX. 

**Cons:**
- **Capital Requirements**: Running a DEX takes serious capital for liquidity, security, and tech. If not managed well, these costs can eat into profits, especially during low market activity.
- **User experience**: DEXs aren’t quite as sleek as CEXs yet. Sure, orderbook DEXs can come close, but getting that buttery-smooth trading experience takes work. A less-than-seamless UX could leave traders longing for the CEX feel they’re used to.
- **Liquidity Challenges**: Low liquidity is a classic DEX struggle. Keeping those orderbooks full and spreads tight isn’t easy. Without deep liquidity, order books thin out, and spreads widen, making trades less efficient.

Fortunately, that’s where we come in. We do the heavy lifting, you build.

### How Orderly Powers Permissionless Building
Orderly makes the complex simple. By providing cloud liquidity, any builder on Orderly gains access to a shared omnichain liquidity —a game-changer in permissionless building. Orderly offers robust infrastructure serving as the building block for next-gen dApps, and offering tools that allow anyone to build and deploy seamlessly.

Our infrastructure caters to native DeFi builders and traders looking to launch complex and modular products on an omnichain infrastructure that offers hyper-liquidity and CEX-like agility. This is made possible through our SDK solution and plug-and-play interface which simplifies integration and reduces building time. 

What's left? Build your DEX in no time and lead your community to partake in the next phase of DeFi evolution. Just look at how [Veenox](https://orderly.network/blog/orderly-network-veenox-perps-trading/) leveraged Orderly’s permissionless infrastructure, delivering perps trading with a team of three. The era of permissionless innovation is here, and Orderly is leading the charge.

Building a DEX doesn’t have to be a moonshot—Orderly Network makes it achievable, scalable, and, most importantly, **permissionless**. Why wait for someone else to define your trading landscape when you could define it yourself?

The future is permissionless, [build with Orderly today](https://orderly.network/docs/introduction/getting-started/what-is-orderly-network)!

data.title: $ORDER, esORDER & VALOR: Stack, Stake, and Burn!"
data.description: esORDER is Live!

blocks.body:
ICYMI, we just [announced a crucial update](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork/status/1855913401429696638) on issuing trading rewards, transitioning from issuing liquid $ORDER tokens to esORDER. This update is a response to community feedback and a strategic way to create a smaller supply and burn mechanism for $ORDER holders, further enhancing ecosystem stability.

To understand what’s happening, let’s break down how $ORDER, esORDER, and VALOR work together to support staking, earning, and Orderly’s broader deflationary economy.

### $ORDER: The Core Ecosystem Token
$ORDER is the primary token of the Orderly ecosystem. You can stake it directly to earn rewards, specifically by accruing VALOR, a rewards metric (not a token) that can be converted to USDC based on protocol treasury reserves.

Btw, 60% of Orderly’s net revenues are deposited into the treasury pool, reserved for VALOR holders.

**How it works**
![Untitled-2024-08-12-1131.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/Untitled_2024_08_12_1131_8c4dc8ba69.png)

When you stake $ORDER, you start earning VALOR, the metric that measures your stake's value over time. The amount of VALOR you accrue is directly proportional to the $ORDER you stake, representing your share of the overall treasury pool at that point in time.

### esORDER: The Reward Token
Think of esORDER as a temporary version of Orderly's main token, $ORDER. It's like getting a voucher that can later be turned into the real thing. esORDER is earned as rewards for trading or being a market maker on Orderly, but it’s not immediately the same as $ORDER.

Initially slated to take effect during epoch 10 of $ORDER staking, esORDER has now been rolled out as trading and MM rewards from epoch 7. The esORDER (escrowed ORDER token) replaces liquid $ORDER as rewards to traders and market makers (liquidity providers). This is to ensure price stability by limiting the emission of inflated $ORDER tokens.

**How it works**
![2 flow.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/2_flow_8b503dc417.png)

When you get esORDER, you have a choice: **either hold onto it until it unlocks** (called Vesting) and becomes $ORDER, or stake it to get all the same benefits as staking $ORDER.
Staking esORDER gets you VALOR (plugging you directly to the treasury pool and further increasing their rewards), just like staking $ORDER. 

Alternatively, you could also vest it over time to eventually redeem into $ORDER.

If you are eager to redeem esORDER for liquid $ORDER ahead of the full vesting period, you can do so after 15 days. However, only 50% of the reward will be redeemed, with the other 50% permanently burned. This burn reduces the total $ORDER supply, benefitting long-term holders.

### VALOR: The Value Metric of Orderly’s Treasury

![valor calc.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/valor_calc_83f7dd9646.png)

VALOR is not a tradable token. It is a value metric that accumulates as you stake $ORDER or esORDER, reflecting your contribution to the staking pool over time. As the protocol grows, so does the USDC treasury that backs VALOR, making it redeemable for USDC at the prevailing treasury valuation.

Whenever you redeem VALOR, the amount of VALOR tokens you redeem is burned, ensuring a deflationary circulating supply, making the remaining VALOR holdings more valuable. VALOR redemption requests are settled in USDC every 14 days. Regardless of when you submit a request, you receive USDC based on the final VALOR price for that period.

When you choose to delay your redemption, you continue to accrue VALOR, increasing your rewards potential and your weighted share of the treasury (depending on the overall stakes in the next reward epoch). See our simplified explanation about the benefit of delayed VALOR redemption at this link.

### esORDER and How It Helps the Ecosystem
The move to esORDER aims to reduce supply by limiting the immediate availability of reward tokens. By allowing rewards to be vested over time, esORDER reduces the risk of large sell-offs, giving long-term stakers greater value and creating a healthy, deflationary effect with burned tokens.

Here is a quick example:

Let’s say Sharon, an Orderly Network trader, has earned 200 esORDER. She has two options:
- **Stake esORDER and earn VALOR** (owning a share of the protocol treasury reward).
- **Vest esORDER** for a minimum of 15 days. After this period, she can claim half as $ORDER, while the other half will be permanently burned. If she vests for the full 90 days, she gets all 200 $ORDER without any burn.
- **By staking her esORDER trading rewards**, Sharon’s accrued VALOR can be redeemed for USDC based on her share of the treasury pool. Better still, she could delay her redemption, accruing more VALOR, and increasing her rewards over time. 
- **Increased VALOR accumulation** enables her to partake in protocol governance, and voting on future network developments.

### How These Tokens Work Together
![full flow.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/full_flow_5d341a8cae.png)

The $ORDER, esORDER, and VALOR trio form a mutually beneficial system:
- $ORDER: Stake it for the long-term, accrue VALOR, and enjoy USDC rewards and governance benefits.
- esORDER: Earn it as trading and MM rewards, stake to maximize benefits, or vest to convert into $ORDER.
- VALOR: Accrue over time, redeem for USDC based on protocol treasury reserves.

Epoch 7 is on! Earn your share of the 1.2m $ORDER reward pool, begin your staking journey here: [https://app.orderly.network/staking](https://app.orderly.network/staking)

Learn more [about esORDER here](https://orderly.network/docs/introduction/tokenomics/esorder)

data.title: Who is this team that just built something without permission on our permissionless liquidity layer?
data.description: VeenoX is live on Orderly Network!

blocks.body:
Who is this team that just built something on our permissionless liquidity layer without asking for permission?

One of the coolest things about blockchain is that anyone can simply show up and start building. Orderly is an L2 blockchain built using the OP stack, and we offer a set of powerful templates to easily design your own perp DEX.

Orderly is set to be one of the first infrastructure providers on an extremely hyped blockchain called Monad. Monad is a Layer 1 blockchain that boasts 10,000 transactions per second, 1-second block times, single-slot finality, and low hardware requirements.

It only makes sense to leverage the excitement around Monad. That’s where Veeno comes into play.

We noticed someone building in public, tweeting each step of their build process.

The thing is, we didn’t know anything about VEENO. So, we sat them down for a virtual coffee. For Veeno: **Who are you, and where are you building from?** I'm Novee from France, the Founder of VeenoX, a DeFi trading platform we’re currently developing. I have just over 4 years of experience in web3 development, and I’ve been trading for about 3 years. **Why did you decide to build in public?** As a dev and a member of the Monad community, I wanted to showcase what building an app looks like behind the scenes. It was my way of adding value to the growing Monad ecosystem. **Why did you choose to double down on Monad?** A few months ago, I was searching for promising projects, and Monad caught my eye because of the game-changing technology they’re bringing to the EVM world—10K TPS and async execution, which results in a much better user experience. After joining their community, I quickly saw how dedicated people were to the project. I wanted to contribute, and that’s how I decided to build something that could integrate Monad. **How many people are on your team?** The team currently consists of three people. I brought on two others I’ve worked with for several years. One leads the backend, and the other handles social and legal aspects for VeenoX. I couldn’t manage everything alone, so bringing in trustworthy, hardworking people was essential. **How long did it take to build your perp DEX?** It’s been a little over a month so far. The first challenge was designing VeenoX to resemble what you find on widely used centralized exchanges. Then, I had to implement all the trading logic using Orderly’s SDK. I was impressed by how easy it was to set up—the product is clearly designed by developers, for developers. **What was the hardest part of the build?**
If you want a trading platform, you need a clean and accurate chart. TradingView is the leader in charting, and it’s what we wanted for VeenoX. But integrating TradingView and customizing it to our needs was challenging, especially saving traders' indicators on refresh and setting up TP/SL or order lines accurately. **Any pro tips for someone looking to build with Orderly?** The first step is to explore the Orderly documentation and get a deep understanding of its modular architecture. Orderly handles the heavy lifting by providing all the infrastructure, so you don’t need to worry about backend servers or databases. Everything is built to be streamlined and developer-friendly. The hooks, in particular, are incredibly well-designed—they integrate seamlessly and work perfectly, allowing you to focus on building features without worrying about the infrastructure. This makes development much more efficient and scalable. **What’s in store for the future of VeenoX?** In addition to our perp DEX, we’re working hard on a major aspect of VeenoX: the Learn Trading & Earn program, which will bring a huge social element to the platform and revolutionize on-chain trading. We’re also developing a DEX & Bridge aggregator and our own highly flexible DEX, allowing us to deploy on Monad from day 1 and on any newly released EVM blockchain. Additionally, we’re exploring how to integrate a lending/borrowing protocol native to Monad.

data.title: What’s Next on Order at Orderly: Our Roadmap Update for 2024
data.description: Orderly Network Roadmap Update

blocks.body:
Since we first shared [our 2024 roadmap](https://orderly.network/blog/what-s-on-order-at-orderly-our-2024-roadmap-1/), we’ve made some serious moves, bringing DEXes more advanced trading features that rival centralized exchanges. While it sets a strong foundation, this updated version builds on it, introducing new features, integrating community feedback, and optimizing the overall trading experience on Orderly. Our mission to make Orderly Network the top cloud liquidity infra for Web3 trading is well underway, and this update is about keeping that momentum going. ![roadmap2.jpg](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/roadmap2_246d8ab009.jpg) ## The Orderly Unity Vision: Trade Anything, Trade Anywhere Our efforts all year long have centered on one clear-cut vision. We call it the **Orderly Unity** – a vision to deliver **cloud liquidity** that enables anyone to **trade anything, anywhere**. By **trading anything**, we mean; - Traders can trade **any token** and **any strategies** (i.e. you can be passive, and don’t have to actively manage your trading) - At the turn of the year, we had <10 markets listed. Now? 60 markets listed and counting. By **trading anywhere**, we mean; - Traders can access any DEX from any chain, and builders can seamlessly create DEXs plugged into Orderly’s cloud liquidity. - We’ve expanded from **one chain at the start of the year** to **six chains, with more coming soon**. We have stayed this course thus far, and our vision remains unchanged. We’re adding even more momentum as we look toward what’s next. ## What’s on the horizon🔭 for the rest of 2024 and Beyond. Firstly, we are not done shipping for the year👇🚀: ### Trade Anywhere🌐 Currently, Orderly is live on 6 major EVM chains, but the “trade anywhere" vision commands that we go beyond – so we are doing more. Here is what’s to come? **Non-EVM** - **Starting with Solana (Q4 2024)**: ICYMI, [Orderly is coming to Solana!](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork/status/1846909006604128579) Orderly will deploy on Solana, delivering a world’s first EVM and non-EVM perps trading infrastructure with users trading **within the same orderbook**. Aligned with the Orderly Unity vision, this deployment will enable Solana-based traders deposit assets on Orderly and trade against counterparts on all other Orderly-supported chains from a single, shared orderbook. Mind blowing right? This is just the beginning—next, we’ll support additional non-EVM chains, including emerging ecosystems like the MOVE-based chains. The Orderly Unity goal is to ensure that, regardless of your preferred network, Orderly provides a trading venue that delivers liquidity and a seamless trading experience. **More EVM & non-EVM chains support (Q4 and beyond):** - With new chains constantly emerging, we’ll be rolling out support for additional EVM chains this quarter, followed by more non-EVM chains support in the coming year, further enhancing cross-chain interoperability for our vaults. **$ORDER Staking benefits on Solana(H1 2025)**: With Orderly fully up and running on Solana, our focus will shift to bringing the benefits stakers already enjoy on EVM. This means users will be able to stake $ORDER on Solana and be able to claim staking rewards on the same chain or any other Orderly-supported chain. Did you know $ORDER stakers gain ownership of the Orderly treasury funded by 60% of Orderly's net revenue? [Learn more here](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork/status/1842127575273156648). ### Trade Anything➕ Every asset on one platform with permissionless listings and sufficient liquidity. We aim to attain this with the launch of Strategy vaults and Permissionless listing this quarter. **Strategy Vaults (Q4 2024)** Strategy Vaults empower traders by providing access to pre-designed trading strategies used by professional market makers. Users can choose to mirror these strategies, manage their own strategies, or even grow portfolios by managing assets on behalf of others. This feature eliminates the need for constant monitoring, offering a seamless way to capitalize on market expertise. Why? This will allow users to passively participate in the protocol, decentralize market-making strategies, and facilitate permissionless listings. Strategy vaults will be rolled out in stages: - Protocol Vault: Similar to HLP, this provides liquidity for the protocol. - Listing Vaults: Supports permissionless listings, boosting liquidity and funds. - Hedging Support: Improves risk management by integrating multiple hedging venues. - User-Mandated Vaults: Think of it as copy trading, with multiple permissionless strategies.
**Permissionless listings (Q4 2024)** We aim to provide fast and easy perp listings for projects, with no hidden fees, no hassle—just exceptional liquidity. How? - **Immediate**: Our listing program is live! Anyone can list anything once they meet our standards. Listing program also allows referrals from Investors and MMs for any project on their radar. See listing criteria here: [List perps on Orderly](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork/status/1844022518686097819) - **Permissionless listing liquidity vaults**: Supports permissionless listings, boosting liquidity and funds. (Strategy Vaults ++, 1H 2025) - **Self-service listing processes**: Auto-list anything that meets our criteria (project/user bootstrap funds, choose MM/MM algo, and gets listed) Going into the coming year, we will continue to iterate and build products in line with our “trade anything” goal. ## 2025 and Everything else⚡: Seamless Trading Experience, Governance, Builders With the “trade anywhere, trade anything” charge in full effect well into 2025, the coming year will also see the introduction of new features and improvements across the protocol with a focus on delivering the best trading venues in DeFi. **Improved trade experiences(2025):** - **Isolated Margin & Hedge Mode:** We’re rolling out Isolated Margin and Hedge Mode to fit different trading preferences. Isolated Margin lets you lock risk to single positions, while Hedge Mode gives you the freedom to go long and short on the same asset at once—perfect for hedging and leveling up your strategy. - **New Order Types(TWAP/Pegged Orders/Scaled Orders)**: We’re adding TWAP, Pegged Orders, and Scaled Orders to give traders more sophisticated tools for managing entries and exits, allowing for better position management. - **Higher Leverage for more symbols & Multi-collateral:** We’re cranking up leverage on more pairs for capital efficiency, giving you room to pull off bigger plays like basis trades. Plus, multi-collateral options mean you can use different assets to trade, giving you max flexibility. **$ORDER (2025)** Starting in 2025, Orderly Network will hand more control to its community through decentralized governance. $ORDER token holders will have the power to vote on key platform decisions, from new feature rollouts to policy updates. This shift ensures that the future direction of Orderly is shaped by its users, fostering a more engaged and empowered community. **Expect:** - Improved participation from community, important stakeholders, token holders - Governance on rewards, listings etc. **For builders(2025)** - **‘DEX-as-a-service’** – A no-code approach to DEX building, powered by the Orderly SDK. Someone with no coding experience can build DEX. - **Ongoing SDK support**: Expect frequent updates to our SDK to support multiple new features including BBOs Order, Funding Page, Position History, Strategy Vaults, Multi-collateral, Solana support, Bracket Orders, and a V2 Trading page. With all these in the works, we are ultimately giving developers even more flexibility to build on Orderly. - **Builder token utility:** We will continue supporting our partner ecosystems by expanding the utility of builder tokens. As always, we remain committed to pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in Web3 trading. Join us on this journey by following our updates and contributing to the discussion on our social channels!

data.title: Orderly Network & KODA: Unlocking the Future of DeFi in Korea
data.description: Orderly Network & KODA Partner to Boost Web3 Adoption in Korea

blocks.body:
Orderly Network has entered a strategic partnership with KODA, South Korea's leading cryptocurrency custodian. This alliance merges KODA’s stronghold in traditional finance with Orderly Network’s advanced omnichain cloud liquidity infrastructure, setting the stage for improved Web3 adoption in the Korean market.

### Bridging CeFi and DeFi for Korean Investors
Our partnership with KODA is a pivotal step toward making DeFi accessible and familiar to Korean investors. By combining Orderly’s cloud liquidity infrastructure with KODA’s established custody services, we are offering a gateway to DeFi with the trusted security and compliance standards investors rely on.

Orderly’s plug-and-play infrastructure combined with KODA’s secure custody means Korean investors can confidently explore DeFi, backed by a partner that navigates local regulations while upholding the highest asset protection standards.

With KODA’s reputation and Orderly’s infrastructure, we are lowering the entry barriers for Korean investors to experience the world of DeFi, characterized by:
- **Seamless Access to DeFi:** Korean investors gain simplified access to the growing benefits of DeFi within an interface similar to CEXes without compromising on security.
- **Compliance and Transparency:** Aligned with Korea’s regulatory landscape, this partnership provides a safe bridge between TradFi and the innovative world of DeFi.
- **Unified Liquidity and Tighter Spreads:** By consolidating liquidity across multiple chains, Orderly Network ensures a smooth trading experience with enhanced market depth.

Orderly Network’s infrastructure is built for the future of trading. As a cloud liquidity powerhouse, we aggregate orders across chains into a shared orderbook, converging liquidity while tightening spreads. The Orderly Chain, built on the OP Stack, facilitates perps trading on leading EVM and non-EVM chains including the Ethereum Mainnet, Polygon, Optimism, Base, Mantle, Arbitrum, Solana, and more.

KODA, founded by KB Kookmin Bank and Hashed, holds an impressive 80% market share in Korea’s crypto custody space. Led by CEO Jin-Seok Cho, KODA is committed to security, compliance, and a transparent custody model, aligning perfectly with our shared goal of advancing DeFi.

Ran Yi, CEO of Orderly Network, speaking on the strategic importance of this partnership said;,
> “We want to make it easier than ever for investors of all levels and backgrounds to reap the benefits of DeFi. We are excited to join forces with KODA to make this possible in Korea.”

Jin-Seok Cho, CEO of KODA, shared his enthusiasm by echoing Ran’s sentiment; he stated, 
>"Through our collaboration with the global leading firm, Orderly Network, we aim to play a leading role in ensuring that the domestic digital asset management market develops in a safe and transparent manner”

This partnership is just the beginning. With the fusion of our omnichain charge and KODA’s market expertise, we are setting the stage for widespread DeFi adoption in Korea. Together, we are creating a more accessible, secure, and compliant future for DeFi.

data.title: Trade Anything, Anywhere: Hassle-Free Perp Listings on Orderly
data.description: List perps for your token on Orderly!

blocks.body:
Orderly Network has been at the forefront of redefining perpetual listings, offering a seamless, permissionless, and transparent way for anyone to list perps for their token.

Now, with the launch of a **dedicated listings webpage** and **an all-new referral program**, Orderly makes it even easier to connect projects with top-tier liquidity while rewarding contributors who help expand our ecosystem.

Welcome to the simplest way to list perps in DeFi: Visit [orderly.network/listing](https://orderly.network/listing/)
![web image.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/web_image_9b9150821e.png)

### Why List Your Perps on Orderly?
Imagine instant access to **30+ omnichain DEXs**, with **no listing fees**, and **best top-of-book liquidity** in DeFi. By listing on Orderly, your token benefits from top-tier liquidity, robust infrastructure, and exposure to a thriving community of 300,000+ users. Plus, we offer customized campaigns to activate your community and amplify your brand.

Essentially, your project gets;
- **Omnichain Access**: Seamlessly connect to 30+ DEXs (like WOOFi Pro, LogX, VOOI, WHAT Exchange, etc) running on Orderly.
- **Massive Exposure**: Reach over 300,000+ users via our social media and ecosystem.
- **Community Activation**: Leverage tailored campaigns to grow your audience.

### Simple Steps to List Your Token
Getting started is easy! Follow these steps to list your perpetual markets on Orderly:
- **Submit Your Application**: Start by filling out a quick listing application. [link]
- **Verification and Review**: Our team will review your project to ensure all listing criteria are met.
- **Liquidity provider Integration**:- Have a liquidity provider? We’ll connect them to our network.
   - Need one? Choose from our network of industry-renowned [liquidity providers](https://orderly.network/blog/ecosystem-spotlight-wintermute-liquidity-provider-orderly-network/)
   - **Enjoy Added Benefits**: Unlock rebates, liquidity, and support from our KOL network.

### What Does It Take to List?
To maintain quality and liquidity for all tokens on the platform, listed projects must meet these listing criteria:
- **Price Oracle**: Your token must be listed on three or more centralized exchanges (e.g., Binance, OKX, Kucoin, etc).
- **Liquidity Provider**
   - Need to bring your own liquidity provider to provide liquidity for your your perp market on Orderly
   - Share the list of your token liquidity providers for Orderly integration status verification
- **Liquidity Requirements**:
   - **Depth**: Minimum $20K in both -2% and +2% depths.
   - **Levels**: At least 15 levels(legs) in both -2% and +2% depths.
   - **Spread**: ≤50 bps.
   - **Uptime**: ≥90%.
- **Market Capitalization**: A minimum FDV of $20M USD.

## Get Rewarded with Our Referral Bonus Program

Are you a builder, liquidity provider, KOL, or VC? Help onboard projects to Orderly and earn rewards for every successful referral!

**Earn a fixed bonus for every successful referral alongside 30% of a referred project’s marketing budget. See breakdown below:**
- **Fixed Bonus**: Earn $2,000 per successful referral.
- **Variable Bonus**: Receive 30% of the referred project’s marketing budget (up to $10,000).

**Example**: If a project allocates $10,000 for marketing, you’ll earn $2,000 (Fixed) plus $3,000 (Variable).

**Important⚠️: ALL of the marketing budget provided by the project will be distributed to users**

We have designed Orderly listings to empower projects with a seamless and transparent perps listing process, unparalleled liquidity, and visibility within a growing omnichain ecosystem.

[Get started with listing perps on Orderly today!](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSePE_Wl6SpIjREWyn-yfgiGHUIdUgiqCEScQJaBDPnLYBB6vg/viewform)

data.title: 2024 in ORDER: How We Built, Grew and Innovated Together
data.description: A year of innovating at the front of the industry

blocks.body:
_As we draw the curtain on 2024, we’re proud to celebrate another year of remarkable strides, meaningful partnerships, and continuous innovation at Orderly Network. From broadening our ecosystem across multiple chains to enhancing our product suite and community program, this year has been all about pushing boundaries—and breaking them—on the journey towards truly decentralized and accessible trading._

2024 was defined by expansion, both in terms of our technological footprint and the breadth of our community. We saw our user base and social presence flourish, ventured into new ecosystems like Solana and other major EVM-compatible networks, and secured new investments to fuel our vision. Through it all, we remained true to our core mission: empowering users to **trade anything, anywhere**, while providing secure infrastructure with deeper liquidity than ever before.

- **Key Milestones & Expansions**
  - Orderly Network on Solana
  - EVM Expansion Across Major Chains
  - New Investment Round Secures $5M+
- **Product Evolution & Token Utilities**
  - $ORDER Came to Life: TGE, Staking & Rewards
  - Permissionless Listing: Seamless, Transparent Perps Listings
  - Quantum Pools: Our first user-facing product
  - Oracle Integrations for Enhanced Pricing
  - Roadmap Update: Trade Anything, Anywhere
- **Community, Ecosystem & Industry Engagement**
  - AI meets DeFi: Orderly Network, Google Cloud & Empyreal AI Bounty Program
  - $175,000 Grand Prize in the Orderly WSOT Competition
  - Marquee Events & IRL Presence
- **Strength in Numbers, Growth & Milestones**
  - Growing Our Global Community & Socials
  - Community ReJig: Crafters, Mentors and Maxis
  - The Birth of Sir Otterly & Corporate Sponsorships

## Key Milestones & Expansions

### Orderly Network on Solana
![2.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/2_46b09bff5b.png)
A crowning jewel in our innovative pursuit all year round centered on delivering  [Orderly Network to Solana](https://orderly.network/blog/orderly-network-solana-perps-trading/) Mainnet. This technological leap –  **merging EVM and non-EVM orders to use the same orderbook for the first time ever** – is a gamechanger for DeFi.

Trading perps has never been more seamless and omnichain. And we’re just getting started.

### EVM Expansion Across Major Chains

In parallel, we continued to solidify our presence in the EVM space, integrating major ecosystems including Ethereum Mainnet, Base, Mantle, Avalanche, and Polygon. This expansion exemplified our big-picture goal to bring seamless perps trading to diverse communities in DeFi and ensure users can access Orderly’s stellar liquidity from wherever they choose to trade or build.

That’s right - developers benefited this year too. Our flexible SDKs and APIs have allowed for seamless integration into each of these chains, further solidifying our position as a liquidity backbone for DeFi.

### New Investment Round Secures $5M+
In a key financial milestone this year, Orderly Network secured over [$5M in new investments](https://orderly.network/blog/okx-ventures-and-leading-ventures-invest-5m-in-orderly-network-to-enhance-de-fi-liquidity/) led by OKX Ventures and other leading VCs. This capital injection echoed the growing belief in our vision to consolidate all of DeFi’s liquidity, enhance user experience and push product innovation on the grand scale.

This latest round of investment brings OKX and others in to join our catalogue of renowned VCs, investors, and partners with over 20+ years combined experience supporting Web3 startups. Having previously secured $20 million in seed round with industry titans like Pantera, Dragonfly Capital, and Laser Digital, we remain on course to usher in the future of Web3 trading.

## Product Evolution & Token Utilities

### $ORDER Came to Life: TGE, Staking & Trading Rewards
The introduction of the ORDER token in the year was a foundational moment for us. With the [ORDER TGE and subsequent staking mechanism](https://orderly.network/blog/orderly-network-staking-unstake-ORDER/) and [trading rewards](https://orderly.network/blog/orderly-network-ORDER-staking/), we ensured that long-term supporters and active traders could directly benefit from our growth. Through $ORDER, we have created a robust incentive structure, encouraging deeper community engagement and loyalty.

Rewarding $ORDER stakers with 60% of Orderly’s net trading fees since TGE, there has now been over 70 million ORDER staked with stakers enjoying rewards paid out in USDC. As of this writing, $ORDER stakers have earned almost $700k USDC since staking went live.

VALOR, the deflationary value metric accrued to ORDER stakers, will continue to appreciate with more burning events, thus boosting the USDC value of VALOR as the protocol treasury continues to increase.  

Get started with [$ORDER staking today](https://orderly.network/blog/stake-esORDER-valor-ORDER/)!

### Permissionless Listing

In late 2024, we introduced a frictionless, transparent listing experience that empowers any project to launch perpetual markets with ease. In a few steps, anyone can list perps for their token and gain access to top-tier liquidity, with no listing fees, and an expansive audience of 300,000+ users and 30+ omnichain DEXs. 

We also created an avenue for anyone (builders, VCs, investors, KOL, etc) to refer their favourite projects and earn, through our **Referral Bonus program**. You can now earn a minimum guaranteed **$2000** for every successful referral alongside up to 30% additional earnings. 

Get started with Orderly Listings today! [See full details here](https://orderly.network/blog/orderly-network-perps-listings)

### Quantum Pools Launch
This year we also introduced [Quantum Pools](https://orderly.network/blog/retail-market-making-elixir-orderly-quantum/)—our first user-facing product that reimagines liquidity provisioning for orderbook-based trading.

Built through our partnership with [Elixir Protocol](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork/status/1794008878793031763), Quantum Pools serve as an AMM-like tool for orderbooks, enabling users to act like professional market makers without the usual complexity. Early results were striking—within the first month, TVL surpassed $15 million across all asset pairs, signaling robust demand and trust from our community.

We’ve kept it simple - connect your wallet, deposit USDC, select your preferred pool, then you can earn **up to 10% APY** while reinforcing Orderly’s liquidity layer. This innovation represents our continued commitment to democratizing access to liquidity provisioning in DeFi.

See our [detailed guide](https://orderly.network/blog/retail-market-making-elixir-orderly-quantum/) to help you get started.

### Oracle Integrations for Enhanced Pricing

We also solidified our pricing infrastructure by integrating industry-leading oracles to ensure accurate, timely, and tamper-resistant data feeds. Most notably, we adopted [Chainlink Price Feeds](https://orderly.network/blog/orderly-chainlink-oracle-price-ORDER/) on Arbitrum to support ORDER, building on the trust and scale Chainlink has established as a premier, production-tested oracle solution.

Meanwhile, our integration with Pyth brought even more flexibility. By providing price feeds for tokens not yet listed on CEXs, Pyth enabled us to list new assets faster and broaden the variety of unique tokens in our ecosystem.

![6.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/6_2a7a8cff84.png)

With Chainlink and Pyth in place, we’ve equipped our platform and community with the essential data infrastructure they need to trade confidently, access deep liquidity and maintain market integrity—even under volatile conditions.

### Roadmap Update: Trade Anything, Anywhere
Our vision remains as audacious as ever. With the [2024 roadmap update](https://orderly.network/blog/orderly-network-roadmap-update/), we renewed our promise to enable secure and permissionless trading for any asset class, on any chain, that’s accessible from anywhere. This update not only outlined our short-term product pipeline but also reaffirmed our long-term commitment to a truly borderless trading ecosystem.

With the launch of Orderly on Solana Mainnet, our journey went into go-mode and this will continue well into the new year. Expect to see new order types, higher leverage for listed markets, decentralized governance for ORDER holders, builder-focused SDK improvements and further expansion to other emerging EVM and non-EVM ecosystems in DeFi. These and more are all in the pipeline for 2025.

## Community, Ecosystem & Industry Engagement
_2024 was the year our community truly flourished. Over 250k community members and 400k social followers joined our journey, reflecting a vibrant and supportive ecosystem. We expanded our regional footprint, investing in local outreach throughout Asia and beyond. We also launched a comprehensive community program that not only rewarded active participation but fostered a sense of shared purpose. And who could forget Sir Otterly, whose friendly visage now symbolizes our welcoming, forward-looking ethos?_

### AI meets DeFi: Orderly Network, Google Cloud & Empyreal AI Bounty Program
In collaboration with Google Cloud and Empyreal, we launched a unique [Bounty Program](https://orderly.network/blog/orderly-network-google-cloud-ai-bounty/) to inspire the next generation of builders, innovators, and researchers. This initiative bridged cutting-edge AI resources and DeFi infrastructure, fostering a vibrant ecosystem of experimentation and growth.

A vibrant ecosystem isn’t built in isolation. Our collaboration with Google Cloud and Empyreal, as highlighted in the Bounty Program, provided incentives for developers, analysts, and researchers to explore novel use cases at the intersection of DeFi and AI. This open call to innovators spurred new predictive models for liquidity provisioning, advanced trading algorithms leveraging machine learning, and improved forecasting tools. By bringing in fresh talent and encouraging cross-disciplinary experimentation, we enriched the network’s intellectual capital, fostering a community that thrives on curiosity and continuous improvement.

### $175,000 Grand Prize in the Orderly WSOT Competition

Our commitment to incentivizing talent and fostering healthy competition was on full display during the [Orderly WSOT Competition](https://orderly.network/blog/orderly-wsot-winners-round-up/), where top traders vied for a **$175,000 grand prize**. 

The 4-week long competition featured 12 industry-renowned traders on the 𝕏 platform, each engaging in a grand-prix style points battle across various Orderly-powered DEXs. The trading venues—WOOFi Pro, IBX, LogX Pro, VOOI, and OXMarkets—hosted the intense competition, with each trader starting out with a collateral of $10,000.

Beyond the headline-grabbing rewards, the event served as a live stress test for our platform’s performance under intense trading conditions. The result? Seamless execution, best top of book liquidity, and a showcase of our infrastructure’s capacity to handle real-time pressures.

WSOT 2024 was certainly a hit on all fronts, introducing new users to our platform’s capabilities, and bringing the community closer through friendly rivalry bets on [Shuffle](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork/status/1813170667384381469).

Once again, congratulations to our 2024 winners: [@lbattlerhino](https://x.com/lBattleRhino), [@gametheorizing](https://x.com/gametheorizing), [@statsdart](https://twitter.com/satsdart')

### Global Events

2024 also saw Orderly Network making its mark on the world stage. We engaged with industry leaders and the broader crypto community at major events around the globe such as [Token2049](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork/status/1838171605580849378), [Korea Blockchain Week (KBW)](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork/status/1831248908405846119), [DevCon BKK, and Taipei Blockchain Week (TBW).

Our Co-Founder Ran Yi, had a busy year of thought leadership on stage at these events this year, given a platform to share the Orderly vision as well as his [insights on DeFi’s evolution for 2025](https://cointelegraph.com/news/five-defi-predictions-for-2025). Speaking recently on institutional adoption for DeFi, he said the following, which remains as true as ever:

>“We’ve already seen the first institutions begin trading and participating in DeFi activities this year, but so far it’s been a trickle rather than a flood – and for the most part their crypto exposure remains limited to ETFs.

>But that’s going to change next year and we know that because the infrastructure to support a surge of adoption has been getting rolled out all through 2024.”
## Growth Metrics & Milestones

Our growth has been nothing short of remarkable since the turn of the year, recording new highs by every single metric;
- From **< 10 markets listed**  at the turn of the year  to **81 markets** and counting
- **Builders**: < 10 DEXs running on Orderly. Now , 34 builders and counting
- **Cumulative volume**: **< $1 billion** to soon cross the **$90 billion mark**, while ranking in the [top 5 spot on DeFillama](https://defillama.com/derivatives) for $1B+ in daily trading volume numerous times during the year.

300K+ Unique wallets, $8 million+ in revenue (with 60% of that going to ORDER stakers), and $19 million in TVL – all recorded in 2024. With more DEXs coming onboard and further chain expansion, we are only beginning to scratch the surface and we are enthusiastic for the coming year.

### Growing Our Global Community & Socials

By year’s end, our community will have now exceeded 250k+ passionate members, a testament to our community-centric approach . Regional expansion into Türkiye, China, Korea, and beyond ensured that our vision resonated in languages, cultural contexts, and trading communities unique to each market. 

On social media, we surpassed 400k+ followers, strengthened by “Out of Order,” our fun biweekly Spaces series on X that distills numerous industry news into tangible alphas. Strategic partnerships in Asia, including alliances with VLS and KODA, have also served as gateways to informed user bases, enhancing local traders and developers’ interest in DeFi.

### A New Community ReJig: Crafters, Mentors and Maxis
We reignited our community and took engagements to new heights, offering new, rewarding and event-driven roles open to all in the Orderly community.

With over **44,000 $ORDER tokens** up for grabs every month, we redesigned our community to reward the Orderly faithfuls and passionate individuals within our community, spreading our gospel across CT and beyond.

Now, anyone can take up a role (crafters, mentors, and maxis) within the Orderly community and work their way up to the very top cadre attainable – **Knights of the Order**, alongside a whooping **10,000 ORDER tokens** to be bagged up.

With new excitement injected into our community via the Orderly community program, we have  transformed passive users into active stakeholders, making the community an essential pillar of Orderly Network’s evolution, every step of the way..

The Orderly Community Program isn’t time bound. Join the Orderly Community today to get started. [Read more here](https://orderly.network/blog/orderly-network-community-program/) 

### The Birth of Sir Otterly
In a year defined by innovation and growth, we also found room for playful creativity via the introduction of Sir Otterly, the bravest, cutest, best-trading otter in the DeFi sphere. Orderly > Otterly. You get it!

Sir Otterly has since acquired his own [dedicated playground on X](https://x.com/OtterlyFans) and on the back of our community’s support for this furry hero, we also decided to sponsor the [International Otter Survival Foundation](https://orderly.network/blog/orderly-network-iosf-corporate-sponsorship/) (IOSF) as our way of saying thank you.

## Looking Ahead into 2025

While we’re proud of our progress, we’re not slowing down. Our updated roadmap focuses on the mantra **“Trade Anything, Anywhere,”** to push the boundaries of permissionless listings, expand our liquidity infrastructure, and continue to abstract away unnecessary complication from the user. As the industry and markets evolve, we’re committed to staying adaptive, user-centric and forward-thinking.

The coming year ahead will bring new product features, more EVM and non-EVM expansions, enhanced trading functionalities, and more partnerships. We remain dedicated to lowering barriers, raising standards, breaking boundaries and ensuring that our ecosystem remains at the vanguard of Web3. 

Soon, everyone will be on Orderly. Happy festive celebrations to you! 🎉

data.title: Orderly Network Expands to Avalanche: Enhancing Cross-Chain Liquidity for Traders and Builders
data.description: Orderly Network Live on AVAX!

blocks.body:
Orderly Network has a clear vision: "Trade Anything, Anywhere.”

With each new chain we integrate, this vision becomes more than a tagline—it's a commitment to transforming the trading experience for DeFi traders and builders. Today, that journey takes another leap forward with Orderly Network’s launch on Avalanche. This marks the latest in Orderly’s omnichain expansion, bringing the speed and efficiency of Avalanche into Orderly’s growing cloud liquidity ecosystem.

Orderly Network’s arrival on Avalanche empowers traders with streamlined access to Orderly’s cloud liquidity. From Ethereum to Solana, Polygon to Mantle, and now Avalanche, Orderly Network continues to break down the barriers of DeFi, creating a seamless experience for both EVM and non-EVM traders.

### Why Avalanche?

Avalanche has earned its reputation as one of the fastest and most scalable blockchain platforms, achieving transaction finality in under two seconds and handling over 4,500 transactions per second. Its unique consensus mechanism offers security and energy efficiency, making it a perfect fit for high-frequency trading and DeFi solutions.
 
Avalanche’s architecture aligns perfectly with Orderly’s goals of facilitating omnichain DeFi trading on any venue with unbridled access to deep liquidity.

### A Unified Liquidity Experience
At the core of Orderly Network’s cloud liquidity infrastructure is a unique, shared orderbook that unites liquidity across multiple blockchains. For Avalanche users, this means access to deeper liquidity, tighter spreads, and a shared trading experience across major EVM and non-EVM chains.

Orderly’s infrastructure pulls orders from all supported chains into a single, unified orderbook. This creates a highly liquid environment where orders are matched across networks, enabling traders to execute positions at the most competitive prices available. This unified approach benefits traders by increasing the efficiency of trades while reducing the risk and complexity of moving assets across chains.

### For Traders: Gasless, CEX-like, and Liquid
Avalanche traders can now experience the benefits of Orderly’s shared orderbook and robust liquidity. With the ability to trade across major chains like Polygon, Arbitrum, Optimism, and Ethereum, Avalanche traders can now enjoy a CEX-like trading experience but with the autonomy of DEXs . For traders, this means fewer instances of slippage, faster trade execution, and a smoother trading experience. 

The Orderly Chain, built on the OP Stack and leveraging Celestia’s data availability, serves as a secure settlement layer across all Orderly-supported networks. This setup is particularly advantageous for traders who prioritize low-latency, high-performance trading—a standard that’s core to Avalanche’s architecture.

### For Builders: The Infrastructure to Innovate
Orderly’s expansion isn’t just for traders; it’s fast morphing into a hub for DeFi innovation, too. Orderly Network's infrastructure is designed with builders in mind, providing the tools needed to develop powerful and modular DEXs with ease. Builders can leverage Orderly’s modular and composable infra to build sophisticated perpDEXs, all while bypassing the complexities of handling cross-chain assets and liquidity hurdles.

Orderly Network eliminates the need for traditional cross-chain bridging, mitigating the risks associated with wrapped assets. Builders can create DEXs that plug directly into Orderly's liquidity and perps infrastructure, enabling faster and more fluid user experiences. The result is a smoother, and permissionless building process for builders on Avalanche.

Orderly Network is bringing its vision of Trade Anything, Anywhere to life by expanding DeFi trading across chains. With liquidity flowing freely, we are creating a dynamic, interoperable network that unlocks new opportunities in DeFi.

Say GM to Orderly Network on Avalanche!

data.title: PR Feature: Orderly Network Facilitates Solana Users to Trade Without Limits in Combined EVM Super-Ecosystem
data.description: Live on Mainnet!

blocks.body: _**NEW YORK, Monday 2 December 2024, 13:00 UTC:**_ Orderly Network has launched its perps omnichain orderbook on Solana mainnet. The deployment enables Solana users to experience omnichain DeFi trading for the 1st time, with over 30 DEXs and 73 trading perps.

Orderly’s mainnet Solana launch marks the first time EVM and non-EVM orders have been combined into a single perps orderbook. Positioned in DeFi, Orderly is officially the first to integrate this two-chain super-ecosystem that totals over half a trillion dollars in market capitalization. Each respective chain’s token assets can now be leveraged directly for trading, without requiring bridging, wrapping, or side steps.

Despite robust spot trading volumes on Solana, the perps trading landscape must be served. Perps volume lags proportionally to that recorded on the leading EVM networks, with poor liquidity having been a significant impediment to broader adoption. 

Orderly is a fully chain-agnostic solution that allows users to trade liquid perpetual swap markets in real time. Any time a trade is executed on Solana, Orderly’s engine layer routes the trade via the orderbook, where it is matched and then relayed to the settlement layer. 


>For the first time, via Orderly, Solana users can connect seamlessly to trade memecoin perpetuals directly with EVM-focused participants across more than 30 integrated DEXes. All without the need for unnecessary complications like bridging or wrapping. This is how we unlock deep liquidity across all chains while increasing the bar for user experience and trading efficiency at speed. This is what we mean when we say we want anyone to be able to trade anything, anywhere, **says Ran Yi, Co-Founder of Orderly Network**.

>The mainnet launch of Orderly on Solana is a milestone in delivering a true omnichain experience for perps traders and adds a missing piece of the puzzle in connecting Solana’s onchain landscape with EVM networks via a single unified orderbook. With Orderly now live on Solana, projects, developers, and traders can tap into a DeFi primitive that will power a broad range of dApps fueled by deep liquidity.

Deployed across major EVM chains, including Arbitrum, Base, Mantle, Ethereum Mainnet, Optimism, Polygon, and Solana, Orderly provides traders and DEXs with access to over 70 markets. Its deployment on the Solana mainnet will enable Solana traders to deposit assets and trade against counterparts on all Orderly-supported chains for the first time.

### About Orderly Network

Orderly Network is a permissionless liquidity layer for Web3 trading. Built on omnichain infrastructure, Orderly enables deep liquidity for any asset across multiple blockchains. Focused on a future of DeFi that’s open to all, Orderly empowers developers to fluidly create a comprehensive array of financial products for any level of trader, without the risks of wrapped asset movement through cross-chain bridging.

data.title: Unlock Elite Algorithmic Trading
data.description: Start Earning with Orderly OmniVault Today

blocks.body:
Let’s face it: this market has been brutal. Is it a bull? Is it a bear? Whales are manipulating prices, and even politics feels chaotic.

Before you throw in the towel on trading, imagine letting elite algorithmic market makers—the pinnacle of crypto traders—manage your funds. These traders place servers closer to exchange data centers just to shave milliseconds off execution times. While we analyze hourly charts, they trade in fractions of a second. Bull or bear, they profit consistently.

With Orderly OmniVault, this elite strategy becomes yours.
Simply deposit USDC from any supported blockchain—yes, it’s omnichain—and instantly become a liquidity provider to these expert traders.

Our debut vault, powered by Kronos Ventures, is just the beginning. Soon, multiple top-tier market makers will compete head-to-head, optimizing your returns.

Not only does OmniVault grant you access to strategies once reserved for institutions, but it also strengthens Orderly’s order books. More liquidity means tighter slippage, better trading experiences, and increased revenue—which translates directly into higher staking rewards. (Remember: 60% of Orderly’s fees go to stakers.)

And now, up to 40% of the remaining fees will be allocated to liquidity providers in our OmniVault. That’s in addition to the yield the vault already generates.

In short: OmniVault improves our liquidity, unlocks elite trading strategies for you, and boosts staking rewards.

Ready to level up your trading?
Explore OmniVault now: https://app.orderly.network/vaults

data.title: Orderly x Binance Web3 Wallet Campaign: Step-by-Step Guide
data.description: BinanceWeb3 x Orderly Network Campaign! Over 2 million $ORDER up for grabs!

blocks.body:
Get ready to participate in the exciting Orderly x Binance Web3 Wallet campaign and grab your share of 2 MILLION + $ORDER tokens! Scheduled to run from 11th Dec. – 25th Dec.,  2024, the campaign features 3 main tasks – 
- **Social Task (300,000 $ORDER, Lucky Draw):** Begin your journey in the campaign by completing simple social media tasks and qualify for a lucky draw to win your share of 300,000 $ORDER tokens. 

- **Staking Task (1,000,000 $ORDER, Lucky Draw):** Take a step further to earn a share of 1 MILLION $ORDER tokens evenly distributed to qualified users. Stake at least 100 $ORDER tokens on Orderly and automatically qualify to grab a share of the pie in a lucky draw.
 ** Important⚠️: Participants must stake a minimum of 100 ORDER tokens to be eligible for the rewards**

- **Transaction Task (723,390 $ORDER, Lucky Draw):** Round up with a trading experience on WOOFi Pro (powered by Orderly). Connect your Binance Web3 Wallet to WOOFi Pro and make a minimum transaction of $100 to grab a share of the over 700,000 + ORDER tokens, distributed randomly amongst all qualified participants in a lucky draw.

**Important⚠️: Participants must complete a minimum transaction of $100 to be eligible for the rewards.**

This step-by-step guide aims to help you complete all 3 tasks effortlessly.   

## 1. Social Tasks (300,000 $ORDER in Rewards)
**Complete these tasks to qualify for the social rewards:**

**1.1 Follow Orderly Network’s Official Twitter Accounts**
- Orderly Official ([https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork))  
- Orderly CN Official ([https://x.com/OrderlyCN_](https://x.com/OrderlyCN_))
- Binance Web3 Official ([https://x.com/web3withbinance](https://x.com/web3withbinance))

**1.2 Retweet the Campaign Tweet:**
- Locate the official campaign tweet from Orderly’s Twitter account.  
- Click the “Retweet” button and select “Quote Tweet” or “Retweet.”  

**Congratulations! You just completed the first task of the campaign.**

## 2. Staking Task (1,000,000 $ORDER in Rewards)
**To begin, you need to swap your assets for ORDER on [WOOFi Swap](https://fi.woo.org/swap/?chainId0=42161&token0=0x2f2a2543B76A4166549F7aaB2e75Bef0aefC5B0f) via Binance Wallet.**


**<u>Step-by-step guide:</u>**

### 2.1. Set Up Binance Web3 Wallet (If Not Already Done)
-Download the [Binance App](https://www.binance.com/en/download?pageType=normal). Tap **[Wallets]**, Switch to **[Web3]**. Create or import your wallet
![1.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/1_d85de500dc.png)

### 2.2 Add assets into your Wallet. Deposit ETH and USDC on Arbirtrum [_*Ensure you have sufficient gas fees in the respective network’s native token (e.g., ETH for Ethereum)_]

-Click **[Receive]**, select **[ETH Arbitrum One]** Oneselect **[Transfer]** search, and select your preferred chain option.
![2.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/2_4b201a779b.png)

-Enter the deposit amount. Click **[Withdraw]**, **[Go to Web3]**. Confirm ETH deposit on Arbitrum
![3.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/3_4a5467526c.png)

### 2.3 Swap ETH for ORDER tokens on Arbitrum [Be sure to swap more than 100 ORDER worth of ETH]. 
-Visit [WOOFi Swap](https://fi.woo.org/swap/?chainId0=42161&token0=0x2f2a2543B76A4166549F7aaB2e75Bef0aefC5B0f) via the Binance Web3 Wallet. Select **[Discover]** >> search and select **[WOOFi]** >> **[Open dApp]** >> **[Connect Wallet]** and select **[Binance Web3 Wallet]**.
![4.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/4_706600323d.png)

-Enter the amount of ETH you have to swap for $ORDER tokens. Click [Swap] >>[Confirm Swap] >> and [Confirm (the transaction)]. (⚠️Ensure you have sufficient ETH for gas fees)
![5.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/5_3e009b45f7.png)

-**Congratulations! Navigate to your wallet to see your  ORDER token.** 
![6.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/6_f5901754f0.png)
![7.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/7_b849874bfb.png)

### 2.4 Stake $ORDER
-Navigate to the **Orderly Staking App**: [https://app.orderly.network/staking](https://app.orderly.network/staking)


-Connect your Binance Web3 Wallet. Click **[Connect]** and select **[Binance]**
![8.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/8_0fec482dde.png)


-Follow the on-screen prompt to your Binance Web3 Wallet, select **[Arbitrum]** >> click **[Continue]** >> click **[Connect]** 


-Once connected, switch back to the **Orderly Staking App**. Follow the steps as seen in the image below to **stake** and **unstake $ORDER**

**_Reminder⚠️: A minimum stake amount of 100 ORDER tokens is required to be  eligible for the rewards_**
![10.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/10_e2e880ee88.png)

Need more? See full ORDER staking guide [here](https://orderly.network/blog/orderly-network-staking-unstake-ORDER/)

Congratulations! You have successfully completed your Staking Task

## 3. Transaction Task (723,390 $ORDER in Rewards)
Complete a transaction worth **at least $100** on the Orderly platform using Binance Web3 Wallet.
**One-page guide:**
![11.jpg](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/11_1f86078d5c.jpg)

**<u>Step-by-step guide:</u>**

To begin this task, navigate to WOOFi Pro once again and connect your Binance Web3 Wallet:  (Click [WOOFi Pro](https://dex.woo.org/en/trade/ORDER_PERP))

### 3.1. Connect Binance Web3 Wallet to the WOOFi Pro
-Click [Connect Wallet] and select [Binance]
![12.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/12_3fa55b981e.png)
-Navigate to the Binance App and select preferred network, click [Continue]. Click  [Connect]
![13.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/13_f072048d75.png)

### 3.2 Sign in and Enable Trading to create your Orderly account on WOOFI Pro

-Switch back to WOOFi Pro. Click [Enable Trading] and click [Open] to visit the Binance Web3 Wallet once again
![14.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/14_30518ccac1.png)
-Sign the transaction (free) in your Binance Web3 wallet and switch back to WOOFi Pro to begin your trading experience.
![15.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/15_b7006a4f9f.png)

### 3.3 Deposit your asset on WOOFi Pro. (Note: Orderly only supports USDC collateral. Be sure to hold USDC in your Binance Web3 Wallet or swap your ETH for USDC on WOOFi Pro )

-Click the banner at the bottom of the screen. Click [Deposit] and select [Arbitrum]. Open your Binance App and confirm switch to Arbitrum. 
![16.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/16_6660b4a68b.png)

-Navigate to WOOFi and enter your deposit amount. Click **[Deposit]** >> **[Confirm to Swap]**. Open Binance Web3 Wallet to [Confirm _(the transaction)_]
![17.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/17_a84b2b79bf.png)
**[Note⚠️: if you are depositing ETH, ensure you have sufficient funds to pay swap fees]**

-Switch back to WOOFi Pro >> review swap details >> click [OK]
![18.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/18_62509cbdf2.png)
**-Congratulations! Refresh the page browser and confirm USDC deposit**
![19.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/19_2f6e11c0c5.png)

### 3.4 Trade on WOOFi Pro. Reminder⚠️: A minimum transaction of $100 is required to be  eligible for the rewards

-Select the asset you want to trade (e.g., **ORDER-PERP**) from the list of available options. Execute a transaction worth **atleast $100** with your preferred size and leverage
![20.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/20_5bb02cc257.png)

**-Congratulations! You have successfully completed your Transaction Task.**

### 3. 5 You can also withdraw your assets back to your Binance Wallet
-Click [Withdraw], enter your withdrawal amount and click [Withdraw]. Sign the transaction in your Binance Web3 Wallet to confirm the transaction.
![21.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/21_00dfb3b85a.png)

**-Congratulations! Refresh your browser and switch back to your wallet to confirm your withdrawal**
![22.png](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/22_d2e18fa050.png)

## FAQs
1. How do I know if I’ve completed the tasks correctly? 
You can check the status of your submissions on the event’s landing page. Task completion will show a confirmation message. 
 
2. What is the Binance Web3 Wallet, and how do I get it?*
The Binance Web3 Wallet is a wallet that supports multi-chain transactions. Download it from the [official Binance website](https://www.binance.com/en/download?pageType=normal). 
 
3. Which blockchains are supported for staking $ORDER?
The campaign supports staking on these blockchains: 
- Arbitrum 
- Ethereum 
- Polygon 
- Optimism 
- Base 
 
4. Can I use other wallets besides Binance Web3 Wallet for this campaign?
No, all tasks must be completed using the Binance Web3 Wallet to qualify for rewards. 
 
5. When will the rewards be distributed? 
Rewards will be distributed within 14 days after the campaign ends (by December 25, 2024). 
 
6. What happens if I don’t complete all the tasks?
You will only be eligible for rewards from the tasks you successfully complete. 
 
7. Is there a limit to the number of participants? 
No. All rewards will be distributed randomly among all eligible participants in a lucky draw format.  

8.  I’m having trouble connecting my Binance Web3 Wallet. What should I do?
Ensure your wallet app is installed correctly, and you’ve approved all necessary permissions. 
 
9. What if my transaction fails?
 Check your wallet balance, ensure you have enough gas tokens for fees, and retry.

data.title: ORDERLY OMNIVAULT: HOW-TO-GUIDE
data.description: A guide to earning passive yield with OmniVault.

blocks.body:
We're thrilled to introduce [OmniVault](https://app.orderly.network/vaults) — Orderly's first-ever strategy vault product designed for users 🎉 With OmniVault, users can unlock high, passive yields on their assets effortlessly. Powered by advanced market-making strategies from Kronos Research, OmniVault offers an exciting opportunity to earn attractive returns — all while maintaining a smart, risk-managed approach to liquidity provision.

Here’s how you can earn yield. Head to Orderly OmniVault and connect your wallet. You can choose from the list of supported networks (arbitrum, base, optimism & more to come!) one of the perks of our cross-chain strategy vault. 

![available on.jpg](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/available_on_138e2fed7d.jpg)

Next, input the USDC amount you wish to deposit and click on ‘Deposit’. There is a 48 hour lock-up duration. 
![deposit.jpg](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/deposit_288b3e03e0.jpg)

The deposit process will require approval from your wallet. Kindly select ‘Approve’ to proceed with the confirmation. Congratulations, you will start to earn yield once the next vault period begins!
![approve.jpg](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/approve_ff1e00c857.jpg)

Kindly select the ‘My performance’ tab which will be updated within 3 hours and track your shares through ‘My shares’. You may select ‘My fund history’ to view your past transactions.
![my shares.jpg](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/my_shares_b67507caa9.jpg)

To withdraw, input the share amount you would like to withdraw and simply click on ‘Withdraw’. You can choose from the list of supported networks and it will be withdrawn from a single unified cross-chain strategy vault regardless of which blockchain network you have deposited from. 
![withdraw.jpg](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/withdraw_63651826c2.jpg)

Kindly take note that at this step the network you have submitted your withdrawal request from will be the same network from which you will claim your redeemed USDC. 

Once processed, withdrawals will appear under the ‘Latest withdrawal request’ section. Withdrawals may take up to 6 hours to process, actual claim time may vary. 
![Frame 1.jpg](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/Frame_1_e10e522bed.jpg)

To claim, toggle over the network icon to select the respective networks. Once selected, you may view your claimable amount on the respective network.
![rewards1.jpg](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/rewards1_b7511f731f.jpg)

Click on the ‘Claim’ button once withdrawals are ready and you’re done!
![claim.jpg](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/claim_dad203265d.jpg)


Disclaimer: Participation in the Orderly OmniVault does not constitute an offer of securities or a solicitation of investment. This product is not registered with any financial regulatory authority and is not subject to the same investor protections as traditional financial products. Yield generation is not guaranteed and may vary depending on market conditions and strategy performance. Participants should independently assess their risk tolerance and consult with legal or financial advisors before using this product.

data.title: Raydium just launched perps powered by Orderly!
data.description: The Solana behemoth - Raydium, has just launched perps, powered by Orderly!

blocks.body:
Raydium has over 8.4 million active users, including more than 600,000 daily active traders. It’s a powerhouse on Solana. Their main offering is spot trading. Now, through Orderly, they will be offering web3’s favorite product—perps!

This is a huge deal for the Solana ecosystem. Currently, Jupiter Exchange is the leading perp platform on Solana. It’s not just a leader on Solana; it’s also the second most-used on-chain perp protocol in all of crypto. However, they only offer three trading pairs. Now, the Solana giant Raydium will offer over 80 trading pairs, backed by our industry-leading top-of-book liquidity—the liquidity where most trades happen.

This is massive for Orderly. Not only does it bring greater awareness to Orderly, but it will also drive significant trading volume to our platform. This creates a flywheel effect—boosting liquidity for everyone, increasing trading volume, generating more fees, and ultimately leading to higher staking rewards and more reasons to hold $ORDER.

Orderly Network Co-Founder Ran Yi said: _“Raydium’s integration with Orderly Network is a game-changer for Solana’s DeFi ecosystem. Combining Raydium’s best-in-class UI and battle-tested protocol with Orderly’s omnichain liquidity infrastructure will enable deeper liquidity and more dynamic trading options. This collaboration is a significant step forward in bringing advanced perpetual trading solutions to the Solana blockchain and creating new markets for traders.”_

More liquidity. More volume. More rewards. Raydium is raising the bar for perps on Solana—and Orderly is at the heart of it.

$ORDER staking is now live on Solana
Solana users now earn trading rewards

What’s Next

We’re just getting started.

data.title: Buy Backs are LIVE
data.description: The next phase of Orderly’s token economy is officially live.

blocks.body:
The Next Phase of Orderly’s Token Economy Is Live

Following community approval, the revenue-backed ORDER buyback system has now been fully activated across the protocol.

Every two weeks, up to 60% of Orderly’s net fees will be used to buy back $ORDER via TWAP, creating consistent, programmatic demand that directly ties protocol revenue to token value.

How It Works

Buybacks occur on a recurring basis, using revenue generated over the previous two weeks.

50% of purchased $ORDER is distributed to stakers as esORDER (3-month linear vesting).

50% goes to the community-governed wallet, where future votes will decide how it’s used — whether for burning, liquidity, or incentives.

This structure ensures protocol success translates directly into token support and community value.

Staking and VALOR

The transition to esORDER-based staking is complete.
The old USDC reward system has been retired, and the VALOR mechanism has evolved in parallel.

After the current epoch concludes, both the old and new VALOR systems will operate simultaneously for a limited period.
Redeeming old VALOR 1.0 for USDC does not affect a user’s holdings in VALOR 2.0, which will continue to accrue esORDER rewards independently of USDC claims.

To protect the interests of current holders:

Each user’s VALOR 1.0 allocation is mirrored 1:1 in the new system.

Example: if you previously held 1% of VALOR 1.0, you’ll automatically begin with 1% of VALOR 2.0.

The USDC treasury from the previous system remains claimable for stakers who haven’t yet withdrawn.

Together, these changes make staking leaner, more aligned, and directly connected to Orderly’s growth.

Why It Matters

This upgrade transforms how value flows through the ecosystem:

$ORDER demand grows through continuous buybacks

Stakers earn yield tied to protocol performance

The community gains governance over a growing treasury of $ORDER

It’s a self-sustaining loop — where every trade, fee, and market activity reinforces the ecosystem’s foundation.

The Road Ahead

The first buyback cycle has already begun, marking a major milestone in Orderly’s evolution toward a more sustainable, community-driven model.

Future governance proposals will decide how the community wallet’s $ORDER is deployed — giving token holders a direct voice in how value circulates within the ecosystem.

ORDER now grows with the protocol.
Buybacks are live. The loop is complete.

data.title: Multi-Collateral Margin Is Here
data.description: Trade Anything, Fund with USDC, USDT or ETH

blocks.body:
# TL;DR

You can now use **USDT and ETH as margin** on Orderly perps.

USDC is still the **settlement token**, but you no longer need to swap into it just to trade.

This is a **core feature on CEXs** — and Orderly is one of the first **on-chain orderbooks** to bring it to DeFi.

It wasn’t easy to build — risk models, oracles, liquidations, real-time price feeds — but we’ve done it.

**The result:** more flexibility, fewer forced swaps, and capital that actually works.

---

## The Problem: One Token to Rule (and Limit) You

Most on-chain perp protocols force you to deposit a single token — usually USDC. That means:

- You waste time and fees swapping your ETH or USDT.  
- Capital sits idle or gets stranded in the wrong wallet.  
- In volatile moments, you’re forced to sell your core holdings just to stay in the game.

CEXs solved this years ago.  
DeFi hasn’t — because doing it safely, on-chain, with real oracles and auto-risk management is hard.  
**Orderly just changed that.**

---

## How It Works: Real Multi-Collateral Margin

You can now deposit **ETH or USDT** as collateral to trade perps.

Behind the scenes, Orderly applies a dynamic, risk-adjusted **Loan-to-Value (LTV)** model to keep your account safe.

**LTV =** your negative USDC + unrealized losses  
divided by your adjusted collateral value (including collateral weight + PnL)

Your collateral is adjusted by a **weight**, based on volatility and position size:

| Collateral | Base Weight | Discount Factor |
|------------|-------------|------------------|
| USDT       | 0.95        | 0.0000015        |
| ETH        | 0.80        | 0.000007         |

The bigger your position, the more discounted your collateral becomes — a safeguard to prevent overexposure.

> 💡 **LTV must stay under 95%.**  
> If it goes higher or your USDC balance drops below -$11,000, we auto-convert a slice of your collateral into USDC.

| Collateral | Auto-Conversion Fee |
|------------|---------------------|
| USDT       | 0.025%              |
| ETH        | 3.5%                |

You can **manually rebalance** your margin mix anytime — for free.

---

## What You Can Do Now

✅ Deposit **USDT or ETH** into your margin account  
✅ Trade perps without touching USDC  
✅ Watch your **account health** in real-time  
✅ Rebalance your margin manually (no fees)  
✅ Only get auto-swapped if your LTV becomes unsafe

Your **PnL and funding fees still settle in USDC**, but now your margin can come from the assets you already hold.

---

## Example: Use ETH to Run a Delta-Neutral Strategy

With multi-collateral margin now live, you can use **ETH as collateral** to run a **delta-neutral basis trade** — a classic strategy used to farm funding yield without taking price exposure.

Here’s how:

1. **Deposit ETH** into your Orderly margin account.  
2. **Short ETH-PERP** with the same notional size as your ETH margin.  
3. You’re now **delta-neutral** — long spot ETH (held as margin), short ETH perps.  
4. Manage your margin manually as needed.

No swaps. No idle capital. Just efficient funding farming — now natively supported.

---

## What This Unlocks

- **Faster onboarding** → No need to pre-swap into USDC  
- **Flexible capital** → Use the tokens you already hold  
- **Better risk tooling** → Live account health, isolated margin, auto-rebalancing  
- **Deeper liquidity** → Lower friction → More volume → Tighter spreads

---

## Try It Now

You can use multi-collateral margin **today** on any DEX powered by Orderly:

✅ [WOOFi](https://pro.woofi.com/)  
✅ + Dozens more across EVM.

Deposit ETH or USDT.  
Open a position.  
Track one unified health score.  
**Trade like it’s 2025.**

---

## Final Word

This isn’t just a new feature — it’s a new default.

Orderly just brought **multi-collateral margin to DeFi** — fully on-chain, with real-time oracles, dynamic risk weights, and shared orderbook liquidity.

You’ve got capital.  
**Now it works harder.**
