data.title: Orderly One
data.description: Introducing Orderly ONE

blocks.body:
# There’s an Easier Way

Introducing **Orderly ONE**, the first no-code platform to launch a perpetual DEX in seconds. Yes, literally seconds.

Orderly has always been a pioneer in perp infrastructure. We started with our SDK to make it simple for developers to spin up a DEX. At first, it took 2 to 3 weeks. We refined it, and soon most teams could launch in just 2 days.

But we wanted to go further. Imagine if anyone, with zero coding skills, could launch their own exchange. Think Shopify for trading platforms.

![orderlyone-aden (1).jpg](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/orderlyone_aden_1_e620d33963.jpg)

Picture this: a large trading community tired of feeding fees to CEXs for a few affiliate dollars. Instead, they could own the entire platform, keep all the revenue, control the user experience, and grow their own brand.

Our devs have been working tirelessly, and they’ve cracked it. Not just in theory. It’s been tested extensively for months. You’ve probably seen **ADEN**, doing over $500M in daily trading volume. That’s an Orderly ONE DEX, launched by Korea’s top trading influencer, Inbum. We also have **Noot DEX**, **LOL DEX**, and **Dexless**, who have already launched using Orderly ONE.

###### [Launch your own Perp DEX now](https://dex.orderly.network/)
---

## How It Works for Builders, Token Holders, and Traders

Launching a perp DEX with **Orderly ONE** is free. But to get a broker code, the key to earning revenue, you’ll need to pay just **$1,000** or get a **25% discount** when paying in **$ORDER**.

Every new DEX launch adds **$1,000 in demand pressure for $ORDER**, boosts Orderly’s revenue (fueling more buybacks), and increases liquidity as more traders join the ecosystem.

Orderly ONE isn’t just a product. It’s a new way to **own, operate, and profit** from your own trading platform without writing a single line of code.

![orderlyone-aden-1 (1).jpg](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/orderlyone_aden_1_1_6f6c2075bc.jpg)

---

## Why Choose Orderly ONE?

### Best-in-class liquidity
Shared order books are maintained by top institutional market makers, professional traders, and retail users across the globe.

### Professional-grade security
We work with renowned auditing and cybersecurity firms to protect smart contracts, backed by 24/7 monitoring.

### CeFi-grade performance
<200 ms latency for high-frequency trading, combined with self-custody, onchain orders, full transparency, and all the benefits of DeFi.

### AI customization
Use AI to completely personalize your perp DEX, from layout to colors, for a one-of-a-kind look.

---

## Who It’s For

### Trading communities
Stop shilling referral links. Launch your own DEX and **capture 100% of your community’s trading fees**.  
Set your own fee structure: premium rates for profit or zero fees for loyalty.

### DeFi protocols
Add perpetuals to your protocol without months of development.  
Deploy in minutes with a white-label DEX. **Your brand, your fees, institutional-grade infrastructure.**

### Meme projects
Give your meme token **real utility**.  
Launch a community perp DEX, use trading fees for token buybacks, and reward holders with better trading terms.  
Turn hype into revenue.

### Everyone
Why trade on someone else’s exchange?  
Launch your own in minutes. **Set your fees, customize the experience, and trade without limits. Your exchange, your rules.**

Start here now: https://dex.orderly.network/

blocks.body:
Welcome to the only trading competition where winning could mean a crate of Monster, a Zyn addiction, or a hunting bow you probably shouldn’t own.

This isn’t about safety. It’s about speed, size, and surviving liquidation.

---

## 📅 Campaign Dates

**June 2nd – June 30**

Starts 1PM UTC. Ends 1PM UTC


4 Weekly Rounds of total degeneracy.

---

## 🎯 How to Win

Every week, **5 traders win prizes** — based on volume, randomness, and recklessness:

| 🥇 Top 3 by Volume | Trade the most during the round |

# Turn Your Posts Into Protocol Revenue  
**The Orderly x Kaito Leaderboard is live. Here’s how to climb it.**

Ever scroll Crypto Twitter and think, *“That could be me”*?

Now it can be—if you’re ready to create, not just consume.

The **Orderly x Kaito Leaderboard** isn’t a contest. It’s a system.  
One that rewards smart creators with real protocol revenue—month after month.

---

## 🎯 The Premise  
Post sharp content about Orderly.  
Climb the leaderboard.  
Earn a cut of **10% of all Orderly trading fees**, paid in $ORDER.

It’s not a prize pool. It’s a flywheel:

→ Fees come in as $USDC  
→ We buy $ORDER  
→ Top Yappers split the rewards

The more you grow our mindshare, the more we grow protocol volume—and the more you earn.

---

## 🧠 What Is the Kaito Leaderboard?

Kaito tracks who’s actually shaping the crypto conversation.  
It doesn’t count followers. It counts *impact*.

Posts are scored on:

- Insight  
- Relevance  
- Originality  
- ...and a few secret Kaito ingredients

Smart memes? Yes. Lazy co-posts? No.

Quality > quantity. Always.

---

## 💸 What You Can Earn

- **Top 25 Yappers** each month split 10% of Orderly’s perp trading fees (converted to $ORDER)  
- **Top 100** get fast-tracked into our Crafters Program (150,000 $ORDER/month)

No applications. No forms. Just results.

---

## 🧾 How It’s Scored

Kaito’s algo values:

- **Relevance** – Are you actually talking about Orderly?  
- **Originality** – No copy-paste champions here.  
- **Engagement Quality** – Thoughtful replies > empty likes  
- **Consistency** – One thread won’t carry you forever.

---

## 💡 Why It Matters

Orderly isn’t just another protocol—  
It’s the infrastructure behind 50+ DEXs, including WOOFi, Raydium, Coin98, and more.

It’s cleared over **$105B in volume**.

And now, it’s channeling part of that into creator rewards.  
Not from inflation. Not from marketing.  
From actual protocol usage.

This is the **first leaderboard** tied directly to onchain trading revenue.

---

## TL;DR:

- Join the Cantina  
- Post about Orderly  
- Watch the leaderboard  
- Hit Top 25  
- Get paid in $ORDER

Yap smart. Climb the feed. Claim the fees.

**Leaderboard →** [https://yaps.kaito.ai/orderly](https://yaps.kaito.ai/orderly)  
**Community →** [https://discord.gg/cantina](https://discord.gg/cantina)

data.title: ✦ From the Community, For the Community
data.description: Meet the Orderly Ambassadors.

blocks.body:
✦ **From the Community, For the Community**

# Meet the Orderly Ambassadors, the Champions Shaping Our DeFi Universe

In the Orderly ecosystem, leadership isn’t assigned — it’s discovered.

Every trader, builder, and creator who contributes to our growth helps shape what comes next.  
Our Ambassadors began just like many of you: curious, consistent, and passionate about building something bigger than themselves.

The strongest ecosystems don’t recruit from outside; they cultivate their champions from within.

Orderly Ambassadors are those champions — trusted community leaders who amplify, educate, and connect, transforming everyday engagement into collective growth.  
Because here, titles don’t define contribution — actions do.

Anyone in our community who consistently shares insights, supports others, and builds value can grow into this role.

The path to becoming an Ambassador is open to everyone who chooses to build with Orderly.  
They’ve shared alpha, spotlighted milestones, broken down features, and amplified Orderly’s innovations when no one asked them to — because they believe in what we’re building together.

These are the ones who didn’t wait for permission. They showed up, provided value, and earned their place at the core of Orderly.  
Each represents what it means to build Orderly, together.

As Head of Community and Ecosystem at Orderly Network (@52kskew), I’m proud to stand alongside our first Ambassadors — proof that leadership in this space begins with contribution.

Together, we are the voices and faces of Orderly.

---

## ⚔️ Meet the Ambassadors

---

## 👑 Social Ambassador — **@WreckedCapital**

> “Aden Dex was Born on @OrderlyNetwork… They used Orderly One… Aden became so extremely successful, doing 10 billion volume per week! Generating millions in fees… acquired by @Gate… YOU CAN STILL TRADE ON ORDERLY FROM ADEN. $ORDER…”

Wrecked doesn’t just post — he forensically maps the future.  
From vault autopsies (OmniVault: 0.26 percent max drawdown vs. HLP’s 5.68 percent) to multi chain collateral breakdowns, his threads have become the alpha feed for serious traders — and a blueprint for authentic contribution.

He was the first to flag 1,200 plus Orderly One deployments, reverse engineer pre launch volume, and drop meme charts that turned “choose your perps founder” into a community sport.

His work isn’t just content — it’s on chain intelligence infrastructure, showing how knowledge sharing builds the foundation for future leaders.

### **Wrecked’s Journey into Crypto and Orderly**

“I first dipped my toes into crypto during the madness of 2017 — what started as curiosity turned into an eight year, multi cycle obsession. My early days were spent deep in the NEO community, later Vechain and WOO, but ultimately, all roads led me to Orderly.

I’ve been around since Pre TGE and have pushed over 400 million in trading volume through my referral links across WOOFi Pro, VOOI, and other Orderly powered DEXs.

What keeps me here isn’t just the products — it’s the people.  
Orderly feels like home. It’s a rare ecosystem that doesn’t shy away from hard truths or feedback but embraces them. The tech is world class, the mission is clear, and the community? Unmatched.

And that’s the power of Orderly — if you’re consistent, curious, and community minded, there’s always room to grow here. Everyone has a chance to contribute, to build, and to lead.”

---

## 👑 Community Ambassador — **@sanamsaraff (S Squared)**

> “Orderly OmniVault just crossed 1,000,000 in realized PnL. Not paper gains. Real yield, on chain. Twenty four percent APY. Zero performance fees. Institution grade yield, generated by @KronosResearch and powered by @OrderlyNetwork. An on chain Wall Street moment!”

S Squared doesn’t just manage the community — he engineers onboarding at scale and proves that great leadership begins with helping others succeed.

From spotlighting OmniVault milestones (1M plus realized PnL) to builder flywheel breakdowns (“$ORDER staking = 42.7 percent APR from real fees, paid in USDC”), his posts have become a roadmap for newcomers wanting to find their place in the ecosystem.

He champions Orderly One as “the Shopify of Perpetuals” and proves it by hyping 1,100 plus DEX launches, sharing staking insights, and bridging TradFi degens to on chain liquidity through RWAs like NAS100 (10M plus volume in 24 hours).

### **S Squared’s Journey into Crypto and Orderly**

“My crypto story started in early 2021 — not through hype, but in a warehouse full of ETH miners, chasing how value moves on chain. Mining turned into P2P trading, then yield farming, and eventually an all in commitment to crypto after battling banking friction.

I stumbled onto Orderly in late 2023, initially chasing airdrops, but what made me stay was the vision — a true omnichain infrastructure for traders and builders.

The ‘AWS of Web3’ concept clicked. Everything about it — the execution, speed, and transparency — felt different, like it could redefine the perp DEX game.

From there, I went from user → core contributor → moderator → ambassador.

Along the way, I built an analytics suite that tracks protocol metrics, staking stats, trading rewards, vault data, and DEX metrics — all in one dashboard.

Orderly became more than a platform; it became a place where builders, traders, and creators all have room to grow.

And that’s what makes it special — anyone can build their way up here.  
Whether you’re sharing data insights, creating content, helping others in Discord, or building tools, every contribution counts.

I started as a participant, and now I help shape the very community that welcomed me.  
That’s the beauty of Orderly — your effort is noticed, and your consistency can turn opportunity into leadership.”

---

✦ **Your Journey Starts Here**

You don’t need a title to make an impact at Orderly.  
Every chart shared, question answered, or insight posted strengthens the ecosystem.

Whether you’re trading, creating, teaching, or building, your actions move Orderly forward.

Our Ambassadors began as community members just like you.  
Consistency, collaboration, and curiosity built their paths — and yours could be next.

Join discussions, build relationships, share your ideas, and watch your impact grow.  
At Orderly, community isn’t a department — it’s the foundation.

---

## 🪩 Why It Matters

Every Ambassador strengthens Orderly by connecting traders, creators, and builders across DeFi.  
They are the heartbeat between the community and the core — uniting every product, every voice, and every region into a single ecosystem that scales together.

This isn’t a title.  
It’s recognition of impact, trust, and consistency.

And for anyone contributing within our ecosystem, it’s a reminder that the next Ambassador could be you.

---

## 🚀 Want to Become One?

Keep showing up.  
Keep creating value.  
Keep building with us.

That’s where every Ambassador’s story begins — and where the next one will too.

Tag a friend who embodies the Orderly spirit.  
Let’s keep building — one post, one trade, one connection at a time.

Because every action shapes the future of Orderly — and the next great Ambassador might be you. 🌐

data.title: We Sponsored Sir Otterly’s Frens at the IOSF 🦦🎗️
data.description: Because Otters Deserve to Thrive—Both in Water and DeFi!

blocks.body:
At Orderly Network, we don’t just move orderbook trading across chains; we’re moving hearts too. You may have seen our beloved mascot, Sir Otterly, popping up in your 𝕏 feed. Well, we're excited to announce that we're taking our love for otters from the blockchain to the real world. 

We've officially partnered with the [International Otter Survival Fund (IOSF)](https://otter.org/) to help protect otters worldwide. 

By sponsoring the IOSF we are:

- Saving the world’s otters
- Stopping the otter trade
- Educating the next generation

Yes, you read that right—Orderly Network is going full otter mode! 🦦

### Why Otters?

Why tf did we choose an otter as our mascot? Let’s break it down:

- **Ferocity Level: Jason Bourne** 🕶️ - Otters are secretly some of the most badass creatures on the planet. If you think sharks are tough, imagine an otter taking down a venomous snake, and then chilling out like nothing happened (did this ever happen? we plead the fifth). True story: one otter even took a chunk out of our intern during a cold dip in Cape Town. 
- **Liquid Legends** 🌊 - Otters are masters of the liquidity game, literally. They can close their nostrils while swimming, just like we keep things(spreads) tight with our liquidity infrastructure. Plus, they’ve evolved to grow a nifty little pocket under their arms to store tools—just like we’re evolving DeFi to smash through market inefficiencies.
- **Resilient and Innovative** 🛠️ - Otters are the "OG DeFi natives", always adapting and evolving to tackle new challenges. Whether it’s smashing crabs or smashing trading inefficiencies, otters (and Orderly) are always ahead of the game.

Now, we’re taking our otter love one step further by supporting the people who help these furry ninjas thrive in the wild.

### Enter the IOSF: The Ultimate Otter Guardians

The International Otter Survival Fund (IOSF) has been working tirelessly since 1993 to make sure otters don’t just survive but thrive. Based out of the Scottish wilderness on the Isle of Skye, they’ve treated over 250 injured otters and cubs, and supported conservation projects in 103 countries across the globe.. 

But their work isn’t just about treating otters like cute, fluffy patients. They’re also deeply involved in education, research, and training. They've organized 9 workshops in Asia, Africa and South America, as well as 2 conferences in the UK on _**Otter Toxicology**_ and the _**European Otter in Europe**_, spreading the otter love far and wide. 🗺️🌍

### Why We're Getting Involved

At Orderly, we like to do cool stuff. So when we heard that the IOSF would let us join them in saving some Sir Otterly frens, we jumped at the chance to sponsor the heroes protecting our Otterly beloved mascot in real life. And just like you can’t get enough of Sir Otterly and his [“raunchy” antics on 𝕏](https://x.com/OtterlyFans/status/1810209088980050010), we couldn’t resist the opportunity to make a splash by helping out with IOSF’s incredible work.

### Otters & Orderly: A Raunchy DeFi Affair

We know, otters and DeFi might seem like an odd couple at first glance. But think about it—both are adaptable, innovative, and not afraid to dive into deep waters to get things done. At Orderly, we believe in a future where financial systems (and ecosystems) are fair, open, and thriving for everyone. That’s why we’re stoked to be supporting the IOSF in their mission to protect otters, the OG liquidity gliders of nature.

Catch up with all Sir Otterly updates here: [https://x.com/OtterlyFans](https://x.com/OtterlyFans)

### What’s Next? More Otter Love!

We’ll be sharing more updates on our partnership with IOSF and how you, our community, can get involved. Stay tuned for some epic otter content (we’re talking photos, stories, and maybe even a few more memes).

Here’s to more DeFi innovation, more otter rescues, and a whole lot more Sir Otterly adventures. 💪🦦

data.title: Orderly Integrates with Ceffu
data.description: Orderly Integrates with Ceffu

blocks.body:
**✦ A Major Step Forward for Institutional DeFi Liquidity**

# **Orderly Integrates with Ceffu to Unlock Multi-Venue Liquidity**

Orderly has officially integrated with **@CeffuGlobal**, enabling professional market makers to deploy OmniVault capital across both **Orderly** and **Binance**. This marks a major step in unifying CeFi and DeFi liquidity through secure, off-exchange settlement.

## **🚀 Unlocking Multi-Venue Liquidity**

OmniVault depositors can now access a wider range of trading and yield opportunities across both ecosystems.

With Ceffu’s institutional-grade custody and Orderly’s composable DeFi infrastructure, strategy providers can seamlessly deploy and rebalance capital with precision.

### **✦ Key Benefits**

✦ **Expanded yield opportunities**
Vault capital can participate in strategies across Orderly and Binance, unlocking more PnL potential while remaining secured under Ceffu’s verifiable custody.

✦ **Enhanced market efficiency**
Strategy providers can hedge directly on Binance, tightening spreads and deepening liquidity on Orderly’s perpetual markets.

✦ **Real-time, gasless capital mobility**
Funds rebalance instantly across venues, removing the friction of bridging, delays, or manual transfers.

This elevates OmniVault into a **true multi-venue liquidity layer** for institutional-grade DeFi.

## **⚙️ How It Works**

The Ceffu–Orderly integration allows **Kronos**, the OmniVault manager, to deploy and manage capital across both Binance and Orderly using Ceffu’s off-exchange settlement infrastructure.

✦ **Assets remain fully secured** within Ceffu’s custody environment
✦ **Execution and settlement occur seamlessly** across venues
✦ **Capital allocation and hedging strategies update in real time**
✦ **All activity stays within Ceffu’s governance and security framework**

This creates a unified and efficient workflow for institutional strategy providers.

## **🌉 Bridging CeFi and DeFi Liquidity**

> **Ian Loh, CEO of Ceffu**
> “This integration highlights Ceffu’s role as the secure foundation for institutional capital deployment. Our MirrorX solution enables efficient cross-venue access while maintaining the highest standards of governance and asset protection.”

> **Ran Yi, Co-founder of Orderly Network**
> “Integrating with Ceffu unlocks true cross-venue capital composability. Strategy providers can now tap into opportunities across both Orderly and Binance, enabling higher vault PnL, deeper liquidity, and better execution. This is a major step toward bringing CeFi-grade performance to DeFi.”

## **🔭 Looking Ahead**

Ceffu’s partnership with Orderly reflects a shared vision: merging CeFi’s deep liquidity and infrastructure with DeFi’s composability to build a seamless institutional ecosystem.

Through OmniVault and Orderly, capital becomes **dynamic**, **composable**, and **secure**, empowering strategy providers to operate across venues with unmatched efficiency.

data.title: PR Feature: Orderly Network Launches AI Bounty Program with Google Cloud and Empyreal to Power the Future of Web3 Trading
data.description: Empowering Web3: Orderly, Google Cloud & Empyreal Launch AI Bounty

blocks.body:
**SINGAPORE, 21:30, Tuesday 17 September 2024:**. Web3 liquidity layer Orderly Network has announced a bounty program hosted in conjunction with Google Cloud and Empyreal. The campaign will reward developers building AI agents to trade autonomously on Orderly. 

A step forward in uniting the powers of AI and DeFi, the bounty program will support Orderly’s goal of developing the first onchain derivatives platform capable of supporting AI agents. The creation of these agents by independent developers will enable automated transactions that make use of the latest advancements in AI and web3 technology.

Full details of the bounty program will be released at TOKEN2049 in Singapore on September 18-19. The program will commence immediately afterwards and is expected to run for several weeks. During this time, developers who enroll in the program and successfully create and deploy AI agents on Orderly will be eligible to receive a share of the prize pool. Each agent will be evaluated on participation across two categories - highest profitability and most innovative predictor - and if they meet the requirements, can qualify for prizes in both.

AI agents developed for use on Orderly are expected to be geared towards sophisticated traders initially and for developers seeking to create advanced trading applications. Orderly will subsequently support the development of AI agents that can be used by intermediate traders who will be able to participate in derivatives trading with no coding knowledge required.

Orderly Network uses Google Cloud technology  to underpin its  user-centric developer tools designed to lower the barriers to entry in DeFi space. Orderly Network’s efforts focus on developing off-chain components of DeFi infrastructure, addressing critical challenges related to self-custody and transparency.

The AI bounty program is the next step in this collaboration. Leveraging Google Cloud’s understanding of the web3 sector and advanced AI technologies, the initiative aims to onboard web2 developers to participate in the program, with the transition to web3 development being made easy by campaign partner Empyreal, who is providing their SDK. 

Arjun Arora, Orderly Network COO said: 
>“It’s been a year since Orderly Network and Google Cloud began the collaboration, focused on driving the mainstream adoption of DeFi. Looking ahead, we believe that AI innovation will be pivotal in revolutionizing on-chain trading. Orderly’s bounty program empowers AI developers to create groundbreaking tools that will redefine the on-chain experience. This initiative invites both Web2 and Web3 developers to build autonomous agents utilizing diverse data sources, bridging the gap between today’s potential and the future of DeFi.”

Rishi Ramchandani, Head of Web3 APAC, Google Cloud said:  
>“Our work with Orderly builds on our mission to empower Web3 developers with secure cloud and AI technology to scale their applications. We look forward to welcoming more developers to build AI agents using our technology.” 

Johnny, Founder and Lead Developer, Empyreal said:  
>“We’re excited for our SDK to be featured in this program with Orderly and Google Cloud. This will allow our trading kits to fuel new bots and AI agents, giving devs and traders a simpler process for deploying effective agents. Orderly is the ideal location for our SDK to be used for building the future of AI trading.”

AI agents are gaining traction within the crypto space but the technology is still in its infancy. Such agents specialize in automating tasks and interacting with multiple data sources, allowing traders to make more informed decisions. They have particular potential in the field of perps trading, where multiple data sources must be queried in order to make optimal decisions based on rapidly changing market conditions.

In addition to derivatives markets, AI agents have potential within such crypto sectors as prediction markets, staking, gaming, and DeFi. AI agents can retrieve data from on and offchain sources and use this information to execute transactions for payments, trading, cross-chain transfers, and much more.

The collaborative bounty program will incentivize developers to demonstrate their creativity and will pave the way for further innovations that empower traders to make smarter decisions while reducing information overload. In the process, they will form the backbone of an advanced derivatives trading framework on Orderly’s scalable web3 network and unlock new use cases that leverage the power of AI.

### About Orderly Network

Orderly Network is a cloud liquidity infrastructure designed to revolutionize web3 trading. Built on omnichain architecture, Orderly enables deep liquidity for any asset across multiple blockchains. Focused on a future of DeFi that’s open to all, Orderly empowers traders and developers alike.

Learn more at [orderly.network](https://orderly.network/)	

For PR enquiries related to this release, please contact pr@orderly.network

data.title: Human UX and Agent-Native Infrastructure
data.description: The future of perp infrastructure is agent-native markets.

blocks.body:
The future of perp infrastructure isn’t just “better UX for human traders.”

It’s agent-native markets.

Over the next few years, AI agents won’t be a novelty. They’ll be a major class of market participants:

• trading & market making
• portfolio construction & rebalancing
• risk management & hedging

These agents won't care about front-ends and dashboards, they simply care about:

• APIs
• reliability
• latency

That’s why the most valuable exchange infrastructure will look less like an app and more like a programmable economic substrate. Orderly was built in that direction from day one.

1. We don’t have a “single” frontend.
2. We’ve always been API & SDK first.
3. We’re designed for builders.

This provides us a structural advantage for an agent-driven world where AI agents plug into infrastructure, not interfaces.
Think about what agent ecosystems will require:

• programmatic order execution
• risk + margin primitives
• deep liquidity access
• strategy automation
• composable integrations

On top of Orderly enabling these, it also allows for agents to create and operate their own DEXs, earning fees and building their own self-sustained businesses.

Humans will still trade, but the marginal volume + sophistication will increasingly come from autonomous systems operating 24/7.

Where do agents go to trade perps at scale? They’ll choose the most programmable, composable, reliable infra.

Our bet is simple. We’re not just building the infrastructure layer for humans to create perps. We’re building an autonomous ecosystem where AI agents can build, interact, and trade.

(If you’re already building, or want to build, agent-native trading, routing, or market-making on top of Orderly, let’s talk.)

data.title: Trade Without Limits: Orderly Unity by Orderly Network Unleashes First-Ever Omnichain  Orderbook on Solana
data.description: Orderly Network is live on Solana! Testnet now, Mainnet soon come!

blocks.title: Arjun Arora, COO, Orderly Network
blocks.body: ....we are bringing a seamless perps trading experience to Solana's vibrant ecosystem of traders, builders, and dApps.

**_Orderly Network expands to the Solana network following the successful deployment of its omnichain vault on the Solana Blockchain, allowing both EVM and non-EVM users trade perps from a shared orderbook_**

Orderly Network is proud to announce the successful deployment of its omnichain vault on the Solana Blockchain, building on its continued success in rapidly becoming one of the largest liquidity sources for Web3 trading.

Recently achieving a milestone of [$83 billion in total trading volume](https://dune.com/orderly_network/orderly-dashboard), Orderly Network offers omnichain trading infrastructure with ready-to-use liquidity for builders. Deployed across major chains, including Arbitrum, Base, Mantle, Ethereum Mainnet, OP, and Polygon, Orderly provides traders and DEXs with access to over 50 markets, ensuring robust liquidity on all major chains through a unified trading infrastructure.

With this successful deployment of its omnichain vault, Solana becomes the latest blockchain in Orderly’s pursuit for a truly omnichain DeFi trading experience, dubbed Orderly Unity. This means Solana-based traders can now deposit their assets on Orderly and trade against counterparts on all other Orderly-supported chains from the same orderbook, without their funds ever needing to leave their parent network.

Orderly thus effectively becomes the first trading venue in DeFi to unite onchain perps trading for both EVM and non-EVM users in the same shared orderbook. This is in-line with the protocol’s Orderly Unity charge, its perpetual mission to unify liquidity across all chains.

Speaking on the choice of Solana as the next destination for Orderly’s omnichain expansion, Arjun Arora, COO, Orderly Network, echoed;

>"Solana is renowned for its high throughput, low latency, and cost-effective transactions, making it an ideal network for the next phase of Orderly’s omnichain expansion. By deploying our omnichain vault on Solana, we are bringing a seamless perps trading experience to Solana's vibrant ecosystem of traders, builders, and dApps. This expansion marks the first in the space to offer perpetuals to both EVM and non-EVM users within one unified orderbook, supporting our Orderly Unity mission of a truly omnichain DeFi ecosystem.”

Orderly Network’s omnichain architecture leverages 3 primary layers in attaining its superior liquidity and agility DEX-building capabilities. 
- The **Asset layer** – responsible for handling all asset vaults deployed across multiple chains
- The **Engine layer** – houses a robust matching engine that powers Orderly’s unified orderbook 
- The **Settlement layer** – an L2 rollup where all trades converge and are settled, serving as a single source of truth for all trades on Orderly Network.

In essence, any time a trader executes a trade on any Orderly-powered protocol, the engine layer routes the trade via the orderbook where it is matched, and then relayed to the settlement layer to ensure transparency – all while users keep custody of their funds.

Ran Yi, Co-Founder, Orderly Network, speaking on the successful deployment, said


>"Our Orderly Unity mission to consolidate DeFi liquidity across multiple networks continues to gain momentum, and integrating with Solana is a significant milestone in this journey. By deploying our omnichain vault on Solana, we are enhancing the trading experience for users with Solana's high-performance capabilities and we are excited to be expanding our onchain perps liquidity infrastructure to the Solana blockchain."

Orderly envisions a DeFi ecosystem where anyone can trade any asset seamlessly on any venue and aims to usher in the future of omnichain perps trading — a perpetual mission dubbed the Orderly Unity. By deploying asset vaults on multiple chains where all trades are executed and settled on the [Orderly Chain](https://explorer.orderly.network/), Orderly creates a DeFi ecosystem with cross-netting capabilities and better capital efficiency — positioning itself as the DeFi equivalent of the Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME).

**About Orderly Network**

Orderly Network is transforming DeFi with its cutting-edge cloud liquidity infrastructure by unifying cross-chain trading through its  Orderly Chain and a single shared orderbook, while enhancing trading efficiency, delivering deeper liquidity, and ensuring tighter spreads. The platform provides seamless access to over 50 markets, empowering developers, traders, and exchanges to engage in limitless trading through a streamlined, cohesive trading ecosystem.

Learn more at [orderly.network](https://orderly.network/)

For PR enquiries related to this release, please contact [pr@orderly.network](mailto:pr@orderly.network)

data.title: WSOT 2024 Round Up: Orderly Network Concludes Crypto’s Most Exclusive Trading Competition, Winners Grab $175,000 Grand Prize
data.description: Rhino (@lBattleRhino) wins first edition of WSOT, hosted by Orderly Network

blocks.body:
Orderly Network is proud to announce [Rhino (@lBattleRhino)](https://x.com/lBattleRhino) as the winner of its landmark trading competition dubbed WSOT. The 4-week long competition, launched July 15th, featured [12 industry-renowned traders](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork/status/1812760169027076372) on the 𝕏 platform, each engaging in a grand-prix style points battle across various [Orderly-powered DEXs](https://orderly.network/docs/introduction/trade-on-orderly/builders). The trading venues—WOOFi Pro, IBX, LogX Pro, VOOI, and OXMarkets—hosted the intense competition, with each trader starting out with a collateral of $10,000.
![wsot kol1 (2).jpg](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/wsot_kol1_2_eb67c7e35c.jpg)
WSOT’s star-studded line-up of traders included [@DeFiSquared](https://twitter.com/defisquared?lang=en), [@CL207](https://x.com/CL207), [@theo_crypto99](https://x.com/theo_crypto99?lang=en), [@izebel_eth](https://twitter.com/izebel_eth), [Sats @satsdart](https://twitter.com/satsdart), [@thiccyth0t](https://twitter.com/thiccythot_?lang=en), [@Timeless_Crypto](https://x.com/Timeless_Crypto), [Rhino (@lBattleRhino)](https://x.com/lBattleRhino), [@naniXBT](https://twitter.com/nanixbt?lang=en), [@gametheorizing](https://x.com/gametheorizing), [@zhusu](https://twitter.com/zhusu?lang=en), and [@ByzGeneral](https://twitter.com/byzgeneral?lang=en). The first week started with a bang as popular crypto trader [@thiccyth0t](https://twitter.com/thiccythot_?lang=en) got rekt in his position shorting $WLD on VOOI, leaving 11 traders to battle out for the top spot. [@zhusu](https://twitter.com/zhusu?lang=en), trading on OxFun, eventually emerged Week 1’s winner with an impressive 187.9% cumulative PnL, earning the maximum 25 points for the week. DeFi^2 and Jordi snatched the 2nd & 3rd positions with cumulative PnLs of 132.7% and 48.2%, respectively. The following weeks 2 & 3 ushered in another drama as markets experienced extreme volatility. While Orderly Network’s renowned top-of-book liquidity withstood all turbulence, with 24-hour trading volumes surpassing $1.5 billion during this period, there was no saving many of the traders – including week 2 winner, [Jordi (@gametheorizing)](https://x.com/gametheorizing). It seemed like [@CL207](https://x.com/CL207) (trading on [WOOFi Pro](https://x.com/_WOOFi)) was NGMI but his strategy to play things safe paid off, earning him 2nd spot at the end of week 3. Rhino ([@lBattleRhino](https://x.com/lBattleRhino)) landed the top spot for Week 3 trading on IBX([@IBXtrade](https://x.com/IBXtrade)), however, [Jordi (@gametheorizing)](https://x.com/gametheorizing) maintained his spot at the top of the overall leaderboard having accrued the most points in the competition thus far (week 1 -3). Jordi held the lead entering the final and deciding week, but in the most dramatic late turn of events and a mere 2-points gap, [Rhino (@lBattleRhino)](https://x.com/lBattleRhino) swooped up the top spot which eventually saw him emerge as the **first-ever champion of WSOT 1.0 – snatching up the grand prize of $100,000** with [Jordi (@gametheorizing)](https://x.com/gametheorizing) landing 2nd position and bagging $50,000. The 3rd spot also saw a fierce trade-off with another mere 2 points lead with [Sats @satsdart](https://twitter.com/satsdart) knocking off [@CL207](https://x.com/CL207) to bag the $25,000 prize for the spot.
![top3.jpg](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/top3_09cf8ceab1.jpg)
Congratulations to the champ – **[Rhino (@lBattleRhino)](https://x.com/lBattleRhino)**!🚀🎉 Jordi Alexander([@gametheorizing](https://x.com/gametheorizing)), Founder/CEO, Selini Capital, and runner-up of the competition commented on WSOT. >"Competitions are always fun and involve a lot of game theory - the trading competition has not been just about trading well but also trying to consider opponent's trades and staying ahead of them, which is even more strategic" Popular retail trader and altcoin hunter – [@AltcoinSherpa](https://twitter.com/AltcoinSherpa) – kept tabs on things during the competition, providing regular updates on the positions and strategies of the traders. Speaking on his experience, he said; >“The current WSOT is fantastic. I think that this competition has been a rousing success thus far; mostly in part because we have so many great traders in it. I think it also really highlights the great benefits of Orderly overall and how versatile it is. Traders are trading on many different dexes and they’re all powered by Orderly. Pretty cool stuff.” Ran Yi, Co-Founder, Orderly Network, highlighted the resounding success of WSOT as an avenue to put the Orderly infrastructure to the test. He echoed, >“We are extremely grateful to every trader who participated in WSOT, as well as those who helped make it happen. WSOT 1.0 was an exciting and rewarding experience for everyone involved. It not only showcased the strength of our infrastructure but also provided invaluable feedback from top traders that will help us improve Orderly even further. If you thought WSOT 1.0 was impressive, just wait until you see what we have in store for WSOT 2.0. Stay tuned! In a recent blog post, Orderly Network announced a [60% revenue-sharing model](https://orderly.network/blog/orderly-network-ORDER-staking) for stakers of its $ORDER token following the TGE. According to [Dune Analytics](https://dune.com/orderly_network/orderly-dashboard), Orderly Network has already earned over $8 million in net fees, excluding the share generated by builders operating on the protocol. For those who hold and stake $ORDER, 60% of new net fees will continually accrue to them, with the possibility of future percentage increases. >"Revenue sharing has always been part of our plans at Orderly, and I’m thrilled that we can now offer this to our community," **said Ran, discussing the upcoming TGE**. "With $ORDER, stakers will receive a substantial share of net trading revenues, along with additional benefits tied to the future utilities of the token—details of which will be announced post-launch.” Catch up with Ran, Arjun, AltcoinSherpa, and many more guests on the WSOT Wrap Up 𝕏 Spaces at 9:30 AM UTC tomorrow.
![AMA 813.jpg](https://exuberant-sparkle-dc686d5c20.media.strapiapp.com/AMA_813_800c564601.jpg)
**About WSOT** _The World Series of Trading (WSOT) is an exclusive, “invite-only” trading competition hosted by Orderly Network. This prestigious event brings together industry-renowned KOLs (Key Opinion Leaders) and top traders for a high-stakes showdown on Orderly-powered DEXs. Competitors vie for the coveted WSOT Championship belt alongside substantial cash prizes. The WSOT competition is a signature event from Orderly, designed to showcase the strength of DeFi and attract institutional players into the decentralized finance space._ **About Orderly Network** _Orderly Network is a permissionless liquidity layer for Web3 trading. Built on omnichain infrastructure, Orderly enables deep liquidity for any asset across multiple blockchains. Focused on a future of DeFi that’s open to all, Orderly empowers developers to fluidly create a comprehensive array of financial products for any level of trader, without the risks of wrapped asset movement through cross-chain bridging._ Learn more at [orderly.network](https://orderly.network/) For PR enquiries related to this release, please contact [pr@orderly.network](mailto:pr@orderly.network)

data.title: The Orderly I 💜 Perps Trading Competition is Live!
data.description: Trade for your shot at $35,000+

blocks.body:
**Skill Finally Matters**: Inside the Orderly I 💜 Perps Trading Competition

Most perps trading competitions reward the same thing: the biggest wallet in the room. Grind volume, stack capital, and watch the whales take home the prize pool. It's a formula that's been repeated across DeFi for years and it's boring.

The Orderly I 💜 Perps Competition is something different. It's the first network-wide perps trading competition designed to reward *skill* over size. No whale advantages. No volume grinding. Just real trading ability, and a $35K+ prize pool that scales with participation.

Here's everything you need to know.

## What Is the I 💜 Perps Competition?

Running live through April 21st, the I 💜 Perps Competition is a 21-day trading contest that spans the entire Orderly ecosystem. That means you're not locked into a single DEX: you can trade on any Orderly-powered platform, including WOOFi, Raydium, Foxify, Dexless, Perptools, ArthurDEX, and more.

The prize pool starts at grows with total trading volume across the competition. The top 50% of traders earn rewards, and the top 10 DEXs will earn their share as well. The bottom 50% of traders will receive buffs in future editions, so there's upside no matter where you land.

**Register here:** [https://app.orderly.network/campaigns/perps-competition](https://app.orderly.network/campaigns/perps-competition)

---

## Why This Competition Is Different

Traditional PnL leaderboards have a fundamental problem: they favor capital, not competence. A trader with $1M can generate eye-popping PnL numbers through sheer position size, even with mediocre decision-making.

Orderly flipped the script with a **hybrid volatility-adjusted scoring model**. Instead of ranking traders by raw PnL or volume, the scoring blends:

- **PnL** — yes, profitability matters
- **ROI** — how efficiently you use your capital
- **Volatility-adjusted performance** — how well you manage risk relative to market conditions

What this means in practice: your **position management, execution quality, and risk control** are what determine your ranking.

A disciplined trader with $500 can outrank a sloppy trader with $50,000. That's the point.

---

## How It Works

The mechanics are straightforward:

**Daily points → Cumulative leaderboard.** Your performance is scored every day and aggregated over the full 21-day season. Consistency matters more than a single lucky trade.

**Trade across participating DEXs.** Pick your favorite Orderly-powered platform and compete.

**Referrals count.** Bring your friends and earn a share of their referees' points. Good traders tend to know other good traders.

**Bonus opportunities.** Social sharing rewards and Telegram participation bonuses give you additional ways to boost your standing.

---

## What You Need (and What You Don't)

Let's be clear about what this competition values.

**You don't need:**
- ❌ Huge capital
- ❌ Lucky trades

**You need:**
- ✅ Consistency
- ✅ Discipline
- ✅ Strategy

This is a competition for traders who've put in the work to develop an edge.

---

## The Sponsors

The I 💜 Perps Competition is backed by a strong lineup of ecosystem partners: **Kodiak, WOOFi, Foxify, Dexless, PERPtools, and ArthurDEX**

This kind of network-wide coordination is only possible because of how Orderly's infrastructure works. Every participating DEX shares the same omnichain orderbook, which means deep liquidity, tight spreads, and CEX-grade execution.

---

## Why It Matters for DeFi

Competitions like this do more than hand out prizes. They set a precedent.

By shifting the ranking criteria from capital size to genuine trading technique, Orderly is making a statement about what DeFi perps trading should look like. The space has matured past the point where "biggest bag wins" is an acceptable model. Skill-based competitions attract better traders, create higher-quality liquidity, and ultimately build stronger ecosystems.

It's also a showcase for what Orderly's infrastructure makes possible. A single competition, running across multiple DEXs, on multiple chains, all sharing one orderbook. No fragmentation. No bridging. Just trading.

---

## How to Get Started

1. **Register** at [https://app.orderly.network/campaigns/perps-competition](https://app.orderly.network/campaigns/perps-competition)
2. **Pick your DEX** — choose any Orderly-powered platform
3. **Trade perps** — focus on consistency, risk management, and execution
4. **Climb the leaderboard** — daily scoring means every session counts
5. **Refer friends** — earn a share of their points

The competition runs through **April 21st**.

Follow [@OrderlyNetwork](https://x.com/OrderlyNetwork) for updates.
